_**User**_

我看了最新的ui_ux_pro_max开源库，（digeino的ui_ux工具是模仿它设计的），ui_ux_pro_max最新版的开源库解释了它接收用户请求后的步骤。我下载了最新的版本到本地（/Users/dig/Downloads/ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main），你可以研究下。看我们的ui_ux_search工具是否也需要更新成它设定的workflow?是否可以编排一个eino agent来实现这个功能？同时，可以参照它附上了claude的skill（/Users/dig/Downloads/ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md）中间有调用它的python文件生成相应的md用于风格一致性。是否可以通过eino编排一套固定的工作流来实现？同时具体的步骤可以参考它的readme.md中的"How Design System Generation Works"，给我一个优化的建议和方案，先不要动代码

---

{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n)\n\n// AgentState 是在多 Agent 流程中传递的全局状态\n// 注意：业务特定的结构体（如 Outline, Pages, Design 等）应通过 Extensions 字段存储\n// 各个项目可以在自己的包中定义业务结构体，并使用 GetBusinessData/SetBusinessData 方法访问\ntype AgentState struct {\n\tSessionID       string                 &#96;json:\"session_id\"&#96;\n\tQuery           string                 &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;            // 用户的原始需求\n\tStatus          string                 &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;           // 当前状态\n\tResearchSummary string                 &#96;json:\"research_summary\"&#96; // Researcher 节点的输出总结\n\tExtensions      map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"extensions,omitempty\"&#96; // 扩展字段，用于存储项目特定的数据\n\tError           error                  &#96;json:\"error\"&#96;            // 错误信息\n}\n\n// ContextKey 用于在 context 中传递 key\ntype ContextKey string\n\nconst (\n\tCtxKeySessionID ContextKey = \"session_id\"\n)\n\n// GetExtension 获取扩展字段的值\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetExtension(key string) (interface{}, bool) {\n\tif s.Extensions == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\tval, ok := s.Extensions[key]\n\treturn val, ok\n}\n\n// SetExtension 设置扩展字段的值\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetExtension(key string, value interface{}) {\n\tif s.Extensions == nil {\n\t\ts.Extensions = make(map[string]interface{})\n\t}\n\ts.Extensions[key] = value\n}\n\n// GetStringExtension 获取字符串类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetStringExtension(key string) (string, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn \"\", false\n\t}\n\tstr, ok := val.(string)\n\treturn str, ok\n}\n\n// SetStringExtension 设置字符串类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetStringExtension(key string, value string) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetIntExtension 获取整数类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetIntExtension(key string) (int, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    var outline *DocumentOutline\n    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)\n    return outline, err\n}\n\nfunc SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {\n    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 5. AgentState 架构说明\n\n### 5.1 核心字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段：\n- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识\n- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识\n- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结\n- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）\n\n### 5.2 业务结构体\n\n**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。\n\n这样做的好处：\n- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性\n- ✅ 不同项目可以定义自己的业务结构体\n- ✅ 避免业务逻辑污染核心库\n- ✅ 更好的类型安全和代码组织\n\n### 5.3 迁移指南\n\n如果您之前使用了 &#96;AgentState&#96; 中的业务字段（如 &#96;Outline&#96;、&#96;Pages&#96; 等），需要：\n\n1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体\n2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问\n3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例\n\n## 6. 常见问题\n\n- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。\n- **扩展性**: 如果需要增加新的配置项，请在 &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/config&#96; 包中扩展 &#96;Config&#96; 结构体。\n- **项目特定字段**: 使用 &#96;AgentState.Extensions&#96; 字段存储项目特定的数据，而不是修改核心库的 &#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体。\n- **业务结构体**: 所有业务特定的结构体都应该在项目包中定义，通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储，并使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法访问。",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "func GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "    var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "## 5. AgentState 架构说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "### 5.1 核心字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "### 5.2 业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "这样做的好处："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性"
          },

            "lineNumber": 263,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,

            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "如果您之前使用了 &#96;AgentState&#96; 中的业务字段（如 &#96;Outline&#96;、&#96;Pages&#96; 等），需要："
          },

            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体"

          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "## 6. 常见问题"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "- **扩展性**: 如果需要增加新的配置项，请在 &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/config&#96; 包中扩展 &#96;Config&#96; 结构体。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "- **项目特定字段**: 使用 &#96;AgentState.Extensions&#96; 字段存储项目特定的数据，而不是修改核心库的 &#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "- **业务结构体**: 所有业务特定的结构体都应该在项目包中定义，通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储，并使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法访问。"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 280
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 232
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2795153856277466
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tools\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/wx\"\n)\n\n// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误\ntype safeTool struct {\n\ttool.InvokableTool\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {\n\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {\n\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)\n\tif e != nil {\n\t\treturn e.Error(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn out, nil\n}\n\n// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具\nfunc SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {\n\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn safeTool{\n\t\tInvokableTool: t,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集\nfunc BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool\n\n\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具\n\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）\n\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具\n\treturn tools, nil\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino 使用指南\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。\n\n## 1. 安装\n\n在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngo get github.com/originaleric/digeino\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 2. 配置管理\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。\n\n### 2.1 依赖结构\n\n配置主要包含两个部分：\n- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。\n\n### 2.2 使用示例\n\n#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）\n\n首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nHttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: true\n    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n然后在代码中加载：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc main() {\n    // 加载配置文件\n    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")\n    if err != nil {\n        panic(err)\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc initConfig() {\n    cfg := config.Default()\n    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\"\n    config.Set(cfg)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3. 核心功能使用\n\n### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\"\n\nfunc someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "HttpServer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Api:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "然后在代码中加载："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        panic(err)"

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 62
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()"

          {

            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package webhook\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\n// StatusCollector 状态收集器\ntype StatusCollector struct {\n\texecutionID string\n\tappName     string\n\trequestID   string\n\tstartTime   time.Time\n\n\twebhookClients []*WebhookClient\n\tstatusStore    StatusStoreInterface\n\tstatusCallback func(status ExecutionStatus)\n\n\tmu            sync.Mutex\n\tstatusHistory []ExecutionStatus\n\tnodeStartTime map[string]time.Time\n\tpath          []string\n\n\ttokenUsageMap map[string]*Usage\n\ttotalUsage    Usage\n}\n\n// NewStatusCollector 创建状态收集器\nfunc NewStatusCollector(executionID, appName, requestID string) *StatusCollector {\n\treturn \u0026StatusCollector{\n\t\texecutionID:   executionID,\n\t\tappName:       appName,\n\t\trequestID:     requestID,\n\t\tstartTime:     time.Now(),\n\t\tnodeStartTime: make(map[string]time.Time),\n\t\ttokenUsageMap: make(map[string]*Usage),\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddWebhookClient 添加 Webhook 客户端\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()\n\tsc.webhookClients = append(sc.webhookClients, client)\n}\n\n// SetStatusStore 设置状态存储\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusStore(store StatusStoreInterface) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()\n\tsc.statusStore = store\n}\n\n// SetStatusCallback 设置状态回调\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusCallback(callback func(status ExecutionStatus)) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()\n\tsc.statusCallback = callback\n}\n\n// OnNodeStart 节点开始执行\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeStart(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, input interface{}) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tsc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey] = time.Now()",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package status\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n\n\t\"gorm.io/driver/mysql\"\n\t\"gorm.io/gorm\"\n)\n\n// StatusStore 状态存储接口\ntype StatusStore interface {\n\tCreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord\n\tGetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool)\n\tAddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool\n\tSetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool\n\tListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int)\n}\n\n// ExecutionRecord 执行记录\ntype ExecutionRecord struct {\n\tExecutionID   string\n\tAppName       string\n\tRequestID     string\n\tStartTime     time.Time\n\tEndTime       *time.Time\n\tStatus        string\n\tStatusHistory []webhook.ExecutionStatus\n\tResult        *webhook.Message\n\tError         string\n\tmu            sync.RWMutex\n}\n\n// memoryStatusStore 内存实现\ntype memoryStatusStore struct {\n\tmu         sync.RWMutex\n\texecutions map[string]*ExecutionRecord\n\tmaxRecords int\n}\n\nfunc NewMemoryStatusStore(maxRecords int) StatusStore {\n\treturn \u0026memoryStatusStore{\n\t\texecutions: make(map[string]*ExecutionRecord),\n\t\tmaxRecords: maxRecords,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *memoryStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trecord := \u0026ExecutionRecord{\n\t\tExecutionID:   executionID,\n\t\tAppName:       appName,\n\t\tRequestID:     requestID,\n\t\tStartTime:     time.Now(),\n\t\tStatus:        \"running\",\n\t\tStatusHistory: make([]webhook.ExecutionStatus, 0),\n\t}\n\ts.executions[executionID] = record\n\treturn record\n}\n\nfunc (s *memoryStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]\n\treturn record, exists\n}\n\nfunc (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string,",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）\n    store := status.GetDefaultStore()\n    \n    // 创建执行记录\n    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")\n    \n    // 更新状态\n    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{\n        Type: \"node_start\",\n        NodeKey: \"node_1\",\n        Status: \"running\",\n    })\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3.2 Webhook 客户端\n\n用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\nfunc notifyCallback() {\n    // 获取 Webhook 配置\n    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)\n    if webhookCfg == nil {\n        return\n    }\n\n    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)\n    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 4. AgentState 扩展字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。\n\n### 4.1 基本使用\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\"\n\n// 创建 AgentState\nstate := \u0026digeino.AgentState{\n    SessionID: \"session_001\",\n    Query:     \"用户查询\",\n}\n\n// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")\n\n// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）\nstate.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)\n\n// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）\nstate.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)\n\n// 设置任意类型的扩展字段\nstate.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{\n    \"key1\": \"value1\",\n    \"key2\": 123,\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.2 获取扩展字段\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 获取字符串类型\npdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)\n}\n\n// 获取整数类型\npageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94

            "text": "### 3.2 Webhook 客户端"

            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "// 获取整数类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "pageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "if ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "// 获取布尔类型"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *AgentState) GetIntExtension(key string) (int, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}\n\t// 支持多种数字类型\n\tswitch v := val.(type) {\n\tcase int:\n\t\treturn v, true\n\tcase int64:\n\t\treturn int(v), true\n\tcase float64:\n\t\treturn int(v), true\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetIntExtension 设置整数类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetIntExtension(key string, value int) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetBoolExtension 获取布尔类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetBoolExtension(key string) (bool, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false, false\n\t}\n\tb, ok := val.(bool)\n\treturn b, ok\n}\n\n// SetBoolExtension 设置布尔类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetBoolExtension(key string, value bool) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetBusinessData 获取业务数据结构（通过 JSON 序列化/反序列化进行类型转换）\n// 用于获取存储在 Extensions 中的复杂业务对象\n// 示例：var outline *DocumentOutline; err := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetBusinessData(key string, target interface{}) error {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"key %s not found in extensions\", key)\n\t}\n\t// 使用 JSON 序列化/反序列化进行类型转换\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(val)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal business data for key %s: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, target); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to unmarshal business data for key %s: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// SetBusinessData 设置业务数据结构\n// 用于将复杂业务对象存储到 Extensions 中\n// 示例：state.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetBusinessData(key string, value interface{}) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration\n\n**Date**: 2026-01-11\n**Category**: Feature / Tools\n\n## Summary\nIntegrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles.\n\n## New Features\n- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge.\n- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;.\n- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\").\n- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.).\n- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework.\n\n## Components Added\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts.\n\n## How to Use\nImport the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n\n// ... \n\nuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\nif err == nil {\n    tools = append(tools, uiTool)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Impact\nThis update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**Date**: 2026-01-11"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Category**: Feature / Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Integrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## New Features"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\")."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Components Added"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## How to Use"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "Import the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "// ... "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "uiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "if err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    tools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "This update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11_ui_ux_plugin_integration.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1853695511817932
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package webhook\n\n// Usage 使用量统计\ntype Usage struct {\n\tPromptTokens     int &#96;json:\"prompt_tokens\"&#96;\n\tCompletionTokens int &#96;json:\"completion_tokens\"&#96;\n\tTotalTokens      int &#96;json:\"total_tokens\"&#96;\n}\n\n// ExecutionStatus 执行状态\ntype ExecutionStatus struct {\n\t// 基础信息\n\tType        string &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;         // \"node_start\" | \"node_end\" | \"data_flow\" | \"control_flow\" | \"error\" | \"complete\"\n\tTimestamp   int64  &#96;json:\"timestamp\"&#96;    // Unix 时间戳（毫秒）\n\tExecutionID string &#96;json:\"execution_id\"&#96; // 执行 ID（用于关联）\n\n\t// 节点信息\n\tNodeKey  string &#96;json:\"node_key,omitempty\"&#96;  // 节点标识\n\tNodeType string &#96;json:\"node_type,omitempty\"&#96; // 节点类型\n\tStatus   string &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;              // \"running\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\n\tError    string &#96;json:\"error,omitempty\"&#96;     // 错误信息\n\n\t// 数据流信息\n\tDataFlow *DataFlowStatus &#96;json:\"data_flow,omitempty\"&#96;\n\n\t// 控制流信息\n\tControlFlow *ControlFlowStatus &#96;json:\"control_flow,omitempty\"&#96;\n\n\t// 执行上下文\n\tAppName   string &#96;json:\"app_name\"&#96;   // Agent 名称\n\tRequestID string &#96;json:\"request_id\"&#96; // 请求 ID（可选）\n}\n\n// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态\ntype DataFlowStatus struct {\n\tInputCount  int                      &#96;json:\"input_count\"&#96;\n\tOutputCount int                      &#96;json:\"output_count\"&#96;\n\tInputData   []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"input_data,omitempty\"&#96;  // 可选，可配置是否包含\n\tOutputData  []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"output_data,omitempty\"&#96; // 可选\n}\n\n// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态\ntype ControlFlowStatus struct {\n\tBranchFrom string   &#96;json:\"branch_from,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tBranchTo   string   &#96;json:\"branch_to,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tCondition  string   &#96;json:\"condition,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tPath       []string &#96;json:\"path\"&#96; // 执行路径\n}\n\n// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体\ntype WebhookPayload struct {\n\tEvent     string          &#96;json:\"event\"&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\tOutputData  []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"output_data,omitempty\"&#96; // 可选"

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"os\"\n\n\t\"gopkg.in/yaml.v3\"\n)\n\n// Config 根配置结构\ntype Config struct {\n\tHttpServer HttpServerConfig &#96;yaml:\"HttpServer\" json:\"HttpServer\"&#96;\n\tStatus     StatusConfig     &#96;yaml:\"Status\" json:\"Status\"&#96;\n\tWeChat     WeChatConfig     &#96;yaml:\"WeChat\" json:\"WeChat\"&#96;\n}\n\n// HttpServerConfig HTTP 服务配置\ntype HttpServerConfig struct {\n\tApi struct {\n\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t} &#96;yaml:\"Api\" json:\"Api\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusConfig 状态相关配置：包含 Webhook 与 Store\ntype StatusConfig struct {\n\tWebhook AppWebhookConfig  &#96;yaml:\"Webhook\" json:\"Webhook\"&#96;\n\tStore   StatusStoreConfig &#96;yaml:\"Store\" json:\"Store\"&#96;\n}\n\n// AppWebhookConfig 应用级 Webhook 配置\ntype AppWebhookConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool         &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tURL     string        &#96;yaml:\"URL\" json:\"URL,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tConfig  WebhookConfig &#96;yaml:\",inline\" json:\"Config\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig struct {\n\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;\n\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置\ntype StatusStoreConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql\n\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;\n}\n\n// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置\ntype MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {\n\tID           uint32 &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;\n\tExecutionID  string &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;index\"&#96;\n\tType         string &#96;gorm:\"column:type;size:32;not null\"&#96;\n\tTimestampMs  int64  &#96;gorm:\"column:timestamp_ms;not null\"&#96;\n\tNodeKey      string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_key;size:100\"&#96;\n\tNodeType     string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_type;size:50\"&#96;\n\tStatus       string &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;\n\tError        string &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;\n\tAppName      string &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;\n\tRequestID    string &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;\n\tDataFlowJSON string &#96;gorm:\"column:data_flow;type:text\"&#96;\n\tControlJSON  string &#96;gorm:\"column:control_flow;type:text\"&#96;\n\tCreatedAt    time.Time\n}\n\ntype mysqlStatusStore struct {\n\tdb          *gorm.DB\n\texecTable   string\n\tstatusTable string\n}\n\nfunc NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg config.StatusStoreConfig) (StatusStore, error) {\n\tdsn := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s@tcp(%s:%d)/%s?charset=utf8mb4\u0026parseTime=True\u0026loc=Local\",\n\t\tcfg.MySQL.User, cfg.MySQL.Password, cfg.MySQL.Host, cfg.MySQL.Port, cfg.MySQL.Database)\n\n\tdb, err := gorm.Open(mysql.Open(dsn), \u0026gorm.Config{})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026mysqlStatusStore{\n\t\tdb:          db,\n\t\texecTable:   cfg.MySQL.ExecTable,\n\t\tstatusTable: cfg.MySQL.StatusTable,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tmodel := \u0026MySQLExecutionModel{\n\t\tExecutionID: executionID,\n\t\tAppName:     appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   requestID,\n\t\tStartTime:   now,\n\t\tStatus:      \"running\",\n\t}\n\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Create(model)\n\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{\n\t\tExecutionID: executionID,\n\t\tAppName:     appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   requestID,\n\t\tStartTime:   now,\n\t\tStatus:      \"running\",\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string)",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "if ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型\nisProcessed, ok := state.GetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Is Processed: %v\\n\", isProcessed)\n}\n\n// 获取任意类型\nval, ok := state.GetExtension(\"complex_data\")\nif ok {\n    // 进行类型断言\n    if data, ok := val.(map[string]interface{}); ok {\n        // 使用 data\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.3 最佳实践\n\n1. **定义扩展键常量**：建议在项目中使用常量定义扩展键，避免硬编码字符串：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在项目根目录或 constants 包中定义\nconst (\n    ExtensionKeyPdfPath = \"pdf_path\"\n    ExtensionKeyCustomField = \"custom_field\"\n)\n\n// 使用\nstate.SetStringExtension(ExtensionKeyPdfPath, \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **类型安全**：优先使用类型安全的辅助方法（&#96;GetStringExtension&#96;、&#96;SetStringExtension&#96; 等），而不是直接使用 &#96;GetExtension&#96;。\n\n3. **JSON 序列化**：&#96;Extensions&#96; 字段会被自动序列化到 JSON，使用 &#96;omitempty&#96; 标签，空 map 不会出现在 JSON 中。\n\n### 4.4 存储业务数据结构\n\n对于复杂的业务数据结构（如文档大纲、页面列表等），可以使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96; 和 &#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在您的项目中定义业务结构体\ntype DocumentOutline struct {\n    Title          string        &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;\n    Topic          string        &#96;json:\"topic\"&#96;\n    TargetAudience string        &#96;json:\"target_audience\"&#96;\n    PageOutlines   []PageOutline &#96;json:\"pages\"&#96;\n}\n\n// 设置业务数据\noutline := \u0026DocumentOutline{\n    Title: \"我的文档\",\n    Topic: \"技术文档\",\n}\nstate.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)\n\n// 获取业务数据\nvar outline *DocumentOutline\nerr := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)\nif err != nil {\n    // 处理错误\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**最佳实践**：在项目包中定义业务结构体和类型安全的辅助方法：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在项目包中（如 DigPdf/eino/types.go）\npackage eino_agent\n\nconst ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    ",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "2. **类型安全**：优先使用类型安全的辅助方法（&#96;GetStringExtension&#96;、&#96;SetStringExtension&#96; 等），而不是直接使用 &#96;GetExtension&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "3. **JSON 序列化**：&#96;Extensions&#96; 字段会被自动序列化到 JSON，使用 &#96;omitempty&#96; 标签，空 map 不会出现在 JSON 中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "### 4.4 存储业务数据结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "对于复杂的业务数据结构（如文档大纲、页面列表等），可以使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96; 和 &#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "// 在您的项目中定义业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "type DocumentOutline struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    Title          string        &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    Topic          string        &#96;json:\"topic\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    TargetAudience string        &#96;json:\"target_audience\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    PageOutlines   []PageOutline &#96;json:\"pages\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "// 设置业务数据"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "outline := \u0026DocumentOutline{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    Title: \"我的文档\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    Topic: \"技术文档\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "state.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "// 获取业务数据"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "err := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    // 处理错误"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "**最佳实践**：在项目包中定义业务结构体和类型安全的辅助方法："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "// 在项目包中（如 DigPdf/eino/types.go）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "package eino_agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "func GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 235
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 159
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.16780996322631836
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Update: WeChat Push Tool Integration\n\n**Date**: 2026-01-15\n**Category**: Feature / Tools\n\n## Summary\nIntegrated a WeChat push notification tool as a reusable component within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to send text messages to WeChat users through WeChat Official Account (服务号) API. The tool includes automatic access token management with caching and refresh capabilities.\n\n## New Features\n- **WeChat Message Sending**: Send text messages to WeChat users via Official Account API\n- **Automatic Token Management**: Access token caching and automatic refresh with file-based persistence\n- **Batch Sending Support**: Send messages to multiple users (configured OpenIDs) or a single user\n- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error handling with detailed failure reasons for each recipient\n- **Configuration-Driven**: Fully configurable through global config with enable/disable toggle\n- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework\n\n## Components Added\n- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;: Type definitions for requests, responses, and API structures\n- &#96;tools/wx/wx_token.go&#96;: Access token management with file-based caching and automatic refresh\n- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;: Core message sending logic with error handling\n- &#96;tools/wx/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory\n- &#96;config/config.go&#96;: Added &#96;WeChatConfig&#96; structure to global configuration\n- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;: Added WeChat configuration section with example values\n\n## Configuration\n\nAdd the following section to your &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nWeChat:\n  Enabled: true                    # Enable/disable WeChat push functionality\n  AppID: \"your_appid\"              # WeChat Official Account AppID\n  AppSecret: \"your_app_secret\"     # WeChat Official Account AppSecret\n  OpenIDs:                         # Default recipient OpenID list\n    - \"openid1\"\n    - \"openid2\"\n  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # Access token storage path\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## How to Use\n\nThe tool is automatically registered in &#96;BaseTools()&#96; if enabled in configuration:",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Update: WeChat Push Tool Integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**Date**: 2026-01-15"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Category**: Feature / Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Integrated a WeChat push notification tool as a reusable component within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to send text messages to WeChat users through WeChat Official Account (服务号) API. The tool includes automatic access token management with caching and refresh capabilities."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## New Features"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **WeChat Message Sending**: Send text messages to WeChat users via Official Account API"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Automatic Token Management**: Access token caching and automatic refresh with file-based persistence"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Batch Sending Support**: Send messages to multiple users (configured OpenIDs) or a single user"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error handling with detailed failure reasons for each recipient"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- **Configuration-Driven**: Fully configurable through global config with enable/disable toggle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "## Components Added"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;: Type definitions for requests, responses, and API structures"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_token.go&#96;: Access token management with file-based caching and automatic refresh"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;: Core message sending logic with error handling"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.go&#96;: Added &#96;WeChatConfig&#96; structure to global configuration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;: Added WeChat configuration section with example values"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "## Configuration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "Add the following section to your &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "WeChat:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Enabled: true                    # Enable/disable WeChat push functionality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  AppID: \"your_appid\"              # WeChat Official Account AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  AppSecret: \"your_app_secret\"     # WeChat Official Account AppSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  OpenIDs:                         # Default recipient OpenID list"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    - \"openid1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    - \"openid2\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # Access token storage path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "## How to Use"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "The tool is automatically registered in &#96;BaseTools()&#96; if enabled in configuration:"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 42
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-15_wechat_push_tool.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.16553723812103271
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n)\n\n// UIUXSearchRequest defines the input parameters for the UI/UX search tool.\ntype UIUXSearchRequest struct {\n\tQuery      string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=检索关键词，如 'minimalism color palette' 或 'dashboard layout'\"&#96;\n\tDomain     string &#96;json:\"domain,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=检索领域，可选值: style, color, chart, landing, product, prompt, ux, typography. 不填则自动检测\"&#96;\n\tStack      string &#96;json:\"stack,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=特定技术栈，如 react, tailwind, swiftui 等\"&#96;\n\tMaxResults int    &#96;json:\"max_results,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=最大返回结果数，默认 5,default=5\"&#96;\n}\n\n// UIUXSearchResponse defines the output format for the UI/UX search tool.\ntype UIUXSearchResponse struct {\n\tResult string &#96;json:\"result\"&#96;\n}\n\n// NewUIUXSearchTool creates a new Eino tool for UI/UX design intelligence.\nfunc NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool",

            "text": "\tDomain     string &#96;json:\"domain,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=检索领域，可选值: style, color, chart, landing, product, prompt, ux, typography. 不填则自动检测\"&#96;"
          },

            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\tMaxResults int    &#96;json:\"max_results,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=最大返回结果数，默认 5,default=5\"&#96;"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeStart(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, input interface{}) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tsc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey] = time.Now()\n\tsc.path = append(sc.path, nodeKey)\n\tsc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{\n\t\tType:        \"node_start\",\n\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,\n\t\tNodeKey:     nodeKey,\n\t\tNodeType:    nodeType,\n\t\tStatus:      \"running\",\n\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,\n\t}\n\n\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)\n}\n\n// OnNodeEnd 节点结束执行\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeEnd(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, output interface{}, err error) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tstartTime, ok := sc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey]\n\tsc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{\n\t\tType:        \"node_end\",\n\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,\n\t\tNodeKey:     nodeKey,\n\t\tNodeType:    nodeType,\n\t\tStatus:      \"success\",\n\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,\n\t}\n\n\tif ok {\n\t\t// 可以计算耗时等\n\t\t_ = time.Since(startTime)\n\t}\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\"\n\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()\n\t}\n\n\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)\n}\n\n// OnComplete 执行完成\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) OnComplete(ctx context.Context, result *schema.Message, err error) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tpath := make([]string, len(sc.path))\n\tcopy(path, sc.path)\n\tsc.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{\n\t\tType:        \"complete\",\n\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,\n\t\tStatus:      \"success\",\n\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,\n\t\tControlFlow: \u0026ControlFlowStatus{\n\t\t\tPath: path,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\"\n\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()\n\t}\n\n\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)\n}\n\n// sendStatusAsync 异步发送状态\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)",

          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"success\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\tControlFlow: \u0026ControlFlowStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\t\tPath: path,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t\t},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "// sendStatusAsync 异步发送状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package wx\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\n// NewWeChatMessageTool 创建微信推送工具\nfunc NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tcfg := config.Get()\n\tif cfg.WeChat.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeChat.Enabled {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat tool is not enabled in config\")\n\t}\n\n\tif cfg.WeChat.AppID == \"\" || cfg.WeChat.AppSecret == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat AppID or AppSecret not configured\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\n\t\t\"send_wechat_message\",\n\t\t\"通过微信服务号推送文字消息给指定的用户openid。支持发送给单个用户或配置中的所有用户。注意：用户需要在48小时内与公众号有交互才能接收客服消息。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeChatTextMessageRequest) (*SendWeChatTextMessageResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, *req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn \u0026resp, nil\n\t\t},\n\t)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

          },

            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat AppID or AppSecret not configured\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,

          },

            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,

            "lineNumber": 24,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\t\"通过微信服务号推送文字消息给指定的用户openid。支持发送给单个用户或配置中的所有用户。注意：用户需要在48小时内与公众号有交互才能接收客服消息。\","

            "lineNumber": 26,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino Performance Optimization Update - 2026-01-11\n\n## Overview\nThis update focuses on improving the responsiveness of Eino-based applications by eliminating blocking operations in the status collection and webhook delivery layer.\n\n## Key Changes\n\n### 1. Asynchronous Status Collection\nThe &#96;StatusCollector&#96; has been refactored to prevent slowing down the main execution graph during state persistence and webhook delivery.\n- **Async Execution**: &#96;StatusStore.AddStatus&#96; and &#96;WebhookClient.SendStatus&#96; now run in their own goroutines.\n- **Benefit**: Zero-latency impact on the Eino Graph from slow database writes or network-constrained webhook endpoints.\n- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;\n\n### 2. HTTP Connection Pooling for Webhooks\n&#96;WebhookClient&#96; now utilizes a shared, high-performance HTTP Transport.\n- **Connection Reuse**: Configured &#96;MaxIdleConns&#96; and &#96;MaxIdleConnsPerHost&#96; to &#96;100&#96; to support high-frequency event delivery.\n- **Benefit**: Significantly reduces per-request overhead and prevents port exhaustion under load.\n- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/webhook_client.go&#96;\n\n### 3. Improved Token Usage Tracking\n- **Aggregation**: Enhanced the &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96; logic to accurately sum tokens across complex parallel and nested nodes.\n- **Benefit**: Provides a reliable metric for cost and performance monitoring.\n\n## Impact\nThese changes collectively allow &#96;DigFlow&#96; and other dependent agents to achieve significantly higher throughput and lower end-to-end latency, especially in multi-node graph architectures.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino Performance Optimization Update - 2026-01-11"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "This update focuses on improving the responsiveness of Eino-based applications by eliminating blocking operations in the status collection and webhook delivery layer."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Key Changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### 1. Asynchronous Status Collection"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "The &#96;StatusCollector&#96; has been refactored to prevent slowing down the main execution graph during state persistence and webhook delivery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **Async Execution**: &#96;StatusStore.AddStatus&#96; and &#96;WebhookClient.SendStatus&#96; now run in their own goroutines."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Zero-latency impact on the Eino Graph from slow database writes or network-constrained webhook endpoints."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "### 2. HTTP Connection Pooling for Webhooks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;WebhookClient&#96; now utilizes a shared, high-performance HTTP Transport."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **Connection Reuse**: Configured &#96;MaxIdleConns&#96; and &#96;MaxIdleConnsPerHost&#96; to &#96;100&#96; to support high-frequency event delivery."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Significantly reduces per-request overhead and prevents port exhaustion under load."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/webhook_client.go&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### 3. Improved Token Usage Tracking"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **Aggregation**: Enhanced the &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96; logic to accurately sum tokens across complex parallel and nested nodes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Provides a reliable metric for cost and performance monitoring."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "These changes collectively allow &#96;DigFlow&#96; and other dependent agents to achieve significantly higher throughput and lower end-to-end latency, especially in multi-node graph architectures."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11-performance-optimization.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.14158949255943298
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\ntype UserMessage struct {\n\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;\n\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;\n\tHistory []*schema.Message &#96;json:\"history\"&#96;\n}\n\n// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） ==========\n\n// Usage 使用量统计\ntype Usage = webhook.Usage\n\n// ExecutionStatus 执行状态\ntype ExecutionStatus = webhook.ExecutionStatus\n\n// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态\ntype DataFlowStatus = webhook.DataFlowStatus\n\n// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态\ntype ControlFlowStatus = webhook.ControlFlowStatus\n\n// WebhookConfig Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig = config.WebhookConfig\n\n// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体\ntype WebhookPayload = webhook.WebhookPayload\n\n// Message 消息（用于 Webhook 和 StatusStore）\ntype Message = webhook.Message",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""

            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "type UserMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tHistory []*schema.Message &#96;json:\"history\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） =========="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "// Usage 使用量统计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "type Usage = webhook.Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "// ExecutionStatus 执行状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "type ExecutionStatus = webhook.ExecutionStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "type DataFlowStatus = webhook.DataFlowStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "type ControlFlowStatus = webhook.ControlFlowStatus"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "// WebhookConfig Webhook 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "type WebhookConfig = config.WebhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "type WebhookPayload = webhook.WebhookPayload"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "// Message 消息（用于 Webhook 和 StatusStore）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "type Message = webhook.Message"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"encoding/csv\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n//go:embed data/*.csv data/stacks/*.csv\nvar designData embed.FS\n\n// CSVConfigEntry defines the configuration for each design domain\ntype CSVConfigEntry struct {\n\tFile       string\n\tSearchCols []string\n\tOutputCols []string\n}\n\n// CSVConfigs maps domain keys to their respective CSV configurations\nvar CSVConfigs = map[string]CSVConfigEntry{\n\t\"style\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/styles.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Type\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Colors\", \"Effects \u0026 Animation\", \"Best For\", \"Performance\", \"Accessibility\", \"Framework Compatibility\", \"Complexity\"},\n\t},\n\t\"prompt\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/prompts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\", \"Implementation Checklist\"},\n\t},\n\t\"color\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/colors.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary (Hex)\", \"Secondary (Hex)\", \"CTA (Hex)\", \"Background (Hex)\", \"Text (Hex)\", \"Border (Hex)\", \"Notes\"},\n\t},\n\t\"chart\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/charts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Accessibility Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Secondary Options\", \"Color Guidance\", \"Accessibility Notes\", \"Library Recommendation\", \"Interactive Level\"},\n\t},\n\t\"landing\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/landing.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Conversion Optimization\", \"Section Order\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Section Order\", \"Primary CTA Placement\", \"Color Strategy\", \"Conversion Optimization\"},\n\t},\n\t\"product\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/products.csv\",",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "HttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: false\n    URL: \"\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n    method: \"POST\"\n    timeout: 5\n    retry_count: 3\n    retry_delay: 1000\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\"\n    MySQL:\n      Host: \"127.0.0.1\"\n      Port: 3306\n      User: \"root\"\n      Password: \"\"\n      Database: \"digpdf\"\n      ExecTable: \"df_execution\"\n      StatusTable: \"df_execution_status\"\n\nWeChat:\n  Enabled: false                    # 是否启用微信推送功能\n  AppID: \"\"                         # 微信服务号 AppID\n  AppSecret: \"\"                     # 微信服务号 AppSecret\n  OpenIDs: []                       # 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表\n  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # AccessToken 存储文件路径",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {\n\tvar model MySQLExecutionModel\n\tif err := s.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).First(\u0026model).Error; err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{\n\t\tExecutionID: model.ExecutionID,\n\t\tAppName:     model.AppName,\n\t\tRequestID:   model.RequestID,\n\t\tStartTime:   model.StartTime,\n\t\tEndTime:     model.EndTime,\n\t\tStatus:      model.Status,\n\t\tError:       model.Error,\n\t}, true\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {\n\tvar dataJson, controlJson string\n\tif status.DataFlow != nil {\n\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.DataFlow)\n\t\tdataJson = string(b)\n\t}\n\tif status.ControlFlow != nil {\n\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.ControlFlow)\n\t\tcontrolJson = string(b)\n\t}\n\n\tstatusModel := \u0026MySQLExecutionStatusModel{\n\t\tExecutionID:  executionID,\n\t\tType:         status.Type,\n\t\tTimestampMs:  status.Timestamp,\n\t\tNodeKey:      status.NodeKey,\n\t\tNodeType:     status.NodeType,\n\t\tStatus:       status.Status,\n\t\tError:        status.Error,\n\t\tAppName:      status.AppName,\n\t\tRequestID:    status.RequestID,\n\t\tDataFlowJSON: dataJson,\n\t\tControlJSON:  controlJson,\n\t}\n\ts.db.Table(s.statusTable).Create(statusModel)\n\n\tif status.Type == \"complete\" {\n\t\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"status\":   \"completed\",\n\t\t\t\"end_time\": time.Now(),\n\t\t}\n\t\tif status.Status == \"error\" {\n\t\t\tupdate[\"status\"] = \"failed\"\n\t\t\tupdate[\"error\"] = status.Error\n\t\t}\n\t\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {\n\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"result_role\":    result.Role,\n\t\t\"result_content\": result.Content,\n\t}\n\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int)",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;\n\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;\n\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;\n\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;\n\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;\n\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;\n\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置\ntype WeChatConfig struct {\n\tEnabled     *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;         // 是否启用微信推送功能\n\tAppID       string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;             // 微信服务号 AppID\n\tAppSecret   string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;     // 微信服务号 AppSecret\n\tOpenIDs     []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;          // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表\n\tTokenFilePath string &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）\n}\n\nvar (\n\t// DefaultConfig 全局默认配置\n\tcurrentConfig *Config\n)\n\n// Load 从文件加载配置\nfunc Load(path string) (*Config, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar cfg Config\n\tif err := yaml.Unmarshal(data, \u0026cfg); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcurrentConfig = \u0026cfg\n\treturn \u0026cfg, nil\n}\n\n// Get 获取当前配置\nfunc Get() *Config {\n\tif currentConfig == nil {\n\t\tcurrentConfig = Default()\n\t}\n\treturn currentConfig\n}\n\n// Set 设置当前配置\nfunc Set(cfg *Config) {\n\tcurrentConfig = cfg\n}\n\n// Default 返回默认配置\nfunc Default() *Config {\n\tenabled := true\n\twechatDisabled := false",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package status\n\nimport (\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n)\n\n// StatusStoreAdapter 适配器，将 status.StatusStore 适配为 webhook.StatusStoreInterface\ntype StatusStoreAdapter struct {\n\tstore StatusStore\n}\n\n// NewStatusStoreAdapter 创建适配器\nfunc NewStatusStoreAdapter(store StatusStore) *StatusStoreAdapter {\n\treturn \u0026StatusStoreAdapter{store: store}\n}\n\n// CreateExecution 创建执行记录\nfunc (a *StatusStoreAdapter) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) interface{} {\n\treturn a.store.CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID)\n}\n\n// AddStatus 添加状态更新\nfunc (a *StatusStoreAdapter) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {\n\treturn a.store.AddStatus(executionID, status)\n}\n\n// SetResult 设置执行结果\nfunc (a *StatusStoreAdapter) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {\n\treturn a.store.SetResult(executionID, result)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package status"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "// StatusStoreAdapter 适配器，将 status.StatusStore 适配为 webhook.StatusStoreInterface"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "type StatusStoreAdapter struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\tstore StatusStore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },

{
