    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino 使用指南\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。\n\n## 1. 安装\n\n在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngo get github.com/originaleric/digeino\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 2. 配置管理\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。\n\n### 2.1 依赖结构\n\n配置主要包含两个部分：\n- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。\n\n### 2.2 使用示例\n\n#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）\n\n首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nHttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: true\n    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n然后在代码中加载：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc main() {\n    // 加载配置文件\n    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")\n    if err != nil {\n        panic(err)\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc initConfig() {\n    cfg := config.Default()\n    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\"\n    config.Set(cfg)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3. 核心功能使用\n\n### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\"\n\nfunc someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 1. 安装"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "HttpServer:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Api:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "Status:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  Webhook:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  Store:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    Enabled: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "然后在代码中加载："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "func main() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        panic(err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "func initConfig() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    config.Set(cfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "func someProcess() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 80
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.22683185338974
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    var outline *DocumentOutline\n    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)\n    return outline, err\n}\n\nfunc SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {\n    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 5. AgentState 架构说明\n\n### 5.1 核心字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段：\n- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识\n- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识\n- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结\n- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）\n\n### 5.2 业务结构体\n\n**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。\n\n这样做的好处：\n- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性\n- ✅ 不同项目可以定义自己的业务结构体\n- ✅ 避免业务逻辑污染核心库\n- ✅ 更好的类型安全和代码组织\n\n### 5.3 迁移指南\n\n如果您之前使用了 &#96;AgentState&#96; 中的业务字段（如 &#96;Outline&#96;、&#96;Pages&#96; 等），需要：\n\n1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体\n2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问\n3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例\n\n## 6. 常见问题\n\n- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。\n- **扩展性**: 如果需要增加新的配置项，请在 &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/config&#96; 包中扩展 &#96;Config&#96; 结构体。\n- **项目特定字段**: 使用 &#96;AgentState.Extensions&#96; 字段存储项目特定的数据，而不是修改核心库的 &#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体。\n- **业务结构体**: 所有业务特定的结构体都应该在项目包中定义，通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储，并使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法访问。",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "func GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "    var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "    return outline, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "func SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "## 5. AgentState 架构说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "### 5.1 核心字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "### 5.2 业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "这样做的好处："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "- ✅ 不同项目可以定义自己的业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "- ✅ 避免业务逻辑污染核心库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "- ✅ 更好的类型安全和代码组织"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "### 5.3 迁移指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "如果您之前使用了 &#96;AgentState&#96; 中的业务字段（如 &#96;Outline&#96;、&#96;Pages&#96; 等），需要："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "## 6. 常见问题"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "- **扩展性**: 如果需要增加新的配置项，请在 &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/config&#96; 包中扩展 &#96;Config&#96; 结构体。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "- **项目特定字段**: 使用 &#96;AgentState.Extensions&#96; 字段存储项目特定的数据，而不是修改核心库的 &#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "- **业务结构体**: 所有业务特定的结构体都应该在项目包中定义，通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储，并使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法访问。"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"ui_ux_search\", \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库，包括样式指南(style)、配色方案(color)、字体排版(typography)、交互原则(ux)、落地页模式(landing)等。支持按技术栈(stack)过滤，如 react, tailwind 等。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIUXSearchRequest) (*UIUXSearchResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.MaxResults \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\t\treq.MaxResults = 5\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar res *SearchResult\n\t\t\tvar err error\n\n\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tres, err = service.SearchStack(req.Query, req.Stack, req.MaxResults)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tres, err = service.Search(req.Query, req.Domain, req.MaxResults)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Format results as a readable string for the LLM\n\t\t\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"检索结果 (领域: %s, 原始查询: %s):\\n\\n\", res.Domain, res.Query))\n\t\t\tfor i, r := range res.Results {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"--- 建议 %d ---\\n\", i+1))\n\t\t\t\tfor k, v := range r {\n\t\t\t\t\tif v != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s: %s\\n\", k, v))\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn \u0026UIUXSearchResponse{Result: sb.String()}, nil\n\t\t})\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystemRequest 设计系统生成请求",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,

          },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## How to Use\n\nThe tool is automatically registered in &#96;BaseTools()&#96; if enabled in configuration:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\"\n\n// Get all base tools (includes WeChat tool if enabled)\ntools, err := tools.BaseTools(ctx)\nif err != nil {\n    // Handle error\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe tool name is &#96;send_wechat_message&#96; and accepts the following parameters:\n- &#96;content&#96; (required): Text message content (recommended max 2048 characters)\n- &#96;openid&#96; (optional): Specific recipient OpenID. If not provided, sends to all configured OpenIDs\n\n**Note**: Users must have interacted with the Official Account within the last 48 hours to receive customer service messages.\n\n## Technical Details\n\n### Access Token Management\n- Tokens are cached in a JSON file to minimize API calls\n- Automatic refresh when token expires (with 5-minute buffer)\n- Thread-safe token access using mutex locks\n- Graceful handling of file I/O errors\n\n### Error Handling\nThe tool provides detailed error information:\n- Common error codes (45015: user not interacted, 40001: invalid token, 40003: invalid openid, 45047: rate limit)\n- Per-recipient success/failure tracking\n- Partial success support (some recipients succeed, others fail)\n\n## Impact\nThis update enables AI agents built on Digeino to send real-time notifications to WeChat users, improving user engagement and providing a native Chinese messaging channel. The tool is designed to be lightweight, reliable, and easy to configure, making it suitable for production use in various scenarios such as task completion notifications, error alerts, and status updates.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "## How to Use"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "The tool is automatically registered in &#96;BaseTools()&#96; if enabled in configuration:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "// Get all base tools (includes WeChat tool if enabled)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "tools, err := tools.BaseTools(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    // Handle error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "The tool name is &#96;send_wechat_message&#96; and accepts the following parameters:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- &#96;content&#96; (required): Text message content (recommended max 2048 characters)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "- &#96;openid&#96; (optional): Specific recipient OpenID. If not provided, sends to all configured OpenIDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "**Note**: Users must have interacted with the Official Account within the last 48 hours to receive customer service messages."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "## Technical Details"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "### Access Token Management"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "- Tokens are cached in a JSON file to minimize API calls"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Automatic refresh when token expires (with 5-minute buffer)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "- Thread-safe token access using mutex locks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Graceful handling of file I/O errors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "### Error Handling"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "The tool provides detailed error information:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "- Common error codes (45015: user not interacted, 40001: invalid token, 40003: invalid openid, 45047: rate limit)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "- Per-recipient success/failure tracking"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "- Partial success support (some recipients succeed, others fail)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "This update enables AI agents built on Digeino to send real-time notifications to WeChat users, improving user engagement and providing a native Chinese messaging channel. The tool is designed to be lightweight, reliable, and easy to configure, making it suitable for production use in various scenarios such as task completion notifications, error alerts, and status updates."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 75
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 37
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-15_wechat_push_tool.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.18943893909454346
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"encoding/csv\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n//go:embed data/*.csv data/stacks/*.csv\nvar designData embed.FS\n\n// CSVConfigEntry defines the configuration for each design domain\ntype CSVConfigEntry struct {\n\tFile       string\n\tSearchCols []string\n\tOutputCols []string\n}\n\n// CSVConfigs maps domain keys to their respective CSV configurations\nvar CSVConfigs = map[string]CSVConfigEntry{\n\t\"style\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/styles.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Type\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Colors\", \"Effects \u0026 Animation\", \"Best For\", \"Performance\", \"Accessibility\", \"Framework Compatibility\", \"Complexity\"},\n\t},\n\t\"prompt\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/prompts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\", \"Implementation Checklist\"},\n\t},\n\t\"color\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/colors.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary (Hex)\", \"Secondary (Hex)\", \"CTA (Hex)\", \"Background (Hex)\", \"Text (Hex)\", \"Border (Hex)\", \"Notes\"},\n\t},\n\t\"chart\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/charts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Accessibility Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Secondary Options\", \"Color Guidance\", \"Accessibility Notes\", \"Library Recommendation\", \"Interactive Level\"},\n\t},\n\t\"landing\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/landing.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Conversion Optimization\", \"Section Order\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Section Order\", \"Primary CTA Placement\", \"Color Strategy\", \"Conversion Optimization\"},\n\t},\n\t\"product\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/products.csv\",",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）\n    store := status.GetDefaultStore()\n    \n    // 创建执行记录\n    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")\n    \n    // 更新状态\n    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{\n        Type: \"node_start\",\n        NodeKey: \"node_1\",\n        Status: \"running\",\n    })\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3.2 Webhook 客户端\n\n用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\nfunc notifyCallback() {\n    // 获取 Webhook 配置\n    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)\n    if webhookCfg == nil {\n        return\n    }\n\n    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)\n    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 4. AgentState 扩展字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。\n\n### 4.1 基本使用\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\"\n\n// 创建 AgentState\nstate := \u0026digeino.AgentState{\n    SessionID: \"session_001\",\n    Query:     \"用户查询\",\n}\n\n// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")\n\n// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）\nstate.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)\n\n// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）\nstate.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)\n\n// 设置任意类型的扩展字段\nstate.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{\n    \"key1\": \"value1\",\n    \"key2\": 123,\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.2 获取扩展字段\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 获取字符串类型\npdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)\n}\n\n// 获取整数类型\npageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "func someProcess() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    store := status.GetDefaultStore()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    // 创建执行记录"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    // 更新状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        Type: \"node_start\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        NodeKey: \"node_1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "        Status: \"running\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "### 3.2 Webhook 客户端"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "func notifyCallback() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    // 获取 Webhook 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    if webhookCfg == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        return"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "## 4. AgentState 扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "### 4.1 基本使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "// 创建 AgentState"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "state := \u0026digeino.AgentState{"

            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    SessionID: \"session_001\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    Query:     \"用户查询\","

            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "}"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 132,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },

            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package wx\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\n// SendWeChatTextMessage 发送微信文字消息\nfunc SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatTextMessageRequest) (SendWeChatTextMessageResponse, error) {\n\t// 1. 验证请求参数\n\tif req.Content == \"\" {\n\t\treturn SendWeChatTextMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"content is required\")\n\t}\n\n\tcfg := config.Get()\n\n\t// 2. 确定接收者列表\n\tvar openids []string\n\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {\n\t\t// 指定了单个 openid\n\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}\n\t} else {\n\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表\n\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs\n\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {\n\t\t\treturn SendWeChatTextMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 3. 获取 AccessToken\n\taccessToken, err := GetAccessToken(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn SendWeChatTextMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 4. 逐个发送消息\n\tvar sentTo []string\n\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage\n\n\tfor _, openid := range openids {\n\t\terr := sendTextMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.Content)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{\n\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,\n\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 5. 构建响应\n\tresponse := SendWeChatTextMessageResponse{\n\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,\n\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,\n\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) == 0 {\n\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))\n\t} else if len(sentTo) \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 len(failedTo) \u003e 0 {\n\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))\n\t} else {\n\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))\n\t}\n\n\treturn response, nil\n}\n\n// sendTextMessageToUser 向单个用户发送文字消息\nfunc sendTextMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, content string) error {\n\tif openid == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")\n\t}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;\n\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;\n\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;\n\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;\n\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;\n\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;\n\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置\ntype WeChatConfig struct {\n\tEnabled     *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;         // 是否启用微信推送功能\n\tAppID       string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;             // 微信服务号 AppID\n\tAppSecret   string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;     // 微信服务号 AppSecret\n\tOpenIDs     []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;          // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表\n\tTokenFilePath string &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）\n}\n\nvar (\n\t// DefaultConfig 全局默认配置\n\tcurrentConfig *Config\n)\n\n// Load 从文件加载配置\nfunc Load(path string) (*Config, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar cfg Config\n\tif err := yaml.Unmarshal(data, \u0026cfg); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcurrentConfig = \u0026cfg\n\treturn \u0026cfg, nil\n}\n\n// Get 获取当前配置\nfunc Get() *Config {\n\tif currentConfig == nil {\n\t\tcurrentConfig = Default()\n\t}\n\treturn currentConfig\n}\n\n// Set 设置当前配置\nfunc Set(cfg *Config) {\n\tcurrentConfig = cfg\n}\n\n// Default 返回默认配置\nfunc Default() *Config {\n\tenabled := true\n\twechatDisabled := false",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino Updates - 2026-01-02\n\n## Overview\nEnhanced the &#96;StatusCollector&#96; and improved type compatibility to better support complex integrations like &#96;DigFlow&#96;.\n\n## Changes\n\n### Webhook Module\n- **&#96;StatusCollector&#96; Enhancements**:\n    - Added &#96;GetExecutionID()&#96;: Allows retrieving the associated Execution ID.\n    - Added &#96;GetStatusHistory()&#96;: Returns a snapshot of the execution status history.\n    - Added &#96;GetTotalUsage()&#96;: Returns the aggregated Token Usage for the session.\n- **Interface Decoupling**:\n    - Refactored &#96;StatusStoreInterface&#96;: Removed &#96;CreateExecution&#96; from the base interface in the &#96;webhook&#96; package. This allows for cleaner separation of concerns, as execution creation is typically handled at the controller/application level.\n\n### Status Module\n- **Compatibility Fix**:\n    - Standardized &#96;StatusStore&#96; implementation to match the updated &#96;webhook.StatusStoreInterface&#96;.\n\n### Tools Module\n- **&#96;BaseTools&#96; Setup**:\n    - Initialized &#96;BaseTools&#96; function in &#96;tools.go&#96; to provide a central registry for shared cross-project tools.\n\n## Versioning\n- Released as **v1.0.2**.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# DigEino Updates - 2026-01-02"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "Enhanced the &#96;StatusCollector&#96; and improved type compatibility to better support complex integrations like &#96;DigFlow&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### Webhook Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **&#96;StatusCollector&#96; Enhancements**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetExecutionID()&#96;: Allows retrieving the associated Execution ID."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetStatusHistory()&#96;: Returns a snapshot of the execution status history."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    - Added &#96;GetTotalUsage()&#96;: Returns the aggregated Token Usage for the session."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Interface Decoupling**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    - Refactored &#96;StatusStoreInterface&#96;: Removed &#96;CreateExecution&#96; from the base interface in the &#96;webhook&#96; package. This allows for cleaner separation of concerns, as execution creation is typically handled at the controller/application level."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "### Status Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Compatibility Fix**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    - Standardized &#96;StatusStore&#96; implementation to match the updated &#96;webhook.StatusStoreInterface&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### Tools Module"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- **&#96;BaseTools&#96; Setup**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    - Initialized &#96;BaseTools&#96; function in &#96;tools.go&#96; to provide a central registry for shared cross-project tools."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "## Versioning"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- Released as **v1.0.2**."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/20260102.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.15621140599250793
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "HttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: false\n    URL: \"\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n    method: \"POST\"\n    timeout: 5\n    retry_count: 3\n    retry_delay: 1000\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\"\n    MySQL:\n      Host: \"127.0.0.1\"\n      Port: 3306\n      User: \"root\"\n      Password: \"\"\n      Database: \"digpdf\"\n      ExecTable: \"df_execution\"\n      StatusTable: \"df_execution_status\"\n\nWeChat:\n  Enabled: false                    # 是否启用微信推送功能\n  AppID: \"\"                         # 微信服务号 AppID\n  AppSecret: \"\"                     # 微信服务号 AppSecret\n  OpenIDs: []                       # 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表\n  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # AccessToken 存储文件路径",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\ntype UserMessage struct {\n\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;\n\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;\n\tHistory []*schema.Message &#96;json:\"history\"&#96;\n}\n\n// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） ==========\n\n// Usage 使用量统计\ntype Usage = webhook.Usage\n\n// ExecutionStatus 执行状态\ntype ExecutionStatus = webhook.ExecutionStatus\n\n// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态\ntype DataFlowStatus = webhook.DataFlowStatus\n\n// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态\ntype ControlFlowStatus = webhook.ControlFlowStatus\n\n// WebhookConfig Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig = config.WebhookConfig\n\n// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体\ntype WebhookPayload = webhook.WebhookPayload\n\n// Message 消息（用于 Webhook 和 StatusStore）\ntype Message = webhook.Message",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package digeino"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

          },

            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "type UserMessage struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\tHistory []*schema.Message &#96;json:\"history\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） =========="

            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "// Usage 使用量统计"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,

          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },

            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态"
          },

          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"os\"\n\n\t\"gopkg.in/yaml.v3\"\n)\n\n// Config 根配置结构\ntype Config struct {\n\tHttpServer HttpServerConfig &#96;yaml:\"HttpServer\" json:\"HttpServer\"&#96;\n\tStatus     StatusConfig     &#96;yaml:\"Status\" json:\"Status\"&#96;\n\tWeChat     WeChatConfig     &#96;yaml:\"WeChat\" json:\"WeChat\"&#96;\n}\n\n// HttpServerConfig HTTP 服务配置\ntype HttpServerConfig struct {\n\tApi struct {\n\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t} &#96;yaml:\"Api\" json:\"Api\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusConfig 状态相关配置：包含 Webhook 与 Store\ntype StatusConfig struct {\n\tWebhook AppWebhookConfig  &#96;yaml:\"Webhook\" json:\"Webhook\"&#96;\n\tStore   StatusStoreConfig &#96;yaml:\"Store\" json:\"Store\"&#96;\n}\n\n// AppWebhookConfig 应用级 Webhook 配置\ntype AppWebhookConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool         &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tURL     string        &#96;yaml:\"URL\" json:\"URL,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tConfig  WebhookConfig &#96;yaml:\",inline\" json:\"Config\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig struct {\n\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;\n\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置\ntype StatusStoreConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql\n\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;\n}\n\n// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置\ntype MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "// StatusConfig 状态相关配置：包含 Webhook 与 Store"

          },

            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "type WebhookConfig struct {"

          },

            "text": "\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },

            "lineNumber": 42,

          },

          },

            "text": "\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;"
          },

            "text": "}"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package webhook\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\n// StatusCollector 状态收集器\ntype StatusCollector struct {\n\texecutionID string\n\tappName     string\n\trequestID   string\n\tstartTime   time.Time\n\n\twebhookClients []*WebhookClient\n\tstatusStore    StatusStoreInterface\n\tstatusCallback func(status ExecutionStatus)\n\n\tmu            sync.Mutex\n\tstatusHistory []ExecutionStatus\n\tnodeStartTime map[string]time.Time\n\tpath          []string\n\n\ttokenUsageMap map[string]*Usage\n\ttotalUsage    Usage\n}\n\n// NewStatusCollector 创建状态收集器\nfunc NewStatusCollector(executionID, appName, requestID string) *StatusCollector {\n\treturn \u0026StatusCollector{\n\t\texecutionID:   executionID,\n\t\tappName:       appName,\n\t\trequestID:     requestID,\n\t\tstartTime:     time.Now(),\n\t\tnodeStartTime: make(map[string]time.Time),\n\t\ttokenUsageMap: make(map[string]*Usage),\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddWebhookClient 添加 Webhook 客户端\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()\n\tsc.webhookClients = append(sc.webhookClients, client)\n}\n\n// SetStatusStore 设置状态存储\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusStore(store StatusStoreInterface) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()\n\tsc.statusStore = store\n}\n\n// SetStatusCallback 设置状态回调\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) SetStatusCallback(callback func(status ExecutionStatus)) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()\n\tsc.statusCallback = callback\n}\n\n// OnNodeStart 节点开始执行\nfunc (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeStart(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, input interface{}) {\n\tsc.mu.Lock()\n\tsc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey] = time.Now()",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *AgentState) GetIntExtension(key string) (int, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}\n\t// 支持多种数字类型\n\tswitch v := val.(type) {\n\tcase int:\n\t\treturn v, true\n\tcase int64:\n\t\treturn int(v), true\n\tcase float64:\n\t\treturn int(v), true\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}\n}\n\n// SetIntExtension 设置整数类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetIntExtension(key string, value int) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetBoolExtension 获取布尔类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetBoolExtension(key string) (bool, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false, false\n\t}\n\tb, ok := val.(bool)\n\treturn b, ok\n}\n\n// SetBoolExtension 设置布尔类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetBoolExtension(key string, value bool) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetBusinessData 获取业务数据结构（通过 JSON 序列化/反序列化进行类型转换）\n// 用于获取存储在 Extensions 中的复杂业务对象\n// 示例：var outline *DocumentOutline; err := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetBusinessData(key string, target interface{}) error {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"key %s not found in extensions\", key)\n\t}\n\t// 使用 JSON 序列化/反序列化进行类型转换\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(val)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal business data for key %s: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(data, target); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to unmarshal business data for key %s: %w\", key, err)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// SetBusinessData 设置业务数据结构\n// 用于将复杂业务对象存储到 Extensions 中\n// 示例：state.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetBusinessData(key string, value interface{}) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func Default() *Config {\n\tenabled := true\n\twechatDisabled := false\n\treturn \u0026Config{\n\t\tHttpServer: HttpServerConfig{\n\t\t\tApi: struct {\n\t\t\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t\t\t}{\n\t\t\t\tPort: \":20201\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStatus: StatusConfig{\n\t\t\tWebhook: AppWebhookConfig{\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,\n\t\t\t\tConfig: WebhookConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tMethod:     \"POST\",\n\t\t\t\t\tTimeout:    5,\n\t\t\t\t\tRetryCount: 3,\n\t\t\t\t\tRetryDelay: 1000,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStore: StatusStoreConfig{\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:    \"memory\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tWeChat: WeChatConfig{\n\t\t\tEnabled:       \u0026wechatDisabled,\n\t\t\tTokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "if ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型\nisProcessed, ok := state.GetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Is Processed: %v\\n\", isProcessed)\n}\n\n// 获取任意类型\nval, ok := state.GetExtension(\"complex_data\")\nif ok {\n    // 进行类型断言\n    if data, ok := val.(map[string]interface{}); ok {\n        // 使用 data\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.3 最佳实践\n\n1. **定义扩展键常量**：建议在项目中使用常量定义扩展键，避免硬编码字符串：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在项目根目录或 constants 包中定义\nconst (\n    ExtensionKeyPdfPath = \"pdf_path\"\n    ExtensionKeyCustomField = \"custom_field\"\n)\n\n// 使用\nstate.SetStringExtension(ExtensionKeyPdfPath, \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **类型安全**：优先使用类型安全的辅助方法（&#96;GetStringExtension&#96;、&#96;SetStringExtension&#96; 等），而不是直接使用 &#96;GetExtension&#96;。\n\n3. **JSON 序列化**：&#96;Extensions&#96; 字段会被自动序列化到 JSON，使用 &#96;omitempty&#96; 标签，空 map 不会出现在 JSON 中。\n\n### 4.4 存储业务数据结构\n\n对于复杂的业务数据结构（如文档大纲、页面列表等），可以使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96; 和 &#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在您的项目中定义业务结构体\ntype DocumentOutline struct {\n    Title          string        &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;\n    Topic          string        &#96;json:\"topic\"&#96;\n    TargetAudience string        &#96;json:\"target_audience\"&#96;\n    PageOutlines   []PageOutline &#96;json:\"pages\"&#96;\n}\n\n// 设置业务数据\noutline := \u0026DocumentOutline{\n    Title: \"我的文档\",\n    Topic: \"技术文档\",\n}\nstate.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)\n\n// 获取业务数据\nvar outline *DocumentOutline\nerr := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)\nif err != nil {\n    // 处理错误\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**最佳实践**：在项目包中定义业务结构体和类型安全的辅助方法：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在项目包中（如 DigPdf/eino/types.go）\npackage eino_agent\n\nconst ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    ",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "### 4.4 存储业务数据结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "对于复杂的业务数据结构（如文档大纲、页面列表等），可以使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96; 和 &#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "// 在您的项目中定义业务结构体"
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    Topic: \"技术文档\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "state.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "// 获取业务数据"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "err := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"regexp\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\trePunct = regexp.MustCompile(&#96;[^\\w\\s]&#96;)\n)\n\n// BM25 implements the BM25 ranking algorithm.\ntype BM25 struct {\n\tk1         float64\n\tb          float64\n\tcorpus     [][]string\n\tdocLengths []int\n\tavgdl      float64\n\tidf        map[string]float64\n\tdocFreqs   map[string]int\n\tN          int\n}\n\n// NewBM25 creates a new BM25 instance.\nfunc NewBM25(k1, b float64) *BM25 {\n\treturn \u0026BM25{\n\t\tk1:       k1,\n\t\tb:        b,\n\t\tidf:      make(map[string]float64),\n\t\tdocFreqs: make(map[string]int),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Tokenize converts text into a slice of tokens.\nfunc (b *BM25) Tokenize(text string) []string {\n\t// Lowercase and remove punctuation\n\ttext = strings.ToLower(text)\n\ttext = rePunct.ReplaceAllString(text, \" \")\n\n\twords := strings.Fields(text)\n\tvar tokens []string\n\tfor _, w := range words {\n\t\tif len(w) \u003e 2 {\n\t\t\ttokens = append(tokens, w)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn tokens\n}\n\n// Fit builds the BM25 index from documents.\nfunc (b *BM25) Fit(documents []string) {\n\tb.corpus = make([][]string, len(documents))\n\tb.docLengths = make([]int, len(documents))\n\tb.N = len(documents)\n\n\tif b.N == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttotalLen := 0\n\tfor i, doc := range documents {\n\t\ttokens := b.Tokenize(doc)\n\t\tb.corpus[i] = tokens\n\t\tb.docLengths[i] = len(tokens)\n\t\ttotalLen += len(tokens)\n\n\t\tseen := make(map[string]bool)\n\t\tfor _, token := range tokens {\n\t\t\tif !seen[token] {\n\t\t\t\tb.docFreqs[token]++\n\t\t\t\tseen[token] = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tb.avgdl = float64(totalLen) / float64(b.N)\n\n\tfor word, freq := range b.docFreqs {\n\t\tb.idf[word] = math.Log((float64(b.N)-float64(freq)+0.5)/(float64(freq)+0.5) + 1.0)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ScoreRank represents a document index and its score.\ntype ScoreRank struct {\n\tIndex int\n\tScore float64\n}\n\n// Score all documents against the query.\nfunc (b *BM25) Score(query string) []ScoreRank {\n\tqueryTokens := b.Tokenize(query)\n\tscores := make([]ScoreRank, b.N)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\nvar domainKeywords = map[string][]string{\n\t\"color\":      {\"color\", \"palette\", \"hex\", \"#\", \"rgb\"},\n\t\"chart\":      {\"chart\", \"graph\", \"visualization\", \"trend\", \"bar\", \"pie\", \"scatter\", \"heatmap\", \"funnel\"},\n\t\"landing\":    {\"landing\", \"page\", \"cta\", \"conversion\", \"hero\", \"testimonial\", \"pricing\", \"section\"},\n\t\"product\":    {\"saas\", \"ecommerce\", \"e-commerce\", \"fintech\", \"healthcare\", \"gaming\", \"portfolio\", \"crypto\", \"dashboard\"},\n\t\"prompt\":     {\"prompt\", \"css\", \"implementation\", \"variable\", \"checklist\", \"tailwind\"},\n\t\"style\":      {\"style\", \"design\", \"ui\", \"minimalism\", \"glassmorphism\", \"neumorphism\", \"brutalism\", \"dark mode\", \"flat\", \"aurora\"},\n\t\"ux\":         {\"ux\", \"usability\", \"accessibility\", \"wcag\", \"touch\", \"scroll\", \"animation\", \"keyboard\", \"navigation\", \"mobile\"},\n\t\"typography\": {\"font\", \"typography\", \"heading\", \"serif\", \"sans\"},\n}\n\n// DetectDomain auto-detects the most relevant domain from the query.\nfunc DetectDomain(query string) string {\n\tqueryLower := strings.ToLower(query)\n\tqueryPadded := \" \" + queryLower + \" \"\n\tscores := make(map[string]int)\n\n\tfor domain, keywords := range domainKeywords {\n\t\tscore := 0\n\t\tfor _, kw := range keywords {\n\t\t\tif strings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\" \") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\",\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\".\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\"?\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\"!\") {\n\t\t\t\tscore++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tscores[domain] = score\n\t}\n\n\tbestDomain := \"style\"\n\tmaxScore := 0\n\n\tfor _, domain := range []string{\"color\", \"chart\", \"landing\", \"product\", \"prompt\", \"style\", \"ux\", \"typography\"} {\n\t\tif scores[domain] \u003e maxScore {\n\t\t\tmaxScore = scores[domain]\n\t\t\tbestDomain = domain\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn bestDomain\n}",

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

编译通过。总结已完成的工作：

## 已完成的功能

### 阶段一：核心功能（已完成）
1. 添加了 `ui-reasoning.csv` 数据文件（100条推理规则）
2. 实现了 `ReasoningEngine`（推理引擎）
3. 实现了 `DesignSystemGenerator`（设计系统生成器）
4. 扩展了 `UIUXService`，添加了 `GenerateDesignSystem` 方法
5. 添加了 `GenerateDesignSystemTool` 工具

### 阶段二：持久化功能（已完成）
1. 实现了 `PersistenceManager`（Master + Overrides 模式）
2. 实现了 Markdown 格式化函数
3. 添加了 `PersistDesignSystemTool` 工具
4. 已在 `BaseTools()` 中注册新工具

### 阶段三：Agent 编排（框架已创建）
1. 创建了 Agent 结构框架（`agent.go` 和 `agent_tool.go`）
2. 由于当前 eino 版本可能不包含 `components/agent` 和 `components/chatmodel` 包，Agent 实现已注释，待 eino 版本支持后再启用

## 当前可用功能

现在可以直接使用以下工具：

1. `ui_ux_search` - 搜索 UI/UX 知识库
2. `generate_design_system` - 生成完整设计系统
3. `persist_design_system` - 持久化设计系统到文件

这些工具已注册到 `BaseTools()`，可以在任何使用 digeino 的项目中使用。

## 下一步

当 eino 版本支持 `components/agent` 和 `components/chatmodel` 时，可以：
1. 取消注释 `agent.go` 和 `agent_tool.go` 中的代码
2. 实现完整的 Agent 工作流编排
3. 将 Agent 包装成工具供其他 Agent 使用

所有核心功能已实现并可以正常使用。

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

所有功能已实现并编译通过。总结如下：

## 完成总结

### 已实现的功能

#### 阶段一：核心功能
1. 添加了 `ui-reasoning.csv`（100 条推理规则）
2. 实现了 `ReasoningEngine`（推理引擎）
3. 实现了 `DesignSystemGenerator`（设计系统生成器）
4. 扩展了 `UIUXService`，添加 `GenerateDesignSystem` 方法
5. 添加了 `GenerateDesignSystemTool` 工具

#### 阶段二：持久化功能
1. 实现了 `PersistenceManager`（Master + Overrides 模式）
2. 实现了 Markdown 格式化函数
3. 添加了 `PersistDesignSystemTool` 工具
4. 已在 `BaseTools()` 中注册新工具

#### 阶段三：Agent 编排
1. 实现了 `UIDesignSystemAgent`（基于 eino compose.Graph）
2. 实现了 Agent 工作流编排（LLM 决策 + 工具调用）
3. 实现了 `NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool`（将 Agent 包装成工具）
4. 支持多轮工具调用循环

### 核心特性

1. 推理引擎：100 条行业特定规则，自动匹配产品类型
2. 多领域并行搜索：product, style, color, landing, typography
3. 最佳匹配算法：基于优先级关键词的智能选择
4. 持久化系统：Master + Overrides 模式，支持层次化检索
5. Agent 编排：完整的工作流自动化，支持工具调用循环

### 使用方式

**直接使用工具**（已注册到 `BaseTools()`）：
- `ui_ux_search`
- `generate_design_system`
- `persist_design_system`

**使用 Agent**（需要 ChatModel）：
```go
agent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)
result, _ := agent.Invoke(ctx, "生成设计系统：beauty spa")
```

**Agent 作为工具**（供其他 Agent 使用）：
```go
agentTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)
// 在其他 Agent 的工具列表中注册
```

### 文件结构

```
tools/ui_ux/
├── agent.go              # Agent 编排实现
├── agent_tool.go         # Agent 工具包装器
├── design_system.go      # 设计系统生成器
├── persistence.go        # 持久化管理器
├── reasoning.go          # 推理引擎
├── tool.go              # 工具接口（已扩展）
├── service.go           # 服务层（已扩展）
├── data/
│   └── ui-reasoning.csv # 推理规则数据（100条）
└── README.md            # 使用文档
```

所有功能已实现并通过编译。Agent 编排参考了 DigPdf 的实现模式，使用 `compose.NewGraph` 和 `compose.AddLambdaNode` 来构建工作流。

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "ChatModel 配置支持",
  "overview": "在 config.yaml 中添加 ChatModel 配置，实现类似 DigPdf 的 model_factory，支持通过配置加载 ChatModel，使 Agent 可以自动从配置创建而不需要手动传入。",
  "plan": "# ChatModel 配置支持方案\n\n## 目标\n\n在 DigEino 的配置系统中添加 ChatModel 支持，使 UI/UX Agent 可以通过配置自动加载 ChatModel，而不需要手动传入。\n\n## 实现步骤\n\n### 1. 扩展配置结构\n\n**文件**: &#96;config/config.go&#96;\n\n添加 ChatModel 配置结构：\n- &#96;ChatModelConfig&#96;: 主配置结构\n- &#96;QwenConfig&#96;: Qwen 模型配置\n- &#96;OpenAIConfig&#96;: OpenAI 模型配置\n- &#96;OpenRouterConfig&#96;: OpenRouter 模型配置\n\n### 2. 更新 config.yaml\n\n**文件**: &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;\n\n添加 ChatModel 配置段，支持多种模型类型：\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nChatModel:\n  Provider: \"qwen\"  # qwen, openai, openrouter\n  Qwen:\n    APIKey: \"\"\n    Model: \"qwen-max\"\n    BaseURL: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"\n  OpenAI:\n    APIKey: \"\"\n    Model: \"gpt-4\"\n    BaseURL: \"https://api.openai.com/v1\"\n  OpenRouter:\n    APIKey: \"\"\n    Model: \"\"\n    BaseURL: \"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. 创建 Model Factory\n\n**文件**: &#96;tools/ui_ux/model_factory.go&#96;（新建）\n\n实现 &#96;NewChatModelFromConfig&#96; 函数：\n- 从配置读取模型类型和参数\n- 根据 Provider 创建对应的 ChatModel\n- 支持 Qwen、OpenAI、OpenRouter 等\n\n### 4. 更新 Agent 创建方法\n\n**文件**: &#96;tools/ui_ux/agent.go&#96; 和 &#96;tools/ui_ux/agent_tool.go&#96;\n\n添加便捷方法：\n- &#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig&#96;: 从配置创建 Agent\n- &#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig&#96;: 从配置创建 Agent 工具\n\n保持原有方法不变（向后兼容）。\n\n## 技术细节\n\n### 配置结构设计\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\ntype ChatModelConfig struct {\n    Provider string        &#96;yaml:\"Provider\"&#96; // qwen, openai, openrouter\n    Qwen     QwenConfig    &#96;yaml:\"Qwen\"&#96;\n    OpenAI   OpenAIConfig  &#96;yaml:\"OpenAI\"&#96;\n    OpenRouter OpenRouterConfig &#96;yaml:\"OpenRouter\"&#96;\n}\n\ntype QwenConfig struct {\n    APIKey string &#96;yaml:\"APIKey\"&#96;\n    Model  string &#96;yaml:\"Model\"&#96;\n    BaseURL string &#96;yaml:\"BaseURL\"&#96;\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Model Factory 实现\n\n参考 DigPdf 的 &#96;model_factory.go&#96;：\n- 使用 &#96;github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai&#96; 创建模型\n- 支持多种模型提供商\n- 错误处理和默认值\n\n### 使用示例\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 方式一：从配置创建（推荐）\nagent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 方式二：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）\nchatModel, _ := createChatModel(ctx)\nagent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 优势\n\n1. **配置驱动**：通过配置文件管理模型，无需修改代码\n2. **向后兼容**：保留原有 API，不影响现有代码\n3. **灵活切换**：可以轻松切换不同的模型提供商\n4. **统一管理**：所有配置集中在 config.yaml\n\n## 注意事项\n\n1. API Key 安全性：建议使用环境变量或加密存储\n2. 默认值：提供合理的默认配置\n3. 错误处理：配置缺失时的降级策略\n4. 多模型支持：支持同时配置多个模型，通过 Provider 选择",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "在 config.go 中添加 ChatModelConfig 结构体定义",
      "id": "add-chatmodel-config",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "在 config.yaml 中添加 ChatModel 配置段",
      "id": "update-config-yaml",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "创建 model_factory.go 实现 NewChatModelFromConfig 函数",
      "id": "create-model-factory",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "添加 NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 和 NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig 方法",
      "id": "update-agent-methods",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "测试配置加载和模型创建功能",
      "id": "test-config-loading",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  ]
}
```

}

</details>
</tool-use>

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

所有功能已实现并通过编译。总结如下：

## ChatModel 配置支持 - 完成总结

### 已完成的功能

#### 1. 扩展配置结构
- 在 `config/config.go` 中添加了 `ChatModelConfig`、`QwenConfig`、`OpenAIConfig`、`OpenRouterConfig` 结构体
- 更新了 `Config` 结构，包含 `ChatModel` 字段
- 更新了 `Default()` 函数，提供默认 ChatModel 配置

#### 2. 更新配置文件
- 在 `config/config.yaml` 中添加了完整的 ChatModel 配置段
- 支持三种模型提供商：Qwen、OpenAI、OpenRouter
- 每个提供商都有独立的配置项（APIKey、Model、BaseURL）

#### 3. 创建 Model Factory
- 创建了 `tools/ui_ux/model_factory.go`
- 实现了 `NewChatModelFromConfig()` 函数，从配置自动创建 ChatModel
- 实现了三个私有函数：`newQwenModel()`、`newOpenAIModel()`、`newOpenRouterModel()`
- 包含错误处理和默认值

#### 4. 更新 Agent 方法
- 在 `agent.go` 中添加了 `NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig()` 方法
- 在 `agent_tool.go` 中添加了 `NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig()` 方法
- 保持向后兼容，原有方法仍然可用

#### 5. 更新文档
- 更新了 `README.md`，添加了配置使用说明和示例

### 使用方式对比

**之前（需要手动传入 ChatModel）**：
```go
chatModel, _ := createChatModel(ctx)
agent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)
```

**现在（从配置自动加载）**：
```go
config.Load("config/config.yaml")  // 只需加载一次
agent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)  // 自动从配置读取
```

### 配置示例

在 `config/config.yaml` 中配置：

```yaml
ChatModel:
  Provider: "qwen"  # 切换模型只需改这里
  Qwen:
    APIKey: "your-api-key"
    Model: "qwen-max"
  OpenAI:
    APIKey: "your-api-key"
    Model: "gpt-4"
  OpenRouter:
    APIKey: "your-api-key"
    Model: "anthropic/claude-3-opus"
```

### 优势

1. 配置驱动：通过配置文件管理模型，无需修改代码
2. 向后兼容：保留原有 API，不影响现有代码
3. 灵活切换：修改 `Provider` 字段即可切换模型
4. 统一管理：所有配置集中在 config.yaml

所有功能已实现并通过编译。现在可以通过配置文件自动创建 Agent，无需手动传入 ChatModel。

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

已按 DigFlow 的方式简化 ChatModel 配置。更改如下：

## 完成的更改

### 1. **配置结构简化** (`config/config.go`)
- 将 `ChatModelConfig` 从三个独立配置块（Qwen、OpenAI、OpenRouter）改为统一配置
- 使用 `Type` 字段区分模型类型（qwen、openai）
- 使用 `Config` map 存储模型参数

### 2. **配置文件更新** (`config/config.yaml`)
- 简化为：
  ```yaml
  ChatModel:
    Type: "qwen"
    Config:
      ApiKey: ""
      Model: "qwen-max"
      BaseUrl: "..."
  ```

### 3. **模型工厂更新** (`tools/ui_ux/model_factory.go`)
- 适配新的配置结构
- 添加环境变量支持（`${VAR_NAME}` 格式）
- 参考 DigFlow 的实现方式

### 4. **文档更新** (`tools/ui_ux/README.md`)
- 更新配置说明，展示新的配置格式
- 添加环境变量使用示例

## 主要改进

1. 配置更简洁：只需配置一种模型，通过 `Type` 切换
2. 与 DigFlow 一致：配置方式与 DigFlow 保持一致
3. 环境变量支持：支持 `${VAR_NAME}` 格式，便于管理敏感信息
4. 向后兼容：代码逻辑保持不变，仅调整配置结构

代码已编译通过，可以正常使用。如需切换模型，只需修改 `config.yaml` 中的 `Type` 字段和对应的 `Config` 参数即可。

---

_**User**_

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\n// PersistenceManager 持久化管理器\ntype PersistenceManager struct {\n\tbaseDir string\n}\n\n// NewPersistenceManager 创建持久化管理器\nfunc NewPersistenceManager(baseDir string) *PersistenceManager {\n\tif baseDir == \"\" {\n\t\tbaseDir = \".\"\n\t}\n\treturn \u0026PersistenceManager{baseDir: baseDir}\n}\n\n// PersistDesignSystem 保存设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）\nfunc (p *PersistenceManager) PersistDesignSystem(ds *DesignSystem, projectSlug string, pageName string) error {\n\tif projectSlug == \"\" {\n\t\tprojectSlug = strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(ds.ProjectName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t}\n\n\tdesignSystemDir := filepath.Join(p.baseDir, \"design-system\", projectSlug)\n\tpagesDir := filepath.Join(designSystemDir, \"pages\")\n\n\t// 创建目录\n\tif err := os.MkdirAll(pagesDir, 0755); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create directories: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 生成并保存 MASTER.md\n\tmasterFile := filepath.Join(designSystemDir, \"MASTER.md\")\n\tmasterContent := p.formatMasterMD(ds)\n\tif err := os.WriteFile(masterFile, []byte(masterContent), 0644); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write MASTER.md: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 如果指定了页面名称，创建页面覆盖文件\n\tif pageName != \"\" {\n\t\tpageFile := filepath.Join(pagesDir, strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(pageName, \" \", \"-\"))+\".md\")\n\t\tpageContent := p.formatPageOverrideMD(ds, pageName)\n\t\tif err := os.WriteFile(pageFile, []byte(pageContent), 0644); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write page override: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// formatMasterMD 格式化 Master 文件\nfunc (p *PersistenceManager) formatMasterMD(ds *DesignSystem) string {\n\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\ttimestamp := time.Now().Format(\"2006-01-02 15:04:05\")",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"persist_design_system\",\n\t\t\"将设计系统持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式。会创建 design-system/{project}/MASTER.md 和可选的 pages/{page}.md 文件。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *PersistDesignSystemRequest) (*PersistDesignSystemResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"project_name is required\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 生成设计系统\n\t\t\tds, err := service.GenerateDesignSystem(req.Query, req.ProjectName)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate design system: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 持久化\n\t\t\tmanager := NewPersistenceManager(req.BaseDir)\n\t\t\tprojectSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.ProjectName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tif err := manager.PersistDesignSystem(ds, projectSlug, req.PageName); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to persist design system: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresponse := \u0026PersistDesignSystemResponse{\n\t\t\t\tSuccess:     true,\n\t\t\t\tProjectSlug: projectSlug,\n\t\t\t\tMasterFile:  fmt.Sprintf(\"design-system/%s/MASTER.md\", projectSlug),\n\t\t\t\tMessage:     fmt.Sprintf(\"Design system persisted successfully for project '%s'\", req.ProjectName),\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tpageSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.PageName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\tresponse.PageFile = fmt.Sprintf(\"design-system/%s/pages/%s.md\", projectSlug, pageSlug)\n\t\t\t\tresponse.Message += fmt.Sprintf(\" with page override '%s'\", req.PageName)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn response, nil\n\t\t})\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type PersistDesignSystemRequest struct {\n\tQuery       string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=用户需求描述，用于生成设计系统\"&#96;\n\tProjectName string &#96;json:\"project_name\" jsonschema:\"description=项目名称，如 'Serenity Spa'\"&#96;\n\tPageName    string &#96;json:\"page_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=页面名称，用于生成页面特定覆盖文件\"&#96;\n\tBaseDir     string &#96;json:\"base_dir,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=基础目录，默认为当前目录\"&#96;\n}\n\n// PersistDesignSystemResponse 持久化设计系统响应\ntype PersistDesignSystemResponse struct {\n\tSuccess      bool     &#96;json:\"success\"&#96;\n\tMasterFile   string   &#96;json:\"master_file,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tPageFile     string   &#96;json:\"page_file,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tProjectSlug  string   &#96;json:\"project_slug\"&#96;\n\tMessage      string   &#96;json:\"message\"&#96;\n}\n\n// NewPersistDesignSystemTool 创建持久化设计系统工具\nfunc NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    // 其他工具...\n}\n\n// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Agent 工作流\n\nAgent 内部自动执行以下工作流：\n\n1. **分析需求** - 提取产品类型、样式关键词、行业、技术栈\n2. **生成设计系统** - 调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 工具\n3. **补充搜索** - 根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取详细信息\n4. **技术栈指南** - 如果指定了技术栈，获取相关指南\n5. **持久化** - 如果用户请求，调用 &#96;persist_design_system&#96; 保存到文件\n\n## 设计系统生成流程\n\n参考 ui_ux_pro_max 的 \"How Design System Generation Works\"：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n1. 用户请求\n   ↓\n2. 多领域并行搜索（5个领域）\n   - Product type matching (100 categories)\n   - Style recommendations (67 styles)\n   - Color palette selection (96 palettes)\n   - Landing page patterns (24 patterns)\n   - Typography pairing (57 font combinations)\n   ↓\n3. 推理引擎\n   - Match product → UI category rules\n   - Apply style priorities (BM25 ranking)\n   - Filter anti-patterns for industry\n   - Process decision rules (JSON conditions)\n   ↓\n4. 完整设计系统输出\n   - Pattern + Style + Colors + Typography + Effects\n   - Anti-patterns to avoid\n   - Pre-delivery checklist\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 持久化功能\n\n设计系统可以持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndesign-system/\n├── {project-slug}/\n│   ├── MASTER.md           # 全局设计系统\n│   └── pages/\n│       └── {page-name}.md  # 页面特定覆盖\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**层次化检索逻辑**：\n1. 构建页面时，首先检查 &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;\n2. 如果页面文件存在，其规则**覆盖** Master 文件\n3. 如果不存在，使用 &#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96; 的规则\n\n## 推理引擎\n\nAgent 使用 100 条行业特定推理规则（来自 &#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96;），包括：\n\n- SaaS、E-commerce、Healthcare、Fintech 等 100 个行业类别\n- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等\n\n## 示例\n\n### 示例 1：生成设计系统\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    // 其他工具..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "}"
          },

            "lineNumber": 161
          },

            "text": "// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具"
          },

            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },

            "lineNumber": 164
