```json
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "## Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "1. **分析需求** - 提取产品类型、样式关键词、行业、技术栈"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "2. **生成设计系统** - 调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "3. **补充搜索** - 根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取详细信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "4. **技术栈指南** - 如果指定了技术栈，获取相关指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "5. **持久化** - 如果用户请求，调用 &#96;persist_design_system&#96; 保存到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "## 设计系统生成流程"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "参考 ui_ux_pro_max 的 \"How Design System Generation Works\"："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "1. 用户请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "2. 多领域并行搜索（5个领域）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "   - Product type matching (100 categories)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "   - Style recommendations (67 styles)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "   - Color palette selection (96 palettes)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "   - Landing page patterns (24 patterns)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "   - Typography pairing (57 font combinations)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "3. 推理引擎"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "   - Match product → UI category rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "   - Apply style priorities (BM25 ranking)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "   - Filter anti-patterns for industry"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "   - Process decision rules (JSON conditions)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "4. 完整设计系统输出"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "   - Pattern + Style + Colors + Typography + Effects"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "   - Anti-patterns to avoid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "   - Pre-delivery checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "## 持久化功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "设计系统可以持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "design-system/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "├── {project-slug}/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "│   ├── MASTER.md           # 全局设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "│   └── pages/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "│       └── {page-name}.md  # 页面特定覆盖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "**层次化检索逻辑**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "1. 构建页面时，首先检查 &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "2. 如果页面文件存在，其规则**覆盖** Master 文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "3. 如果不存在，使用 &#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96; 的规则"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "## 推理引擎"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "Agent 使用 100 条行业特定推理规则（来自 &#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96;），包括："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "- SaaS、E-commerce、Healthcare、Fintech 等 100 个行业类别"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "## 示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "### 示例 1：生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 229
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 158
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3759334981441498
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (p *PersistenceManager) formatMasterMD(ds *DesignSystem) string {\n\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\ttimestamp := time.Now().Format(\"2006-01-02 15:04:05\")\n\n\tsb.WriteString(\"# Design System Master File\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e **LOGIC:** When building a specific page, first check &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;.\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e If that file exists, its rules **override** this Master file.\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e If not, strictly follow the rules below.\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"---\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"**Project:** %s\\n\", ds.ProjectName))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"**Generated:** %s\\n\", timestamp))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"**Category:** %s\\n\\n\", ds.Category))\n\tsb.WriteString(\"---\\n\\n\")\n\n\t// Global Rules\n\tsb.WriteString(\"## Global Rules\\n\\n\")\n\n\t// Color Palette\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Color Palette\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| Role | Hex | CSS Variable |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"|------|-----|--------------|\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"| Primary | &#96;%s&#96; | &#96;--color-primary&#96; |\\n\", ds.Colors.Primary))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"| Secondary | &#96;%s&#96; | &#96;--color-secondary&#96; |\\n\", ds.Colors.Secondary))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"| CTA/Accent | &#96;%s&#96; | &#96;--color-cta&#96; |\\n\", ds.Colors.CTA))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"| Background | &#96;%s&#96; | &#96;--color-background&#96; |\\n\", ds.Colors.Background))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"| Text | &#96;%s&#96; | &#96;--color-text&#96; |\\n\", ds.Colors.Text))\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\tif ds.Colors.Notes != \"\" {\n\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"**Color Notes:** %s\\n\\n\", ds.Colors.Notes))\n\t}\n\n\t// Typography\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Typography\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"- **Heading Font:** %s\\n\", ds.Typography.Heading))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"- **Body Font:** %s\\n\", ds.Typography.Body))\n\tif ds.Typography.Mood != \"\" {\n\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"- **Mood:** %s\\n\", ds.Typography.Mood))\n\t}\n\tif ds.Typography.GoogleFontsURL != \"\" {\n\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"- **Google Fonts:** [%s + %s](%s)\\n\",",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\t// 创建 Agent 实例\n\tagentInstance, err := NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create UI design system agent: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 将 Agent 包装成工具\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\n\t\t\"generate_ui_design_system\",\n\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。这是一个智能编排的 Agent，会自动分析需求、生成设计系统、补充搜索并获取技术栈指南。如果需要持久化，可以设置 persist=true。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest) (*UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse, error) {\n\t\t\t// 构建查询字符串\n\t\t\tqueryParts := []string{req.Query}\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"项目名称: %s\", req.ProjectName))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"技术栈: %s\", req.Stack))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif req.Persist {\n\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, \"请持久化设计系统\")\n\t\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"页面名称: %s\", req.PageName))\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tquery := fmt.Sprintf(\"生成设计系统：%s\", strings.Join(queryParts, \"，\"))\n\n\t\t\t// 调用 Agent 执行完整工作流\n\t\t\tresult, err := agentInstance.Invoke(ctx, query)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"agent execution failed: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 解析 Agent 返回的结果\n\t\t\tresponse := \u0026UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse{\n\t\t\t\tDesignSystem: result.Content,\n\t\t\t\tMessage:      \"Design system generated successfully\",\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif req.Persist {\n\t\t\t\tresponse.Message += \" and persisted to design-system/ directory\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn response, nil\n\t\t},\n\t)\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig 从配置创建 Agent 工具（便捷方法）\n// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。这是一个智能编排的 Agent，会自动分析需求、生成设计系统、补充搜索并获取技术栈指南。如果需要持久化，可以设置 persist=true。\","

            "text": "\t\t\t// 解析 Agent 返回的结果"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# UI/UX Design System Agent\n\n基于 ui_ux_pro_max v2.0 的设计系统生成 Agent，支持完整的工作流编排和工具调用。\n\n## 功能特性\n\n### 1. 核心工具\n\n- **&#96;ui_ux_search&#96;**: 搜索 UI/UX 设计知识库\n- **&#96;generate_design_system&#96;**: 生成完整设计系统（包含推理引擎）\n- **&#96;persist_design_system&#96;**: 持久化设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）\n\n### 2. Agent 编排\n\n- **&#96;UIDesignSystemAgent&#96;**: 智能编排的 Agent，自动完成设计系统生成工作流\n- **&#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool&#96;**: 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用\n\n## 使用方法\n\n### 方式一：直接使用工具\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n)\n\n// 1. 搜索工具\nsearchTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n// 使用 searchTool...\n\n// 2. 生成设计系统\ndesignSystemTool, _ := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n// 使用 designSystemTool...\n\n// 3. 持久化设计系统\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n// 使用 persistTool...\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 方式二：使用 Agent（推荐）\n\n**方式 2a：从配置创建（最简单，推荐）**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n)\n\n// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）\n_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 2. 从配置创建 Agent（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）\nagent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 3. 调用 Agent\nresult, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\nfmt.Println(result.Content)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**方式 2b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# UI/UX Design System Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "基于 ui_ux_pro_max v2.0 的设计系统生成 Agent，支持完整的工作流编排和工具调用。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 功能特性"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "### 1. 核心工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **&#96;ui_ux_search&#96;**: 搜索 UI/UX 设计知识库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **&#96;generate_design_system&#96;**: 生成完整设计系统（包含推理引擎）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **&#96;persist_design_system&#96;**: 持久化设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### 2. Agent 编排"
          },

            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **&#96;UIDesignSystemAgent&#96;**: 智能编排的 Agent，自动完成设计系统生成工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **&#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool&#96;**: 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用"
          },

            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent\n// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx context.Context, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {\n\tchatModel, err := NewChatModelFromConfig(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create chat model from config: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)\n}\n\n// Invoke 执行 Agent 工作流\nfunc (a *UIDesignSystemAgent) Invoke(ctx context.Context, query string) (*schema.Message, error) {\n\tmessages := []*schema.Message{\n\t\tschema.UserMessage(query),\n\t}\n\n\treturn a.agent.Invoke(ctx, messages)\n}\n\n// getSystemPrompt 获取系统提示词\nfunc getSystemPrompt() string {\n\treturn &#96;You are a UI/UX Design System Generator Agent. Your task is to help users generate complete design systems for their projects.\n\nWorkflow:\n1. **Analyze Requirements**: Extract key information from user request:\n   - Product type (SaaS, e-commerce, portfolio, dashboard, landing page, etc.)\n   - Style keywords (minimal, playful, professional, elegant, dark mode, etc.)\n   - Industry (healthcare, fintech, gaming, education, etc.)\n   - Stack (React, Vue, Next.js, or default to html-tailwind)\n\n2. **Generate Design System** (REQUIRED): Always start by calling generate_design_system tool with:\n   - query: User's product description and requirements\n   - project_name: Project name if provided\n\n3. **Supplement with Detailed Searches** (if needed): After getting the design system, use ui_ux_search tool to get additional details:\n   - More style options: domain=\"style\"\n   - Chart recommendations: domain=\"chart\"\n   - UX best practices: domain=\"ux\"\n   - Alternative fonts: domain=\"typography\"\n   - Landing structure: domain=\"landing\"\n\n4. **Stack Guidelines** (if stack specified): Use ui_ux_search with stack parameter to get implementation-specific best practices.\n\n5. **Persist Design System** (if requested): If user wants to save the design system, call persist_design_system tool.\n\nAlways provide comprehensive, actionable design system recommendations based on the generated results.&#96;\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等\n\n## 示例\n\n### 示例 1：生成设计系统\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nagent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)\nresult, _ := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"beauty spa wellness service\")\n// Agent 会自动：\n// 1. 识别产品类型：Beauty/Spa/Wellness Service\n// 2. 匹配推理规则\n// 3. 生成完整设计系统\n// 4. 返回格式化的结果\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 示例 2：持久化设计系统\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"beauty spa wellness service\",\n    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\",\n    PageName:    \"homepage\",\n})\n// 创建文件：\n// - design-system/serenity-spa/MASTER.md\n// - design-system/serenity-spa/pages/homepage.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 配置说明\n\n### ChatModel 配置（参考 DigFlow 配置方式）\n\n在 &#96;config/config.yaml&#96; 中配置 ChatModel：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nChatModel:\n  Type: \"qwen\"                      # 模型类型: qwen, openai\n  Config:\n    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"        # API Key（支持环境变量 ${VAR_NAME}）\n    Model: \"qwen-max\"                 # 模型名称\n    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"  # API 地址\n    Temperature: 0.7                 # 可选：温度参数\n    MaxTokens: 2048                  # 可选：最大 token 数\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**使用 OpenAI**：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nChatModel:\n  Type: \"openai\"\n  Config:\n    ApiKey: \"${OPENAI_API_KEY}\"\n    Model: \"gpt-4\"\n    BaseUrl: \"https://api.openai.com/v1\"\n    Temperature: 0.7\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**切换模型提供商**：只需修改 &#96;Type&#96; 字段，例如：\n- &#96;Type: \"qwen\"&#96; - 使用 Qwen 模型\n- &#96;Type: \"openai\"&#96; - 使用 OpenAI 模型\n\n**环境变量支持**：配置中的值支持 &#96;${VAR_NAME}&#96; 格式，会自动从环境变量中读取，例如：\n- &#96;ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"&#96; - 从环境变量 &#96;QWEN_API_KEY&#96; 读取",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等"

          },

            "lineNumber": 236,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,

          },

            "lineNumber": 244,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\","

            "text": "// - design-system/serenity-spa/pages/homepage.md"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "## 配置说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "### ChatModel 配置（参考 DigFlow 配置方式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "在 &#96;config/config.yaml&#96; 中配置 ChatModel："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"                      # 模型类型: qwen, openai"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"        # API Key（支持环境变量 ${VAR_NAME}）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"                 # 模型名称"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"  # API 地址"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "    Temperature: 0.7                 # 可选：温度参数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "    MaxTokens: 2048                  # 可选：最大 token 数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "**使用 OpenAI**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "ChatModel:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "  Type: \"openai\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "  Config:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${OPENAI_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    Model: \"gpt-4\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://api.openai.com/v1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "    Temperature: 0.7"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "**切换模型提供商**：只需修改 &#96;Type&#96; 字段，例如："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "- &#96;Type: \"qwen\"&#96; - 使用 Qwen 模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "- &#96;Type: \"openai\"&#96; - 使用 OpenAI 模型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "**环境变量支持**：配置中的值支持 &#96;${VAR_NAME}&#96; 格式，会自动从环境变量中读取，例如："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "- &#96;ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"&#96; - 从环境变量 &#96;QWEN_API_KEY&#96; 读取"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 288
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 222
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2453874945640564
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"encoding/csv\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n//go:embed data/*.csv data/stacks/*.csv\nvar designData embed.FS\n\n// CSVConfigEntry defines the configuration for each design domain\ntype CSVConfigEntry struct {\n\tFile       string\n\tSearchCols []string\n\tOutputCols []string\n}\n\n// CSVConfigs maps domain keys to their respective CSV configurations\nvar CSVConfigs = map[string]CSVConfigEntry{\n\t\"style\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/styles.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Type\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Colors\", \"Effects \u0026 Animation\", \"Best For\", \"Performance\", \"Accessibility\", \"Framework Compatibility\", \"Complexity\"},\n\t},\n\t\"prompt\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/prompts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\", \"Implementation Checklist\"},\n\t},\n\t\"color\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/colors.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary (Hex)\", \"Secondary (Hex)\", \"CTA (Hex)\", \"Background (Hex)\", \"Text (Hex)\", \"Border (Hex)\", \"Notes\"},\n\t},\n\t\"chart\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/charts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Accessibility Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Secondary Options\", \"Color Guidance\", \"Accessibility Notes\", \"Library Recommendation\", \"Interactive Level\"},\n\t},\n\t\"landing\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/landing.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Conversion Optimization\", \"Section Order\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Section Order\", \"Primary CTA Placement\", \"Color Strategy\", \"Conversion Optimization\"},\n\t},\n\t\"product\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/products.csv\",",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\n// UIDesignSystemAgent UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent\n// 这是一个编排的 Agent，内部使用工具来完成设计系统生成工作流\ntype UIDesignSystemAgent struct {\n\tagent compose.Runnable[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgent 创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent\n// 需要传入 ChatModel，Agent 内部会使用工具进行工作流编排\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {\n\t// 准备工具集\n\tallTools := []tool.BaseTool{}\n\n\t// 1. UI/UX 搜索工具\n\tsearchTool, err := NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tallTools = append(allTools, searchTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 2. 设计系统生成工具\n\tdesignSystemTool, err := NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tallTools = append(allTools, designSystemTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 3. 持久化工具\n\tpersistTool, err := NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tallTools = append(allTools, persistTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 4. 添加外部传入的额外工具（如其他项目工具）\n\tallTools = append(allTools, additionalTools...)\n\n\t// 绑定工具到模型\n\ttoolInfos := make([]*schema.ToolInfo, 0, len(allTools))\n\tfor _, t := range allTools {\n\t\tif info, err := t.Info(ctx); err == nil {\n\t\t\ttoolInfos = append(toolInfos, info)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif err := chatModel.BindTools(toolInfos); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to bind tools: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 创建工具执行节点\n\ttoolNode, err := compose.NewToolNode(ctx, \u0026compose.ToolsNodeConfig{\n\t\tTools: allTools,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create tool node: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 创建 Agent Lambda 节点（手动调用模型和工具）\n\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {\n\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n)\n\n// UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest Agent 工具请求\ntype UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest struct {\n\tQuery       string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=用户需求描述，如 'beauty spa wellness service'\"&#96;\n\tProjectName string &#96;json:\"project_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=项目名称，如 'Serenity Spa'\"&#96;\n\tStack       string &#96;json:\"stack,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=技术栈，如 'react', 'tailwind' 等\"&#96;\n\tPersist     bool   &#96;json:\"persist,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=是否持久化设计系统\"&#96;\n\tPageName    string &#96;json:\"page_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=页面名称，用于生成页面特定覆盖\"&#96;\n}\n\n// UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse Agent 工具响应\ntype UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse struct {\n\tDesignSystem string &#96;json:\"design_system\"&#96; // 设计系统的完整输出\n\tMessage      string &#96;json:\"message\"&#96;       // 附加消息\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用\n// 注意：需要传入 ChatModel，因为 Agent 需要 LLM 来决策工作流\n// additionalTools: 可选的额外工具，用于扩展 Agent 能力\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\t// 创建 Agent 实例\n\tagentInstance, err :=",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest Agent 工具请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "type UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\tQuery       string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=用户需求描述，如 'beauty spa wellness service'\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\tProjectName string &#96;json:\"project_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=项目名称，如 'Serenity Spa'\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\tStack       string &#96;json:\"stack,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=技术栈，如 'react', 'tailwind' 等\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\tPersist     bool   &#96;json:\"persist,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=是否持久化设计系统\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\tPageName    string &#96;json:\"page_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=页面名称，用于生成页面特定覆盖\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "// UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse Agent 工具响应"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "type UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tDesignSystem string &#96;json:\"design_system\"&#96; // 设计系统的完整输出"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tMessage      string &#96;json:\"message\"&#96;       // 附加消息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "// 注意：需要传入 ChatModel，因为 Agent 需要 LLM 来决策工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "// additionalTools: 可选的额外工具，用于扩展 Agent 能力"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\t// 创建 Agent 实例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tagentInstance, err :="
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n// DesignSystem 设计系统结构\ntype DesignSystem struct {\n\tProjectName  string\n\tCategory     string\n\tPattern      *Pattern\n\tStyle        *Style\n\tColors       *Colors\n\tTypography   *Typography\n\tKeyEffects   string\n\tAntiPatterns string\n}\n\n// Pattern 布局模式\ntype Pattern struct {\n\tName          string\n\tSections      string\n\tCTAPlacement  string\n\tColorStrategy string\n\tConversion    string\n}\n\n// Style 样式信息\ntype Style struct {\n\tName         string\n\tType         string\n\tEffects      string\n\tKeywords     string\n\tBestFor      string\n\tPerformance  string\n\tAccessibility string\n}\n\n// Colors 配色方案\ntype Colors struct {\n\tPrimary    string\n\tSecondary  string\n\tCTA        string\n\tBackground string\n\tText       string\n\tNotes      string\n}\n\n// Typography 字体排版\ntype Typography struct {\n\tHeading       string\n\tBody          string\n\tMood          string\n\tBestFor       string\n\tGoogleFontsURL string\n\tCSSImport     string\n}\n\n// DesignSystemGenerator 设计系统生成器\ntype DesignSystemGenerator struct {\n\tservice   *UIUXService\n\treasoning *ReasoningEngine\n}\n\n// NewDesignSystemGenerator 创建设计系统生成器\nfunc NewDesignSystemGenerator() (*DesignSystemGenerator, error) {\n\treasoning, err := NewReasoningEngine()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026DesignSystemGenerator{\n\t\tservice:   NewUIUXService(),\n\t\treasoning: reasoning,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystem 生成完整设计系统\nfunc (g *DesignSystemGenerator) GenerateDesignSystem(query string, projectName string) (*DesignSystem, error) {\n\t// Step 1: 搜索 product 领域获取产品类型",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (g *DesignSystemGenerator) GenerateDesignSystem(query string, projectName string) (*DesignSystem, error) {\n\t// Step 1: 搜索 product 领域获取产品类型\n\tproductResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"product\", 1)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search product: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tcategory := \"General\"\n\tif len(productResult.Results) \u003e 0 {\n\t\tcategory = productResult.Results[0][\"Product Type\"]\n\t}\n\n\t// Step 2: 获取推理规则\n\treasoning := g.reasoning.FindRule(category)\n\tstylePriority := reasoning.StylePriority\n\n\t// Step 3: 多领域并行搜索\n\tstyleResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"style\", 3)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search style: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tcolorResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"color\", 2)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search color: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\ttypographyResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"typography\", 2)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search typography: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tlandingResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"landing\", 2)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search landing: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Step 4: 选择最佳匹配\n\tbestStyle := g.selectBestStyleMatch(styleResult.Results, stylePriority)\n\tbestColor := g.selectBestMatch(colorResult.Results, nil)\n\tbestTypography := g.selectBestMatch(typographyResult.Results, nil)\n\tbestLanding := g.selectBestMatch(landingResult.Results, nil)\n\n\t// Step 5: 构建设计系统\n\tstyleEffects := bestStyle[\"Effects \u0026 Animation\"]\n\tif styleEffects == \"\" {\n\t\tstyleEffects = reasoning.KeyEffects\n\t}\n\n\tds := \u0026DesignSystem{\n\t\tProjectName:  projectName,\n\t\tCategory:     category,",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] Light mode: text contrast 4.5:1 minimum\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] Focus states visible for keyboard navigation\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] &#96;prefers-reduced-motion&#96; respected\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] Responsive: 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] No content hidden behind fixed navbars\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] No horizontal scroll on mobile\\n\\n\")\n\n\treturn sb.String()\n}\n\n// formatPageOverrideMD 格式化页面覆盖文件\nfunc (p *PersistenceManager) formatPageOverrideMD(ds *DesignSystem, pageName string) string {\n\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\ttimestamp := time.Now().Format(\"2006-01-02 15:04:05\")\n\tpageTitle := strings.Title(strings.ReplaceAll(strings.ReplaceAll(pageName, \"-\", \" \"), \"_\", \" \"))\n\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"# %s Page Overrides\\n\\n\", pageTitle))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\u003e **PROJECT:** %s\\n\", ds.ProjectName))\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\u003e **Generated:** %s\\n\", timestamp))\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Rules in this file **override** the Master file (&#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96;).\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e Only deviations from the Master are documented here. For all other rules, refer to the Master.\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"---\\n\\n\")\n\n\t// Page-specific rules\n\tsb.WriteString(\"## Page-Specific Rules\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Layout Overrides\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- No overrides — use Master layout\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Spacing Overrides\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- No overrides — use Master spacing\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Typography Overrides\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- No overrides — use Master typography\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Color Overrides\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- No overrides — use Master colors\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Component Overrides\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- No overrides — use Master component specs\\n\\n\")\n\n\tsb.WriteString(\"---\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"## Page-Specific Components\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"- No unique components for this page\\n\\n\")\n\n\tsb.WriteString(\"---\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"## Recommendations\\n\\n\")",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] Light mode: text contrast 4.5:1 minimum\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] Focus states visible for keyboard navigation\\n\")"
          },
          {

            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] &#96;prefers-reduced-motion&#96; respected\\n\")"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(\"- [ ] No horizontal scroll on mobile\\n\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },

            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "\treturn sb.String()"

          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"# %s Page Overrides\\n\\n\", pageTitle))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\u003e **PROJECT:** %s\\n\", ds.ProjectName))"

          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\u003e **Generated:** %s\\n\", timestamp))"

          },

            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Rules in this file **override** the Master file (&#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96;).\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "\tsb.WriteString(\"\u003e Only deviations from the Master are documented here. For all other rules, refer to the Master.\\n\\n\")"

          },

        "contents": "\tds := \u0026DesignSystem{\n\t\tProjectName:  projectName,\n\t\tCategory:     category,\n\t\tKeyEffects:    styleEffects,\n\t\tAntiPatterns: reasoning.AntiPatterns,\n\t\tPattern: \u0026Pattern{\n\t\t\tName:          bestLanding[\"Pattern Name\"],\n\t\t\tSections:      bestLanding[\"Section Order\"],\n\t\t\tCTAPlacement:  bestLanding[\"Primary CTA Placement\"],\n\t\t\tColorStrategy: bestLanding[\"Color Strategy\"],\n\t\t\tConversion:    bestLanding[\"Conversion Optimization\"],\n\t\t},\n\t\tStyle: \u0026Style{\n\t\t\tName:         bestStyle[\"Style Category\"],\n\t\t\tType:         bestStyle[\"Type\"],\n\t\t\tEffects:      bestStyle[\"Effects \u0026 Animation\"],\n\t\t\tKeywords:     bestStyle[\"Keywords\"],\n\t\t\tBestFor:      bestStyle[\"Best For\"],\n\t\t\tPerformance:  bestStyle[\"Performance\"],\n\t\t\tAccessibility: bestStyle[\"Accessibility\"],\n\t\t},\n\t\tColors: \u0026Colors{\n\t\t\tPrimary:    bestColor[\"Primary (Hex)\"],\n\t\t\tSecondary:  bestColor[\"Secondary (Hex)\"],\n\t\t\tCTA:        bestColor[\"CTA (Hex)\"],\n\t\t\tBackground: bestColor[\"Background (Hex)\"],\n\t\t\tText:       bestColor[\"Text (Hex)\"],\n\t\t\tNotes:      bestColor[\"Notes\"],\n\t\t},\n\t\tTypography: \u0026Typography{\n\t\t\tHeading:       bestTypography[\"Heading Font\"],\n\t\t\tBody:          bestTypography[\"Body Font\"],\n\t\t\tMood:          bestTypography[\"Mood/Style Keywords\"],\n\t\t\tBestFor:       bestTypography[\"Best For\"],\n\t\t\tGoogleFontsURL: bestTypography[\"Google Fonts URL\"],\n\t\t\tCSSImport:     bestTypography[\"CSS Import\"],\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\t// 如果 Pattern Name 为空，使用推理规则的推荐模式\n\tif ds.Pattern.Name == \"\" {\n\t\tds.Pattern.Name = reasoning.RecommendedPattern\n\t}\n\n\t// 如果 Typography Mood 为空，使用推理规则\n\tif ds.Typography.Mood == \"\" {\n\t\tds.Typography.Mood = reasoning.TypographyMood\n\t}\n\n\treturn ds, nil\n}\n\n// selectBestStyleMatch 选择最佳样式匹配（基于优先级关键词）\nfunc (g *DesignSystemGenerator) selectBestStyleMatch(results []map[string]string, priorityKeywords []string) map[string]string {\n\tif len(results) == 0 {\n\t\treturn make(map[string]string)\n\t}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"generate_design_system\",\n\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。基于产品类型和需求，自动匹配最佳的设计方案。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *GenerateDesignSystemRequest) (*GenerateDesignSystemResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treq.ProjectName = \"Project\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tds, err := service.GenerateDesignSystem(req.Query, req.ProjectName)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 格式化输出为可读字符串\n\t\t\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"设计系统: %s\\n\", ds.ProjectName))\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"产品类型: %s\\n\\n\", ds.Category))\n\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"=== 布局模式 ===\\n\")\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"模式名称: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.Name))\n\t\t\tif ds.Pattern.Sections != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"区块顺序: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.Sections))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Pattern.CTAPlacement != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"CTA 位置: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.CTAPlacement))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Pattern.Conversion != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"转化策略: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.Conversion))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"=== 样式 ===\\n\")\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"样式名称: %s\\n\", ds.Style.Name))\n\t\t\tif ds.Style.Keywords != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"关键词: %s\\n\", ds.Style.Keywords))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Style.BestFor != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"适用场景: %s\\n\",     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *UIUXService) SearchStack(query string, stack string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tfilename, ok := StackConfigs[stack]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"unknown stack: %s\", stack)\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := s.loadCSV(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to load stack csv %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdocuments := make([]string, len(data))\n\tfor i, row := range data {\n\t\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\t\tfor _, col := range StackCols.SearchCols {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(row[col])\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(\" \")\n\t\t}\n\t\tdocuments[i] = builder.String()\n\t}\n\n\tbm25 := NewBM25(1.5, 0.75)\n\tbm25.Fit(documents)\n\tranked := bm25.Score(query)\n\n\tsort.Slice(ranked, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn ranked[i].Score \u003e ranked[j].Score\n\t})\n\n\tvar finalResults []map[string]string\n\tfor i := 0; i \u003c len(ranked) \u0026\u0026 len(finalResults) \u003c maxResults; i++ {\n\t\tif ranked[i].Score \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\torigRow := data[ranked[i].Index]\n\t\t\tfilteredRow := make(map[string]string)\n\t\t\tfor _, col := range StackCols.OutputCols {\n\t\t\t\tif val, ok := origRow[col]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tfilteredRow[col] = val\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfinalResults = append(finalResults, filteredRow)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026SearchResult{\n\t\tDomain:  \"stack\",\n\t\tQuery:   query,\n\t\tFile:    filename,\n\t\tCount:   len(finalResults),\n\t\tResults: finalResults,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystem 生成完整设计系统\nfunc (s *UIUXService) GenerateDesignSystem(query string, projectName string) (*DesignSystem, error) {\n\tgenerator, err := NewDesignSystemGenerator()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn generator.GenerateDesignSystem(query, projectName)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (e *ReasoningEngine) loadRules() error {\n\tf, err := designData.Open(\"data/ui-reasoning.csv\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdefer f.Close()\n\n\treader := csv.NewReader(f)\n\theaders, err := reader.Read()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar rules []ReasoningRule\n\tfor {\n\t\trow, err := reader.Read()\n\t\tif err == io.EOF {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\truleMap := make(map[string]string)\n\t\tfor i, h := range headers {\n\t\t\tif i \u003c len(row) {\n\t\t\t\truleMap[h] = row[i]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// 解析 Style Priority（用 + 分隔）\n\t\tstylePriorityStr := ruleMap[\"Style_Priority\"]\n\t\tvar stylePriority []string\n\t\tif stylePriorityStr != \"\" {\n\t\t\tparts := strings.Split(stylePriorityStr, \"+\")\n\t\t\tfor _, p := range parts {\n\t\t\t\tif trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(p); trimmed != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tstylePriority = append(stylePriority, trimmed)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// 解析 Decision Rules（JSON）\n\t\tdecisionRules := make(map[string]string)\n\t\tdecisionRulesStr := ruleMap[\"Decision_Rules\"]\n\t\tif decisionRulesStr != \"\" {\n\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(decisionRulesStr), \u0026decisionRules); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t// 如果解析失败，忽略错误\n\t\t\t\tdecisionRules = make(map[string]string)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\trule := ReasoningRule{\n\t\t\tUICategory:        ruleMap[\"UI_Category\"],\n\t\t\tRecommendedPattern: ruleMap[\"Recommended_Pattern\"],\n\t\t\tStylePriority:     stylePriority,\n\t\t\tColorMood:         ruleMap[\"Color_Mood\"],\n\t\t\tTypographyMood:    ruleMap[\"Typography_Mood\"],\n\t\t\tKeyEffects:        ruleMap[\"Key_Effects\"],\n\t\t\tDecisionRules:     decisionRules,\n\t\t\tAntiPatterns:      ruleMap[\"Anti_Patterns\"],\n\t\t\tSeverity:          ruleMap[\"Severity\"],\n\t\t}\n\n\t\trules = append(rules, rule)\n\t}\n\n\te.rules = rules\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// FindRule 根据产品类型查找匹配的推理规则\nfunc (e *ReasoningEngine) FindRule(category string) *ReasoningRule {\n\tcategoryLower := strings.ToLower(category)\n\n\t// 1. 精确匹配",

        "contents": "\tif ds.Typography.GoogleFontsURL != \"\" {\n\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"- **Google Fonts:** [%s + %s](%s)\\n\", ds.Typography.Heading, ds.Typography.Body, ds.Typography.GoogleFontsURL))\n\t}\n\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\tif ds.Typography.CSSImport != \"\" {\n\t\tsb.WriteString(\"**CSS Import:**\\n\")\n\t\tsb.WriteString(\"&#96;&#96;&#96;css\\n\")\n\t\tsb.WriteString(ds.Typography.CSSImport)\n\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\n\\n\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Spacing Variables\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Spacing Variables\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| Token | Value | Usage |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"|-------|-------|-------|\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-xs&#96; | &#96;4px&#96; / &#96;0.25rem&#96; | Tight gaps |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-sm&#96; | &#96;8px&#96; / &#96;0.5rem&#96; | Icon gaps, inline spacing |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-md&#96; | &#96;16px&#96; / &#96;1rem&#96; | Standard padding |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-lg&#96; | &#96;24px&#96; / &#96;1.5rem&#96; | Section padding |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-xl&#96; | &#96;32px&#96; / &#96;2rem&#96; | Large gaps |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-2xl&#96; | &#96;48px&#96; / &#96;3rem&#96; | Section margins |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--space-3xl&#96; | &#96;64px&#96; / &#96;4rem&#96; | Hero padding |\\n\\n\")\n\n\t// Shadow Depths\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Shadow Depths\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| Level | Value | Usage |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"|-------|-------|-------|\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--shadow-sm&#96; | &#96;0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)&#96; | Subtle lift |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--shadow-md&#96; | &#96;0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)&#96; | Cards, buttons |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--shadow-lg&#96; | &#96;0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)&#96; | Modals, dropdowns |\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"| &#96;--shadow-xl&#96; | &#96;0 20px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)&#96; | Hero images, featured cards |\\n\\n\")\n\n\t// Component Specs\n\tsb.WriteString(\"---\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"## Component Specs\\n\\n\")\n\n\t// Buttons\n\tsb.WriteString(\"### Buttons\\n\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"&#96;&#96;&#96;css\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"/* Primary Button */\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\".btn-primary {\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"  background: %s;\\n\", ds.Colors.CTA))\n\tsb.WriteString(\"  color: white;\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"  padding: 12px 24px;\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"  border-radius: 8px;\\n\")\n\tsb.WriteString(\"  font-weight: 600;\\n\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type UIUXService struct{}\n\n// NewUIUXService creates a new UIUXService using embedded data\nfunc NewUIUXService() *UIUXService {\n\treturn \u0026UIUXService{}\n}\n\nfunc (s *UIUXService) loadCSV(filename string) ([]map[string]string, error) {\n\tf, err := designData.Open(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tdefer f.Close()\n\n\treader := csv.NewReader(f)\n\theaders, err := reader.Read()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar results []map[string]string\n\tfor {\n\t\trow, err := reader.Read()\n\t\tif err == io.EOF {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\titem := make(map[string]string)\n\t\tfor i, h := range headers {\n\t\t\tif i \u003c len(row) {\n\t\t\t\titem[h] = row[i]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults = append(results, item)\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\n// SearchResult represents the output of a design intelligence search\ntype SearchResult struct {\n\tDomain  string              &#96;json:\"domain\"&#96;\n\tQuery   string              &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;\n\tFile    string              &#96;json:\"file\"&#96;\n\tCount   int                 &#96;json:\"count\"&#96;\n\tResults []map[string]string &#96;json:\"results\"&#96;\n}\n\n// Search performs a BM25 search across design domains\nfunc (s *UIUXService) Search(query string, domain string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tif domain == \"\" {\n\t\tdomain = DetectDomain(query)\n\t}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "type UIUXService struct{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "// NewUIUXService creates a new UIUXService using embedded data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "func NewUIUXService() *UIUXService {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\treturn \u0026UIUXService{}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "func (s *UIUXService) loadCSV(filename string) ([]map[string]string, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\tf, err := designData.Open(filename)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\tdefer f.Close()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\treader := csv.NewReader(f)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\theaders, err := reader.Read()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\tvar results []map[string]string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\tfor {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\trow, err := reader.Read()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t\tif err == io.EOF {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t\t\tbreak"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\titem := make(map[string]string)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t\tfor i, h := range headers {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\t\tif i \u003c len(row) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t\t\t\titem[h] = row[i]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\tresults = append(results, item)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\treturn results, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "// SearchResult represents the output of a design intelligence search"

          },

          },

          {
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

当前实现会将文件保存到 `{baseDir}/design-system/{project-slug}/MASTER.md`，`baseDir` 默认为当前目录，不同 agent/应用调用时可能混在一起。设计一个更合理的存储方案：

```json
{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# DigEino 使用指南\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。\n\n## 1. 安装\n\n在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngo get github.com/originaleric/digeino\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 2. 配置管理\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。\n\n### 2.1 依赖结构\n\n配置主要包含两个部分：\n- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。\n\n### 2.2 使用示例\n\n#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）\n\n首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nHttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: true\n    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n然后在代码中加载：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc main() {\n    // 加载配置文件\n    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")\n    if err != nil {\n        panic(err)\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\nfunc initConfig() {\n    cfg := config.Default()\n    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\"\n    config.Set(cfg)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 3. 核心功能使用\n\n### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)\n\n&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\"\n\nfunc someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "HttpServer:\n  Api:\n    Port: \":20201\"\n\nStatus:\n  Webhook:\n    Enabled: false\n    URL: \"\"\n    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]\n    method: \"POST\"\n    timeout: 5\n    retry_count: 3\n    retry_delay: 1000\n  Store:\n    Enabled: true\n    Type: \"memory\"\n    MySQL:\n      Host: \"127.0.0.1\"\n      Port: 3306\n      User: \"root\"\n      Password: \"\"\n      Database: \"digpdf\"\n      ExecTable: \"df_execution\"\n      StatusTable: \"df_execution_status\"\n\nWeChat:\n  Enabled: false                    # 是否启用微信推送功能\n  AppID: \"\"                         # 微信服务号 AppID\n  AppSecret: \"\"                     # 微信服务号 AppSecret\n  OpenIDs: []                       # 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表\n  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # AccessToken 存储文件路径\n\nChatModel:\n  Type: \"qwen\"                      # 模型类型: qwen, openai\n  Config:\n    ApiKey: \"\"                       # API Key（支持环境变量 ${API_KEY}）\n    Model: \"qwen-max\"                # 模型名称\n    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"  # API 地址\n    # Temperature: 0.7               # 可选：温度参数\n    # MaxTokens: 2048                 # 可选：最大 token 数",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package wx\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\ttokenMutex sync.Mutex // 用于保护 Token 文件读写的互斥锁\n)\n\n// getTokenFilePath 获取 Token 文件完整路径\nfunc getTokenFilePath() string {\n\tcfg := config.Get()\n\tif cfg.WeChat.TokenFilePath != \"\" {\n\t\treturn cfg.WeChat.TokenFilePath\n\t}\n\t// 默认路径：当前工作目录下的 storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\n\twd, err := os.Getwd()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twd = \".\"\n\t}\n\treturn filepath.Join(wd, \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\")\n}\n\n// loadAccessTokenFromFile 从文件加载 AccessToken\nfunc loadAccessTokenFromFile(filePath string) (*AccessTokenData, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar tokenData AccessTokenData\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(data, \u0026tokenData)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse token file: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026tokenData, nil\n}\n\n// saveAccessTokenToFile 保存 AccessToken 到文件\nfunc saveAccessTokenToFile(filePath string, tokenData *AccessTokenData) error {\n\t// 确保目录存在\n\tdir := filepath.Dir(filePath)\n\tif err := os.MkdirAll(dir, 0755); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create directory: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.MarshalIndent(tokenData, \"\", \"  \")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal token data: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\terr = os.WriteFile(filePath, data, 0644)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write token file: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// isTokenExpired 检查 Token 是否过期\nfunc isTokenExpired(tokenData *AccessTokenData) bool {\n\t// 提前 5 分钟刷新，避免边界情况\n\tbufferTime := int64(300) // 5 分钟\n\treturn time.Now().Unix() \u003e= (tokenData.ExpiresAt - bufferTime)\n}\n\n// fetchAccessTokenFromWeChat 从微信 API 获取新的 AccessToken\nfunc fetchAccessTokenFromWeChat(ctx context.Context, appID, appSecret string) (*AccessTokenData, error) {\n\t// 微信获取 AccessToken 的 API",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;\n\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;\n\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;\n\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;\n\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;\n\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;\n\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置\ntype WeChatConfig struct {\n\tEnabled     *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;         // 是否启用微信推送功能\n\tAppID       string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;             // 微信服务号 AppID\n\tAppSecret   string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;     // 微信服务号 AppSecret\n\tOpenIDs     []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;          // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表\n\tTokenFilePath string &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）\n}\n\n// ChatModelConfig ChatModel 配置（参考 DigFlow 的配置方式）\ntype ChatModelConfig struct {\n\tType   string                 &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type\"&#96;   // qwen, openai\n\tConfig map[string]interface{} &#96;yaml:\"Config\" json:\"Config\"&#96; // 模型配置（ApiKey, Model, BaseUrl 等）\n}\n\nvar (\n\t// DefaultConfig 全局默认配置\n\tcurrentConfig *Config\n)\n\n// Load 从文件加载配置\nfunc Load(path string) (*Config, error) {\n\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar cfg Config\n\tif err := yaml.Unmarshal(data, \u0026cfg); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcurrentConfig = \u0026cfg\n\treturn \u0026cfg, nil\n}\n\n// Get 获取当前配置\nfunc Get() *Config {\n\tif currentConfig == nil {\n\t\tcurrentConfig = Default()\n\t}\n\treturn currentConfig\n}\n\n// Set 设置当前配置\nfunc Set(cfg *Config) {\n\tcurrentConfig = cfg\n}\n\n// Default 返回默认配置\nfunc Default() *Config {\n\tenabled := true\n\twechatDisabled := false",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\n// PersistenceManager 持久化管理器\ntype PersistenceManager struct {\n\tbaseDir string\n}\n\n// NewPersistenceManager 创建持久化管理器\nfunc NewPersistenceManager(baseDir string) *PersistenceManager {\n\tif baseDir == \"\" {\n\t\tbaseDir = \".\"\n\t}\n\treturn \u0026PersistenceManager{baseDir: baseDir}\n}\n\n// PersistDesignSystem 保存设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）\nfunc (p *PersistenceManager) PersistDesignSystem(ds *DesignSystem, projectSlug string, pageName string) error {\n\tif projectSlug == \"\" {\n\t\tprojectSlug = strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(ds.ProjectName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t}\n\n\tdesignSystemDir := filepath.Join(p.baseDir, \"design-system\", projectSlug)\n\tpagesDir := filepath.Join(designSystemDir, \"pages\")\n\n\t// 创建目录\n\tif err := os.MkdirAll(pagesDir, 0755); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create directories: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 生成并保存 MASTER.md\n\tmasterFile := filepath.Join(designSystemDir, \"MASTER.md\")\n\tmasterContent := p.formatMasterMD(ds)\n\tif err := os.WriteFile(masterFile, []byte(masterContent), 0644); err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write MASTER.md: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 如果指定了页面名称，创建页面覆盖文件\n\tif pageName != \"\" {\n\t\tpageFile := filepath.Join(pagesDir, strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(pageName, \" \", \"-\"))+\".md\")\n\t\tpageContent := p.formatPageOverrideMD(ds, pageName)\n\t\tif err := os.WriteFile(pageFile, []byte(pageContent), 0644); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write page override: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// formatMasterMD 格式化 Master 文件\nfunc (p *PersistenceManager) formatMasterMD(ds *DesignSystem) string {\n\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\ttimestamp := time.Now().Format(\"2006-01-02 15:04:05\")",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func Default() *Config {\n\tenabled := true\n\twechatDisabled := false\n\treturn \u0026Config{\n\t\tHttpServer: HttpServerConfig{\n\t\t\tApi: struct {\n\t\t\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t\t\t}{\n\t\t\t\tPort: \":20201\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStatus: StatusConfig{\n\t\t\tWebhook: AppWebhookConfig{\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,\n\t\t\t\tConfig: WebhookConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tMethod:     \"POST\",\n\t\t\t\t\tTimeout:    5,\n\t\t\t\t\tRetryCount: 3,\n\t\t\t\t\tRetryDelay: 1000,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStore: StatusStoreConfig{\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: \u0026enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:    \"memory\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tWeChat: WeChatConfig{\n\t\t\tEnabled:       \u0026wechatDisabled,\n\t\t\tTokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\",\n\t\t},\n\t\tChatModel: ChatModelConfig{\n\t\t\tType: \"qwen\",\n\t\t\tConfig: map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\"ApiKey\":  \"\",\n\t\t\t\t\"Model\":   \"qwen-max\",\n\t\t\t\t\"BaseUrl\": \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package config\n\nimport (\n\t\"os\"\n\n\t\"gopkg.in/yaml.v3\"\n)\n\n// Config 根配置结构\ntype Config struct {\n\tHttpServer HttpServerConfig &#96;yaml:\"HttpServer\" json:\"HttpServer\"&#96;\n\tStatus     StatusConfig     &#96;yaml:\"Status\" json:\"Status\"&#96;\n\tWeChat     WeChatConfig     &#96;yaml:\"WeChat\" json:\"WeChat\"&#96;\n\tChatModel  ChatModelConfig  &#96;yaml:\"ChatModel\" json:\"ChatModel\"&#96;\n}\n\n// HttpServerConfig HTTP 服务配置\ntype HttpServerConfig struct {\n\tApi struct {\n\t\tPort string &#96;yaml:\"Port\" json:\"Port\"&#96;\n\t} &#96;yaml:\"Api\" json:\"Api\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusConfig 状态相关配置：包含 Webhook 与 Store\ntype StatusConfig struct {\n\tWebhook AppWebhookConfig  &#96;yaml:\"Webhook\" json:\"Webhook\"&#96;\n\tStore   StatusStoreConfig &#96;yaml:\"Store\" json:\"Store\"&#96;\n}\n\n// AppWebhookConfig 应用级 Webhook 配置\ntype AppWebhookConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool         &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tURL     string        &#96;yaml:\"URL\" json:\"URL,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tConfig  WebhookConfig &#96;yaml:\",inline\" json:\"Config\"&#96;\n}\n\n// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig struct {\n\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;\n\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;\n}\n\n// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置\ntype StatusStoreConfig struct {\n\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;\n\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql\n\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;\n}\n\n// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置\ntype MySQLConfig struct {\n\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    var outline *DocumentOutline\n    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)\n    return outline, err\n}\n\nfunc SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {\n    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 5. AgentState 架构说明\n\n### 5.1 核心字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段：\n- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识\n- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询\n- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识\n- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结\n- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）\n\n### 5.2 业务结构体\n\n**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。\n\n这样做的好处：\n- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性\n- ✅ 不同项目可以定义自己的业务结构体\n- ✅ 避免业务逻辑污染核心库\n- ✅ 更好的类型安全和代码组织\n\n### 5.3 迁移指南\n\n如果您之前使用了 &#96;AgentState&#96; 中的业务字段（如 &#96;Outline&#96;、&#96;Pages&#96; 等），需要：\n\n1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体\n2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问\n3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例\n\n## 6. 常见问题\n\n- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。\n- **扩展性**: 如果需要增加新的配置项，请在 &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/config&#96; 包中扩展 &#96;Config&#96; 结构体。\n- **项目特定字段**: 使用 &#96;AgentState.Extensions&#96; 字段存储项目特定的数据，而不是修改核心库的 &#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体。\n- **业务结构体**: 所有业务特定的结构体都应该在项目包中定义，通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储，并使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法访问。",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "func GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "    var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "    err := state.GetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, \u0026outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "    return outline, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "func SetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState, outline *DocumentOutline) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    state.SetBusinessData(ExtensionKeyOutline, outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "## 5. AgentState 架构说明"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "### 5.1 核心字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 只包含通用的核心字段："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "- &#96;SessionID&#96;: 会话标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "- &#96;Query&#96;: 用户查询"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 状态标识"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- &#96;ResearchSummary&#96;: 研究总结"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- &#96;Extensions&#96;: 扩展字段（用于存储项目特定的数据）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "### 5.2 业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },

            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "**重要**：&#96;DigEino&#96; 是一个通用库，不包含任何业务特定的结构体（如 &#96;DocumentOutline&#96;、&#96;Page&#96;、&#96;DesignConfig&#96; 等）。这些结构体应该在您的项目包中定义，并通过 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段存储。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "这样做的好处："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "- ✅ 保持 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的通用性和可复用性"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "1. 在项目包中定义这些业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "2. 使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96;/&#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 或自定义辅助方法访问"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "3. 参考 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 项目的实现作为示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274

            "lineNumber": 275,

          },

            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "- **独立性**: &#96;DigEino&#96; 现在不再依赖 &#96;DigPdf&#96; 的 internal 包，可以安全地在任何 Go 项目中 import。"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Update: WeChat Push Tool Integration\n\n**Date**: 2026-01-15\n**Category**: Feature / Tools\n\n## Summary\nIntegrated a WeChat push notification tool as a reusable component within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to send text messages to WeChat users through WeChat Official Account (服务号) API. The tool includes automatic access token management with caching and refresh capabilities.\n\n## New Features\n- **WeChat Message Sending**: Send text messages to WeChat users via Official Account API\n- **Automatic Token Management**: Access token caching and automatic refresh with file-based persistence\n- **Batch Sending Support**: Send messages to multiple users (configured OpenIDs) or a single user\n- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error handling with detailed failure reasons for each recipient\n- **Configuration-Driven**: Fully configurable through global config with enable/disable toggle\n- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework\n\n## Components Added\n- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;: Type definitions for requests, responses, and API structures\n- &#96;tools/wx/wx_token.go&#96;: Access token management with file-based caching and automatic refresh\n- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;: Core message sending logic with error handling\n- &#96;tools/wx/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory\n- &#96;config/config.go&#96;: Added &#96;WeChatConfig&#96; structure to global configuration\n- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;: Added WeChat configuration section with example values\n\n## Configuration\n\nAdd the following section to your &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nWeChat:\n  Enabled: true                    # Enable/disable WeChat push functionality\n  AppID: \"your_appid\"              # WeChat Official Account AppID\n  AppSecret: \"your_app_secret\"     # WeChat Official Account AppSecret\n  OpenIDs:                         # Default recipient OpenID list\n    - \"openid1\"\n    - \"openid2\"\n  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # Access token storage path\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## How to Use\n\nThe tool is automatically registered in &#96;BaseTools()&#96; if enabled in configuration:",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Update: WeChat Push Tool Integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**Date**: 2026-01-15"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Category**: Feature / Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Integrated a WeChat push notification tool as a reusable component within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to send text messages to WeChat users through WeChat Official Account (服务号) API. The tool includes automatic access token management with caching and refresh capabilities."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## New Features"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **WeChat Message Sending**: Send text messages to WeChat users via Official Account API"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Automatic Token Management**: Access token caching and automatic refresh with file-based persistence"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Batch Sending Support**: Send messages to multiple users (configured OpenIDs) or a single user"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error handling with detailed failure reasons for each recipient"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- **Configuration-Driven**: Fully configurable through global config with enable/disable toggle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "## Components Added"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;: Type definitions for requests, responses, and API structures"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_token.go&#96;: Access token management with file-based caching and automatic refresh"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;: Core message sending logic with error handling"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.go&#96;: Added &#96;WeChatConfig&#96; structure to global configuration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;: Added WeChat configuration section with example values"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "## Configuration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "Add the following section to your &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "WeChat:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  Enabled: true                    # Enable/disable WeChat push functionality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  AppID: \"your_appid\"              # WeChat Official Account AppID"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  AppSecret: \"your_app_secret\"     # WeChat Official Account AppSecret"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  OpenIDs:                         # Default recipient OpenID list"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    - \"openid1\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    - \"openid2\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wechat/access_token.json\"  # Access token storage path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "## How to Use"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "The tool is automatically registered in &#96;BaseTools()&#96; if enabled in configuration:"
          }
        ],
```
