```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func someProcess() {\n    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）\n    store := status.GetDefaultStore()\n    \n    // 创建执行记录\n    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")\n    \n    // 更新状态\n    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{\n        Type: \"node_start\",\n        NodeKey: \"node_1\",\n        Status: \"running\",\n    })\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3.2 Webhook 客户端\n\n用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\nfunc notifyCallback() {\n    // 获取 Webhook 配置\n    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)\n    if webhookCfg == nil {\n        return\n    }\n\n    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)\n    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 4. AgentState 扩展字段\n\n&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。\n\n### 4.1 基本使用\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\"\n\n// 创建 AgentState\nstate := \u0026digeino.AgentState{\n    SessionID: \"session_001\",\n    Query:     \"用户查询\",\n}\n\n// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\nstate.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")\n\n// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）\nstate.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)\n\n// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）\nstate.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)\n\n// 设置任意类型的扩展字段\nstate.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{\n    \"key1\": \"value1\",\n    \"key2\": 123,\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.2 获取扩展字段\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 获取字符串类型\npdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)\n}\n\n// 获取整数类型\npageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 96

            "text": "用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"

            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "import ("

            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\""

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "## 4. AgentState 扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "### 4.1 基本使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "// 创建 AgentState"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "state := \u0026digeino.AgentState{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "    SessionID: \"session_001\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "    Query:     \"用户查询\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "state.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "state.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "// 设置任意类型的扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "state.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    \"key1\": \"value1\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    \"key2\": 123,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "### 4.2 获取扩展字段"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "// 获取字符串类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "pdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "if ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "// 获取整数类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "pageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "if ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "// 获取布尔类型"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 164
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 78
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.239342600107193
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "if ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)\n}\n\n// 获取布尔类型\nisProcessed, ok := state.GetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\")\nif ok {\n    fmt.Printf(\"Is Processed: %v\\n\", isProcessed)\n}\n\n// 获取任意类型\nval, ok := state.GetExtension(\"complex_data\")\nif ok {\n    // 进行类型断言\n    if data, ok := val.(map[string]interface{}); ok {\n        // 使用 data\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4.3 最佳实践\n\n1. **定义扩展键常量**：建议在项目中使用常量定义扩展键，避免硬编码字符串：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在项目根目录或 constants 包中定义\nconst (\n    ExtensionKeyPdfPath = \"pdf_path\"\n    ExtensionKeyCustomField = \"custom_field\"\n)\n\n// 使用\nstate.SetStringExtension(ExtensionKeyPdfPath, \"/path/to/file.pdf\")\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **类型安全**：优先使用类型安全的辅助方法（&#96;GetStringExtension&#96;、&#96;SetStringExtension&#96; 等），而不是直接使用 &#96;GetExtension&#96;。\n\n3. **JSON 序列化**：&#96;Extensions&#96; 字段会被自动序列化到 JSON，使用 &#96;omitempty&#96; 标签，空 map 不会出现在 JSON 中。\n\n### 4.4 存储业务数据结构\n\n对于复杂的业务数据结构（如文档大纲、页面列表等），可以使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96; 和 &#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在您的项目中定义业务结构体\ntype DocumentOutline struct {\n    Title          string        &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;\n    Topic          string        &#96;json:\"topic\"&#96;\n    TargetAudience string        &#96;json:\"target_audience\"&#96;\n    PageOutlines   []PageOutline &#96;json:\"pages\"&#96;\n}\n\n// 设置业务数据\noutline := \u0026DocumentOutline{\n    Title: \"我的文档\",\n    Topic: \"技术文档\",\n}\nstate.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)\n\n// 获取业务数据\nvar outline *DocumentOutline\nerr := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)\nif err != nil {\n    // 处理错误\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**最佳实践**：在项目包中定义业务结构体和类型安全的辅助方法：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 在项目包中（如 DigPdf/eino/types.go）\npackage eino_agent\n\nconst ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\"\n\nfunc GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {\n    ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "if ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "}"
          },

            "lineNumber": 163
          },

            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "// 获取布尔类型"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "isProcessed, ok := state.GetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\")"
          },

            "lineNumber": 166,

            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"Is Processed: %v\\n\", isProcessed)"
          },

            "lineNumber": 168,

          },

            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "val, ok := state.GetExtension(\"complex_data\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    // 进行类型断言"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "    if data, ok := val.(map[string]interface{}); ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        // 使用 data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "### 4.3 最佳实践"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "1. **定义扩展键常量**：建议在项目中使用常量定义扩展键，避免硬编码字符串："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "// 在项目根目录或 constants 包中定义"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "const ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "    ExtensionKeyPdfPath = \"pdf_path\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "    ExtensionKeyCustomField = \"custom_field\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "// 使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(ExtensionKeyPdfPath, \"/path/to/file.pdf\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "2. **类型安全**：优先使用类型安全的辅助方法（&#96;GetStringExtension&#96;、&#96;SetStringExtension&#96; 等），而不是直接使用 &#96;GetExtension&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "3. **JSON 序列化**：&#96;Extensions&#96; 字段会被自动序列化到 JSON，使用 &#96;omitempty&#96; 标签，空 map 不会出现在 JSON 中。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "### 4.4 存储业务数据结构"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "对于复杂的业务数据结构（如文档大纲、页面列表等），可以使用 &#96;GetBusinessData&#96; 和 &#96;SetBusinessData&#96; 方法："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "// 在您的项目中定义业务结构体"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "type DocumentOutline struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    Title          string        &#96;json:\"title\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    Topic          string        &#96;json:\"topic\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    TargetAudience string        &#96;json:\"target_audience\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "    PageOutlines   []PageOutline &#96;json:\"pages\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "// 设置业务数据"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "outline := \u0026DocumentOutline{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    Title: \"我的文档\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    Topic: \"技术文档\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "state.SetBusinessData(\"outline\", outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "// 获取业务数据"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "var outline *DocumentOutline"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "err := state.GetBusinessData(\"outline\", \u0026outline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "    // 处理错误"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "**最佳实践**：在项目包中定义业务结构体和类型安全的辅助方法："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "// 在项目包中（如 DigPdf/eino/types.go）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "package eino_agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "const ExtensionKeyOutline = \"outline\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "func GetOutline(state *digeino.AgentState) (*DocumentOutline, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "- &#96;ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"&#96; - 从环境变量 &#96;QWEN_API_KEY&#96; 读取\n\n## 注意事项\n\n1. **配置加载**：使用 &#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig&#96; 前需要先调用 &#96;config.Load()&#96;\n2. **ChatModel 必需**：Agent 功能需要 ChatModel，可以通过配置或手动传入\n3. **工具注册**：基础工具已自动注册到 &#96;tools.BaseTools()&#96;\n4. **Agent 工具**：可以使用 &#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig&#96; 从配置创建\n5. **数据文件**：&#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96; 包含 100 条推理规则，需要定期同步更新",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "- &#96;ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"&#96; - 从环境变量 &#96;QWEN_API_KEY&#96; 读取"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "## 注意事项"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "1. **配置加载**：使用 &#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig&#96; 前需要先调用 &#96;config.Load()&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "2. **ChatModel 必需**：Agent 功能需要 ChatModel，可以通过配置或手动传入"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "3. **工具注册**：基础工具已自动注册到 &#96;tools.BaseTools()&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "4. **Agent 工具**：可以使用 &#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig&#96; 从配置创建"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "5. **数据文件**：&#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96; 包含 100 条推理规则，需要定期同步更新"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 295
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 286
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package webhook\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n)\n\n// GetWebhookConfig 从全局配置获取 WebhookConfig\nfunc GetWebhookConfig(buildDefaultURL func() string) *config.WebhookConfig {\n\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Webhook\n\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// 这里需要注意，Config 是 WebhookConfig 类型\n\twebhookConfig := \u0026cfg.Config\n\tif webhookConfig.URL == \"\" {\n\t\tif cfg.URL != \"\" {\n\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = cfg.URL\n\t\t} else if buildDefaultURL != nil {\n\t\t\twebhookConfig.URL = buildDefaultURL()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif webhookConfig.Method == \"\" {\n\t\twebhookConfig.Method = \"POST\"\n\t}\n\tif webhookConfig.Timeout == 0 {\n\t\twebhookConfig.Timeout = 5\n\t}\n\tif webhookConfig.RetryCount == 0 {\n\t\twebhookConfig.RetryCount = 3\n\t}\n\tif webhookConfig.RetryDelay == 0 {\n\t\twebhookConfig.RetryDelay = 1000\n\t}\n\n\treturn webhookConfig\n}\n\n// IsStoreEnabled 检查 Store 是否启用\nfunc IsStoreEnabled() bool {\n\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store\n\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// BuildDefaultWebhookURL 构建默认的本地 webhook URL\nfunc BuildDefaultWebhookURL(scheme, host string) string {\n\tif host == \"\" {\n\t\tport := config.Get().HttpServer.Api.Port\n\t\tif port == \"\" {\n\t\t\thost = \"localhost\"\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(port, \":\") {\n\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost\" + port\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost:\" + port\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s/api/v1/webhook/status\", scheme, host)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package webhook"
          },

            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

            "lineNumber": 5,

            "lineNumber": 6

            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""

            "lineNumber": 9

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "// GetWebhookConfig 从全局配置获取 WebhookConfig"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\treturn webhookConfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// IsStoreEnabled 检查 Store 是否启用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func IsStoreEnabled() bool {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\tif cfg.Enabled != nil \u0026\u0026 !*cfg.Enabled {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t\treturn false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\treturn true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "// BuildDefaultWebhookURL 构建默认的本地 webhook URL"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "func BuildDefaultWebhookURL(scheme, host string) string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tif host == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\tport := config.Get().HttpServer.Api.Port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t\tif port == \"\" {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\t\t\thost = \"localhost\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(port, \":\") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost\" + port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t\t\t\thost = \"localhost:\" + port"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s/api/v1/webhook/status\", scheme, host)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 68
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/config.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.22510090470314026

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n)\n\n// AgentState 是在多 Agent 流程中传递的全局状态\n// 注意：业务特定的结构体（如 Outline, Pages, Design 等）应通过 Extensions 字段存储\n// 各个项目可以在自己的包中定义业务结构体，并使用 GetBusinessData/SetBusinessData 方法访问\ntype AgentState struct {\n\tSessionID       string                 &#96;json:\"session_id\"&#96;\n\tQuery           string                 &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;            // 用户的原始需求\n\tStatus          string                 &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;           // 当前状态\n\tResearchSummary string                 &#96;json:\"research_summary\"&#96; // Researcher 节点的输出总结\n\tExtensions      map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"extensions,omitempty\"&#96; // 扩展字段，用于存储项目特定的数据\n\tError           error                  &#96;json:\"error\"&#96;            // 错误信息\n}\n\n// ContextKey 用于在 context 中传递 key\ntype ContextKey string\n\nconst (\n\tCtxKeySessionID ContextKey = \"session_id\"\n)\n\n// GetExtension 获取扩展字段的值\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetExtension(key string) (interface{}, bool) {\n\tif s.Extensions == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\tval, ok := s.Extensions[key]\n\treturn val, ok\n}\n\n// SetExtension 设置扩展字段的值\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetExtension(key string, value interface{}) {\n\tif s.Extensions == nil {\n\t\ts.Extensions = make(map[string]interface{})\n\t}\n\ts.Extensions[key] = value\n}\n\n// GetStringExtension 获取字符串类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetStringExtension(key string) (string, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn \"\", false\n\t}\n\tstr, ok := val.(string)\n\treturn str, ok\n}\n\n// SetStringExtension 设置字符串类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) SetStringExtension(key string, value string) {\n\ts.SetExtension(key, value)\n}\n\n// GetIntExtension 获取整数类型的扩展字段\nfunc (s *AgentState) GetIntExtension(key string) (int, bool) {\n\tval, ok := s.GetExtension(key)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn 0, false\n\t}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package status\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n\n\t\"gorm.io/driver/mysql\"\n\t\"gorm.io/gorm\"\n)\n\n// StatusStore 状态存储接口\ntype StatusStore interface {\n\tCreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord\n\tGetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool)\n\tAddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool\n\tSetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool\n\tListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int)\n}\n\n// ExecutionRecord 执行记录\ntype ExecutionRecord struct {\n\tExecutionID   string\n\tAppName       string\n\tRequestID     string\n\tStartTime     time.Time\n\tEndTime       *time.Time\n\tStatus        string\n\tStatusHistory []webhook.ExecutionStatus\n\tResult        *webhook.Message\n\tError         string\n\tmu            sync.RWMutex\n}\n\n// memoryStatusStore 内存实现\ntype memoryStatusStore struct {\n\tmu         sync.RWMutex\n\texecutions map[string]*ExecutionRecord\n\tmaxRecords int\n}\n\nfunc NewMemoryStatusStore(maxRecords int) StatusStore {\n\treturn \u0026memoryStatusStore{\n\t\texecutions: make(map[string]*ExecutionRecord),\n\t\tmaxRecords: maxRecords,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *memoryStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trecord := \u0026ExecutionRecord{\n\t\tExecutionID:   executionID,\n\t\tAppName:       appName,\n\t\tRequestID:     requestID,\n\t\tStartTime:     time.Now(),\n\t\tStatus:        \"running\",\n\t\tStatusHistory: make([]webhook.ExecutionStatus, 0),\n\t}\n\ts.executions[executionID] = record\n\treturn record\n}\n\nfunc (s *memoryStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]\n\treturn record, exists\n}\n\nfunc (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string,",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tools\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/wx\"\n)\n\n// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误\ntype safeTool struct {\n\ttool.InvokableTool\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {\n\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {\n\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)\n\tif e != nil {\n\t\treturn e.Error(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn out, nil\n}\n\n// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具\nfunc SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {\n\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn safeTool{\n\t\tInvokableTool: t,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集\nfunc BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool\n\n\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具\n\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具\n\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具\n\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）\n\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具\n\treturn tools, nil\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/wx\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "type safeTool struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\ttool.InvokableTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "func (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "func (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tif e != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\treturn e.Error(), nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\treturn out, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "func SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\treturn safeTool{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\tInvokableTool: t,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 72
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.21301589906215668
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package digeino\n\nimport (\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\ntype UserMessage struct {\n\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;\n\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;\n\tHistory []*schema.Message &#96;json:\"history\"&#96;\n}\n\n// ========== Webhook 和 StatusStore 相关类型定义（从 webhook 或 config 包重新导出） ==========\n\n// Usage 使用量统计\ntype Usage = webhook.Usage\n\n// ExecutionStatus 执行状态\ntype ExecutionStatus = webhook.ExecutionStatus\n\n// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态\ntype DataFlowStatus = webhook.DataFlowStatus\n\n// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态\ntype ControlFlowStatus = webhook.ControlFlowStatus\n\n// WebhookConfig Webhook 配置\ntype WebhookConfig = config.WebhookConfig\n\n// WebhookPayload Webhook 请求体\ntype WebhookPayload = webhook.WebhookPayload\n\n// Message 消息（用于 Webhook 和 StatusStore）\ntype Message = webhook.Message",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "package digeino"
          },

            "lineNumber": 2

            "lineNumber": 9

          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "type UserMessage struct {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\tID      string            &#96;json:\"id\"&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\tQuery   string            &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;"

          {
            "lineNumber": 13,

            "lineNumber": 16,

          },

            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "type ControlFlowStatus = webhook.ControlFlowStatus"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    // 其他工具...\n}\n\n// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Agent 工作流\n\nAgent 内部自动执行以下工作流：\n\n1. **分析需求** - 提取产品类型、样式关键词、行业、技术栈\n2. **生成设计系统** - 调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 工具\n3. **补充搜索** - 根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取详细信息\n4. **技术栈指南** - 如果指定了技术栈，获取相关指南\n5. **持久化** - 如果用户请求，调用 &#96;persist_design_system&#96; 保存到文件\n\n## 设计系统生成流程\n\n参考 ui_ux_pro_max 的 \"How Design System Generation Works\"：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n1. 用户请求\n   ↓\n2. 多领域并行搜索（5个领域）\n   - Product type matching (100 categories)\n   - Style recommendations (67 styles)\n   - Color palette selection (96 palettes)\n   - Landing page patterns (24 patterns)\n   - Typography pairing (57 font combinations)\n   ↓\n3. 推理引擎\n   - Match product → UI category rules\n   - Apply style priorities (BM25 ranking)\n   - Filter anti-patterns for industry\n   - Process decision rules (JSON conditions)\n   ↓\n4. 完整设计系统输出\n   - Pattern + Style + Colors + Typography + Effects\n   - Anti-patterns to avoid\n   - Pre-delivery checklist\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 持久化功能\n\n设计系统可以持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndesign-system/\n├── {project-slug}/\n│   ├── MASTER.md           # 全局设计系统\n│   └── pages/\n│       └── {page-name}.md  # 页面特定覆盖\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**层次化检索逻辑**：\n1. 构建页面时，首先检查 &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;\n2. 如果页面文件存在，其规则**覆盖** Master 文件\n3. 如果不存在，使用 &#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96; 的规则\n\n## 推理引擎\n\nAgent 使用 100 条行业特定推理规则（来自 &#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96;），包括：\n\n- SaaS、E-commerce、Healthcare、Fintech 等 100 个行业类别\n- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等\n\n## 示例\n\n### 示例 1：生成设计系统\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    // 其他工具..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "## Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "1. **分析需求** - 提取产品类型、样式关键词、行业、技术栈"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "2. **生成设计系统** - 调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "3. **补充搜索** - 根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取详细信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "4. **技术栈指南** - 如果指定了技术栈，获取相关指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "5. **持久化** - 如果用户请求，调用 &#96;persist_design_system&#96; 保存到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "## 设计系统生成流程"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "参考 ui_ux_pro_max 的 \"How Design System Generation Works\"："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "1. 用户请求"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "2. 多领域并行搜索（5个领域）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "   - Product type matching (100 categories)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "   - Style recommendations (67 styles)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "   - Color palette selection (96 palettes)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "   - Landing page patterns (24 patterns)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "   - Typography pairing (57 font combinations)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "3. 推理引擎"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "   - Match product → UI category rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "   - Apply style priorities (BM25 ranking)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "   - Filter anti-patterns for industry"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "   - Process decision rules (JSON conditions)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "   ↓"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "4. 完整设计系统输出"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "   - Pattern + Style + Colors + Typography + Effects"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "   - Anti-patterns to avoid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "   - Pre-delivery checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "## 持久化功能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "设计系统可以持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "design-system/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "├── {project-slug}/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "│   ├── MASTER.md           # 全局设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "│   └── pages/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "│       └── {page-name}.md  # 页面特定覆盖"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "**层次化检索逻辑**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "1. 构建页面时，首先检查 &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "2. 如果页面文件存在，其规则**覆盖** Master 文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "3. 如果不存在，使用 &#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96; 的规则"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "## 推理引擎"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "Agent 使用 100 条行业特定推理规则（来自 &#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96;），包括："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "- SaaS、E-commerce、Healthcare、Fintech 等 100 个行业类别"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "## 示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "### 示例 1：生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 229
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 158
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.18616795539855957
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n\topenaiModel \"github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai\"\n)\n\n// NewChatModelFromConfig 从配置创建 ChatModel（参考 DigFlow 的配置方式）\n// 根据 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel.Type 选择对应的模型提供商\nfunc NewChatModelFromConfig(ctx context.Context) (model.ChatModel, error) {\n\tcfg := config.Get()\n\tchatModelCfg := cfg.ChatModel\n\n\t// 处理环境变量（参考 DigFlow 的 processEnvVars）\n\tprocessedConfig := processEnvVars(chatModelCfg.Config)\n\n\tswitch strings.ToLower(chatModelCfg.Type) {\n\tcase \"qwen\":\n\t\treturn newQwenModel(ctx, processedConfig)\n\tcase \"openai\":\n\t\treturn newOpenAIModel(ctx, processedConfig)\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"unsupported chat model type: %s. Supported: qwen, openai\", chatModelCfg.Type)\n\t}\n}\n\n// processEnvVars 处理环境变量（参考 DigFlow 的实现）\n// 支持 ${VAR_NAME} 格式的环境变量替换\nfunc processEnvVars(config map[string]interface{}) map[string]interface{} {\n\tresult := make(map[string]interface{})\n\n\tfor k, v := range config {\n\t\tif str, ok := v.(string); ok {\n\t\t\t// 如果是环境变量格式 ${VAR_NAME}\n\t\t\tif len(str) \u003e 3 \u0026\u0026 str[:2] == \"${\" \u0026\u0026 str[len(str)-1:] == \"}\" {\n\t\t\t\tenvKey := str[2 : len(str)-1]\n\t\t\t\tif envVal := os.Getenv(envKey); envVal != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tresult[k] = envVal\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tresult[k] = str\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tresult[k] = v\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tresult[k] = v\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// getString 获取字符串配置值\nfunc getString(config map[string]interface{}, key string, defaultValue string) string {\n\tif val, ok := config[key]; ok {\n\t\tif str, ok := val.(string); ok {\n\t\t\treturn str\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn defaultValue\n}\n\n// getFloat32Ptr 获取 float32 指针配置值\nfunc getFloat32Ptr(config map[string]interface{}, key string, defaultValue float32) *float32 {\n\tif val, ok := config[key]; ok",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {\n\tID           uint32 &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;\n\tExecutionID  string &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;index\"&#96;\n\tType         string &#96;gorm:\"column:type;size:32;not null\"&#96;\n\tTimestampMs  int64  &#96;gorm:\"column:timestamp_ms;not null\"&#96;\n\tNodeKey      string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_key;size:100\"&#96;\n\tNodeType     string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_type;size:50\"&#96;\n\tStatus       string &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;\n\tError        string &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;\n\tAppName      string &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;\n\tRequestID    string &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;\n\tDataFlowJSON string &#96;gorm:\"column:data_flow;type:text\"&#96;\n\tControlJSON  string &#96;gorm:\"column:control_flow;type:text\"&#96;\n\tCreatedAt    time.Time\n}\n\ntype mysqlStatusStore struct {\n\tdb          *gorm.DB\n\texecTable   string\n\tstatusTable string\n}\n\nfunc NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg config.StatusStoreConfig) (StatusStore, error) {\n\tdsn := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s@tcp(%s:%d)/%s?charset=utf8mb4\u0026parseTime=True\u0026loc=Local\",\n\t\tcfg.MySQL.User, cfg.MySQL.Password, cfg.MySQL.Host, cfg.MySQL.Port, cfg.MySQL.Database)\n\n\tdb, err := gorm.Open(mysql.Open(dsn), \u0026gorm.Config{})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026mysqlStatusStore{\n\t\tdb:          db,\n\t\texecTable:   cfg.MySQL.ExecTable,\n\t\tstatusTable: cfg.MySQL.StatusTable,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tmodel := \u0026MySQLExecutionModel{\n\t\tExecutionID: executionID,\n\t\tAppName:     appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   requestID,\n\t\tStartTime:   now,\n\t\tStatus:      \"running\",\n\t}\n\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Create(model)\n\treturn \u0026ExecutionRecord{\n\t\tExecutionID: executionID,\n\t\tAppName:     appName,\n\t\tRequestID:   requestID,\n\t\tStartTime:   now,\n\t\tStatus:      \"running\",\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int) {\n\tvar models []MySQLExecutionModel\n\tvar total int64\n\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Count(\u0026total)\n\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Offset((page - 1) * pageSize).Limit(pageSize).Find(\u0026models)\n\n\trecords := make([]*ExecutionRecord, 0, len(models))\n\tfor _, m := range models {\n\t\trecords = append(records, \u0026ExecutionRecord{\n\t\t\tExecutionID: m.ExecutionID,\n\t\t\tAppName:     m.AppName,\n\t\t\tRequestID:   m.RequestID,\n\t\t\tStartTime:   m.StartTime,\n\t\t\tEndTime:     m.EndTime,\n\t\t\tStatus:      m.Status,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\treturn records, int(total)\n}\n\nfunc GetDefaultStore() StatusStore {\n\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store\n\tif cfg.Type == \"memory\" {\n\t\treturn NewMemoryStatusStore(1000)\n\t}\n\tstore, _ := NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg)\n\treturn store\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"persist_design_system\",\n\t\t\"将设计系统持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式。会创建 design-system/{project}/MASTER.md 和可选的 pages/{page}.md 文件。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *PersistDesignSystemRequest) (*PersistDesignSystemResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"project_name is required\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 生成设计系统\n\t\t\tds, err := service.GenerateDesignSystem(req.Query, req.ProjectName)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate design system: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 持久化\n\t\t\tmanager := NewPersistenceManager(req.BaseDir)\n\t\t\tprojectSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.ProjectName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tif err := manager.PersistDesignSystem(ds, projectSlug, req.PageName); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to persist design system: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresponse := \u0026PersistDesignSystemResponse{\n\t\t\t\tSuccess:     true,\n\t\t\t\tProjectSlug: projectSlug,\n\t\t\t\tMasterFile:  fmt.Sprintf(\"design-system/%s/MASTER.md\", projectSlug),\n\t\t\t\tMessage:     fmt.Sprintf(\"Design system persisted successfully for project '%s'\", req.ProjectName),\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tpageSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.PageName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\tresponse.PageFile = fmt.Sprintf(\"design-system/%s/pages/%s.md\", projectSlug, pageSlug)\n\t\t\t\tresponse.Message += fmt.Sprintf(\" with page override '%s'\", req.PageName)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn response, nil\n\t\t})\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

代码已更新。总结如下：

## 完成的改进

### 1. **配置化存储路径**
- 在 `config.yaml` 中添加了 `UIUX.Storage.BaseDir` 配置
- 默认路径：`storage/app/ui_ux`
- 支持在配置文件中统一管理存储路径

### 2. **应用/Agent 隔离**
- 添加了 `AppName` 参数，用于隔离不同应用的存储
- 存储结构：
  - 未指定 AppName: `{BaseDir}/design-system/{project}/MASTER.md`
  - 指定 AppName: `{BaseDir}/{app-name}/design-system/{project}/MASTER.md`

### 3. **路径优先级**
1. 调用时指定的 `BaseDir`（最高优先级）
2. 配置文件中的 `UIUX.Storage.BaseDir`
3. 默认值 `storage/app/ui_ux`

### 4. **使用示例**

**默认存储**（所有应用共享）：
```go
persistTool.Invoke(ctx, &ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{
    Query:       "beauty spa",
    ProjectName: "Serenity Spa",
})
// 存储到: storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/serenity-spa/MASTER.md
```

**应用隔离存储**（推荐用于多应用场景）：
```go
// Travel Agent
persistTool.Invoke(ctx, &ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{
    Query:       "travel booking",
    ProjectName: "TravelApp",
    AppName:     "travel",  // 隔离
})
// 存储到: storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/travelapp/MASTER.md

// Stock Agent
persistTool.Invoke(ctx, &ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{
    Query:       "stock analysis",
    ProjectName: "StockApp",
    AppName:     "stock",  // 隔离
})
// 存储到: storage/app/ui_ux/stock/design-system/stockapp/MASTER.md
```

### 5. **配置示例**

```yaml
UIUX:
  Storage:
    BaseDir: "storage/app/ui_ux"     # 可自定义
```

## 优势

1. 配置化管理：统一在配置文件中管理存储路径
2. 应用隔离：不同应用/agent 的设计系统互不干扰
3. 灵活覆盖：支持在调用时自定义路径
4. 向后兼容：未指定 AppName 时行为与之前一致

现在不同 agent 或应用调用 UI/UX 工具时，可以通过 `AppName` 参数实现存储隔离，避免冲突。

---

_**User**_

现在这个ui_ux工具和之前的版本有什么样的改进？

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="semantic_search_full">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **semantic_search_full**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "explanation": "",
  "query": "What was the original ui_ux_search tool implementation? What features did it have before the design system generation?",
  "topK": 10
}
```
Result:

```json
{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# UI/UX Design System Agent\n\n基于 ui_ux_pro_max v2.0 的设计系统生成 Agent，支持完整的工作流编排和工具调用。\n\n## 功能特性\n\n### 1. 核心工具\n\n- **&#96;ui_ux_search&#96;**: 搜索 UI/UX 设计知识库\n- **&#96;generate_design_system&#96;**: 生成完整设计系统（包含推理引擎）\n- **&#96;persist_design_system&#96;**: 持久化设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）\n\n### 2. Agent 编排\n\n- **&#96;UIDesignSystemAgent&#96;**: 智能编排的 Agent，自动完成设计系统生成工作流\n- **&#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool&#96;**: 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用\n\n## 使用方法\n\n### 方式一：直接使用工具\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n)\n\n// 1. 搜索工具\nsearchTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n// 使用 searchTool...\n\n// 2. 生成设计系统\ndesignSystemTool, _ := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n// 使用 designSystemTool...\n\n// 3. 持久化设计系统\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n// 使用 persistTool...\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 方式二：使用 Agent（推荐）\n\n**方式 2a：从配置创建（最简单，推荐）**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n)\n\n// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）\n_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 2. 从配置创建 Agent（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）\nagent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 3. 调用 Agent\nresult, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\nfmt.Println(result.Content)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**方式 2b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# UI/UX Design System Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "基于 ui_ux_pro_max v2.0 的设计系统生成 Agent，支持完整的工作流编排和工具调用。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 功能特性"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "### 1. 核心工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "- **&#96;ui_ux_search&#96;**: 搜索 UI/UX 设计知识库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **&#96;generate_design_system&#96;**: 生成完整设计系统（包含推理引擎）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **&#96;persist_design_system&#96;**: 持久化设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "### 2. Agent 编排"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **&#96;UIDesignSystemAgent&#96;**: 智能编排的 Agent，自动完成设计系统生成工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **&#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool&#96;**: 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "## 使用方法"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "### 方式一：直接使用工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "// 1. 搜索工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "searchTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "// 使用 searchTool..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "// 2. 生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "designSystemTool, _ := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "// 使用 designSystemTool..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "// 3. 持久化设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "persistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "// 使用 persistTool..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "### 方式二：使用 Agent（推荐）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "**方式 2a：从配置创建（最简单，推荐）**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "// 2. 从配置创建 Agent（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "agent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "// 3. 调用 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "result, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "if err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    return err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "fmt.Println(result.Content)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "**方式 2b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    \"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 78
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"ui_ux_search\", \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库，包括样式指南(style)、配色方案(color)、字体排版(typography)、交互原则(ux)、落地页模式(landing)等。支持按技术栈(stack)过滤，如 react, tailwind 等。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIUXSearchRequest) (*UIUXSearchResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.MaxResults \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\t\treq.MaxResults = 5\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar res *SearchResult\n\t\t\tvar err error\n\n\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tres, err = service.SearchStack(req.Query, req.Stack, req.MaxResults)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tres, err = service.Search(req.Query, req.Domain, req.MaxResults)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Format results as a readable string for the LLM\n\t\t\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"检索结果 (领域: %s, 原始查询: %s):\\n\\n\", res.Domain, res.Query))\n\t\t\tfor i, r := range res.Results {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"--- 建议 %d ---\\n\", i+1))\n\t\t\t\tfor k, v := range r {\n\t\t\t\t\tif v != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s: %s\\n\", k, v))\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn \u0026UIUXSearchResponse{Result: sb.String()}, nil\n\t\t})\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystemRequest 设计系统生成请求\ntype GenerateDesignSystemRequest struct {\n\tQuery       string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=用户需求描述，如 'beauty spa wellness service'\"&#96;\n\tProjectName string &#96;json:\"project_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=项目名称，如 'Serenity Spa'\"&#96;\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystemResponse 设计系统生成响应\ntype GenerateDesignSystemResponse struct {\n\tDesignSystem string &#96;json:\"design_system\"&#96; // 设计系统的格式化输出\n}\n\n// NewGenerateDesignSystemTool 创建设计系统生成工具\nfunc NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration\n\n**Date**: 2026-01-11\n**Category**: Feature / Tools\n\n## Summary\nIntegrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles.\n\n## New Features\n- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge.\n- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;.\n- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\").\n- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.).\n- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework.\n\n## Components Added\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory.\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts.\n\n## How to Use\nImport the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n\n// ... \n\nuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\nif err == nil {\n    tools = append(tools, uiTool)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Impact\nThis update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management.",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "**Date**: 2026-01-11"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "**Category**: Feature / Tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "Integrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "## New Features"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\")."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Components Added"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## How to Use"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "Import the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "// ... "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "uiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "if err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    tools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "## Impact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "This update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management."
          }
        ],
```
