    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package tools\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/wx\"\n)\n\n// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误\ntype safeTool struct {\n\ttool.InvokableTool\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {\n\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)\n}\n\nfunc (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {\n\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)\n\tif e != nil {\n\t\treturn e.Error(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn out, nil\n}\n\n// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具\nfunc SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {\n\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn safeTool{\n\t\tInvokableTool: t,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集\nfunc BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool\n\n\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具\n\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具\n\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具\n\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）\n\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具\n\treturn tools, nil\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package tools"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\t\"context\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/wx\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": ")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "// safeTool 安全的工具包装器，用于处理错误"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "type safeTool struct {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\ttool.InvokableTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "func (s safeTool) Info(ctx context.Context) (*schema.ToolInfo, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\treturn s.InvokableTool.Info(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "func (s safeTool) InvokableRun(ctx context.Context, argumentsInJSON string, opts ...tool.Option) (string, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\tout, e := s.InvokableTool.InvokableRun(ctx, argumentsInJSON, opts...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tif e != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\t\treturn e.Error(), nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\treturn out, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "// SafeInferTool 安全地创建工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "func SafeInferTool[T, D any](toolName, toolDesc string, i utils.InvokeFunc[T, D]) (tool.InvokableTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\tt, err := utils.InferTool(toolName, toolDesc, i)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\treturn safeTool{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\t\tInvokableTool: t,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\t}, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// BaseTools 获取 digeino 提供的通用基础工具集"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"\n)\n\n// UIDesignSystemAgent UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent\n// 这是一个编排的 Agent，内部使用工具来完成设计系统生成工作流\ntype UIDesignSystemAgent struct {\n\tagent compose.Runnable[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgent 创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent\n// 需要传入 ChatModel，Agent 内部会使用工具进行工作流编排\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {\n\t// 准备工具集\n\tallTools := []tool.BaseTool{}\n\n\t// 1. UI/UX 搜索工具\n\tsearchTool, err := NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tallTools = append(allTools, searchTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 2. 设计系统生成工具\n\tdesignSystemTool, err := NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tallTools = append(allTools, designSystemTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 3. 持久化工具\n\tpersistTool, err := NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tallTools = append(allTools, persistTool)\n\t}\n\n\t// 4. 添加外部传入的额外工具（如其他项目工具）\n\tallTools = append(allTools, additionalTools...)\n\n\t// 绑定工具到模型\n\ttoolInfos := make([]*schema.ToolInfo, 0, len(allTools))\n\tfor _, t := range allTools {\n\t\tif info, err := t.Info(ctx); err == nil {\n\t\t\ttoolInfos = append(toolInfos, info)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif err := chatModel.BindTools(toolInfos); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to bind tools: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 创建工具执行节点\n\ttoolNode, err := compose.NewToolNode(ctx, \u0026compose.ToolsNodeConfig{\n\t\tTools: allTools,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create tool node: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 创建 Agent Lambda 节点（手动调用模型和工具）\n\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {\n\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n)\n\n// UIUXSearchRequest defines the input parameters for the UI/UX search tool.\ntype UIUXSearchRequest struct {\n\tQuery      string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=检索关键词，如 'minimalism color palette' 或 'dashboard layout'\"&#96;\n\tDomain     string &#96;json:\"domain,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=检索领域，可选值: style, color, chart, landing, product, prompt, ux, typography. 不填则自动检测\"&#96;\n\tStack      string &#96;json:\"stack,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=特定技术栈，如 react, tailwind, swiftui 等\"&#96;\n\tMaxResults int    &#96;json:\"max_results,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=最大返回结果数，默认 5,default=5\"&#96;\n}\n\n// UIUXSearchResponse defines the output format for the UI/UX search tool.\ntype UIUXSearchResponse struct {\n\tResult string &#96;json:\"result\"&#96;\n}\n\n// NewUIUXSearchTool creates a new Eino tool for UI/UX design intelligence.\nfunc NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool",

            "text": "\tQuery      string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=检索关键词，如 'minimalism color palette' 或 'dashboard layout'\"&#96;"
          },

            "text": "\tDomain     string &#96;json:\"domain,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=检索领域，可选值: style, color, chart, landing, product, prompt, ux, typography. 不填则自动检测\"&#96;"

            "text": "\tMaxResults int    &#96;json:\"max_results,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=最大返回结果数，默认 5,default=5\"&#96;"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent\n// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx context.Context, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {\n\tchatModel, err := NewChatModelFromConfig(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create chat model from config: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)\n}\n\n// Invoke 执行 Agent 工作流\nfunc (a *UIDesignSystemAgent) Invoke(ctx context.Context, query string) (*schema.Message, error) {\n\tmessages := []*schema.Message{\n\t\tschema.UserMessage(query),\n\t}\n\n\treturn a.agent.Invoke(ctx, messages)\n}\n\n// getSystemPrompt 获取系统提示词\nfunc getSystemPrompt() string {\n\treturn &#96;You are a UI/UX Design System Generator Agent. Your task is to help users generate complete design systems for their projects.\n\nWorkflow:\n1. **Analyze Requirements**: Extract key information from user request:\n   - Product type (SaaS, e-commerce, portfolio, dashboard, landing page, etc.)\n   - Style keywords (minimal, playful, professional, elegant, dark mode, etc.)\n   - Industry (healthcare, fintech, gaming, education, etc.)\n   - Stack (React, Vue, Next.js, or default to html-tailwind)\n\n2. **Generate Design System** (REQUIRED): Always start by calling generate_design_system tool with:\n   - query: User's product description and requirements\n   - project_name: Project name if provided\n\n3. **Supplement with Detailed Searches** (if needed): After getting the design system, use ui_ux_search tool to get additional details:\n   - More style options: domain=\"style\"\n   - Chart recommendations: domain=\"chart\"\n   - UX best practices: domain=\"ux\"\n   - Alternative fonts: domain=\"typography\"\n   - Landing structure: domain=\"landing\"\n\n4. **Stack Guidelines** (if stack specified): Use ui_ux_search with stack parameter to get implementation-specific best practices.\n\n5. **Persist Design System** (if requested): If user wants to save the design system, call persist_design_system tool.\n\nAlways provide comprehensive, actionable design system recommendations based on the generated results.&#96;\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx context.Context, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\tchatModel, err := NewChatModelFromConfig(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\tif err != nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create chat model from config: %w\", err)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\treturn NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "// Invoke 执行 Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "func (a *UIDesignSystemAgent) Invoke(ctx context.Context, query string) (*schema.Message, error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "\tmessages := []*schema.Message{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\t\tschema.UserMessage(query),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\treturn a.agent.Invoke(ctx, messages)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "// getSystemPrompt 获取系统提示词"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "func getSystemPrompt() string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\treturn &#96;You are a UI/UX Design System Generator Agent. Your task is to help users generate complete design systems for their projects."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "Workflow:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "1. **Analyze Requirements**: Extract key information from user request:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "   - Product type (SaaS, e-commerce, portfolio, dashboard, landing page, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "   - Style keywords (minimal, playful, professional, elegant, dark mode, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "   - Industry (healthcare, fintech, gaming, education, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "   - Stack (React, Vue, Next.js, or default to html-tailwind)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "2. **Generate Design System** (REQUIRED): Always start by calling generate_design_system tool with:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "   - query: User's product description and requirements"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "   - project_name: Project name if provided"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "3. **Supplement with Detailed Searches** (if needed): After getting the design system, use ui_ux_search tool to get additional details:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "   - More style options: domain=\"style\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "   - Chart recommendations: domain=\"chart\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "   - UX best practices: domain=\"ux\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "   - Alternative fonts: domain=\"typography\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "   - Landing structure: domain=\"landing\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "4. **Stack Guidelines** (if stack specified): Use ui_ux_search with stack parameter to get implementation-specific best practices."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "5. **Persist Design System** (if requested): If user wants to save the design system, call persist_design_system tool."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "Always provide comprehensive, actionable design system recommendations based on the generated results.&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 175
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 126
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent.go",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.3706904947757721
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    // 其他工具...\n}\n\n// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Agent 工作流\n\nAgent 内部自动执行以下工作流：\n\n1. **分析需求** - 提取产品类型、样式关键词、行业、技术栈\n2. **生成设计系统** - 调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 工具\n3. **补充搜索** - 根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取详细信息\n4. **技术栈指南** - 如果指定了技术栈，获取相关指南\n5. **持久化** - 如果用户请求，调用 &#96;persist_design_system&#96; 保存到文件\n\n## 设计系统生成流程\n\n参考 ui_ux_pro_max 的 \"How Design System Generation Works\"：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n1. 用户请求\n   ↓\n2. 多领域并行搜索（5个领域）\n   - Product type matching (100 categories)\n   - Style recommendations (67 styles)\n   - Color palette selection (96 palettes)\n   - Landing page patterns (24 patterns)\n   - Typography pairing (57 font combinations)\n   ↓\n3. 推理引擎\n   - Match product → UI category rules\n   - Apply style priorities (BM25 ranking)\n   - Filter anti-patterns for industry\n   - Process decision rules (JSON conditions)\n   ↓\n4. 完整设计系统输出\n   - Pattern + Style + Colors + Typography + Effects\n   - Anti-patterns to avoid\n   - Pre-delivery checklist\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 持久化功能\n\n设计系统可以持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式。\n\n### 存储结构\n\n**默认存储路径**（未指定 AppName）：\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n{BaseDir}/design-system/{project-slug}/\n├── MASTER.md           # 全局设计系统\n└── pages/\n    └── {page-name}.md  # 页面特定覆盖\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**应用隔离存储路径**（指定 AppName）：\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n{BaseDir}/{app-name}/design-system/{project-slug}/\n├── MASTER.md           # 全局设计系统\n└── pages/\n    └── {page-name}.md  # 页面特定覆盖\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**配置说明**：\n- &#96;BaseDir&#96; 默认从 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 的 &#96;UIUX.Storage.BaseDir&#96; 读取，默认为 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux&#96;\n- &#96;AppName&#96; 用于隔离不同应用/agent 的存储，避免冲突\n- 如果未指定 &#96;AppName&#96;，所有应用共享同一存储空间",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    // 其他工具..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "## Agent 工作流"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "1. **分析需求** - 提取产品类型、样式关键词、行业、技术栈"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "2. **生成设计系统** - 调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 工具"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "3. **补充搜索** - 根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取详细信息"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "4. **技术栈指南** - 如果指定了技术栈，获取相关指南"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "5. **持久化** - 如果用户请求，调用 &#96;persist_design_system&#96; 保存到文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "## 设计系统生成流程"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "参考 ui_ux_pro_max 的 \"How Design System Generation Works\"："
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "   - Product type matching (100 categories)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,

            "text": "   - Landing page patterns (24 patterns)"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "3. 推理引擎"

          },

            "text": "4. 完整设计系统输出"
          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *UIUXService) Search(query string, domain string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tif domain == \"\" {\n\t\tdomain = DetectDomain(query)\n\t}\n\n\tconfig, ok := CSVConfigs[domain]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tconfig = CSVConfigs[\"style\"]\n\t\tdomain = \"style\"\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := s.loadCSV(config.File)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to load csv %s: %w\", config.File, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdocuments := make([]string, len(data))\n\tfor i, row := range data {\n\t\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\t\tfor _, col := range config.SearchCols {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(row[col])\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(\" \")\n\t\t}\n\t\tdocuments[i] = builder.String()\n\t}\n\n\tbm25 := NewBM25(1.5, 0.75)\n\tbm25.Fit(documents)\n\tranked := bm25.Score(query)\n\n\tsort.Slice(ranked, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn ranked[i].Score \u003e ranked[j].Score\n\t})\n\n\tvar finalResults []map[string]string\n\tfor i := 0; i \u003c len(ranked) \u0026\u0026 len(finalResults) \u003c maxResults; i++ {\n\t\tif ranked[i].Score \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\torigRow := data[ranked[i].Index]\n\t\t\tfilteredRow := make(map[string]string)\n\t\t\tfor _, col := range config.OutputCols {\n\t\t\t\tif val, ok := origRow[col]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tfilteredRow[col] = val\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfinalResults = append(finalResults, filteredRow)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026SearchResult{\n\t\tDomain:  domain,\n\t\tQuery:   query,\n\t\tFile:    config.File,\n\t\tCount:   len(finalResults),\n\t\tResults: finalResults,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// SearchStack performs a BM25 search for technology-specific design guidelines\nfunc (s *UIUXService) SearchStack(query string, stack string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tfilename, ok := StackConfigs[stack]",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *UIUXService) SearchStack(query string, stack string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tfilename, ok := StackConfigs[stack]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"unknown stack: %s\", stack)\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := s.loadCSV(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to load stack csv %s: %w\", filename, err)\n\t}\n\n\tdocuments := make([]string, len(data))\n\tfor i, row := range data {\n\t\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\t\tfor _, col := range StackCols.SearchCols {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(row[col])\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteString(\" \")\n\t\t}\n\t\tdocuments[i] = builder.String()\n\t}\n\n\tbm25 := NewBM25(1.5, 0.75)\n\tbm25.Fit(documents)\n\tranked := bm25.Score(query)\n\n\tsort.Slice(ranked, func(i, j int) bool {\n\t\treturn ranked[i].Score \u003e ranked[j].Score\n\t})\n\n\tvar finalResults []map[string]string\n\tfor i := 0; i \u003c len(ranked) \u0026\u0026 len(finalResults) \u003c maxResults; i++ {\n\t\tif ranked[i].Score \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\torigRow := data[ranked[i].Index]\n\t\t\tfilteredRow := make(map[string]string)\n\t\t\tfor _, col := range StackCols.OutputCols {\n\t\t\t\tif val, ok := origRow[col]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tfilteredRow[col] = val\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfinalResults = append(finalResults, filteredRow)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026SearchResult{\n\t\tDomain:  \"stack\",\n\t\tQuery:   query,\n\t\tFile:    filename,\n\t\tCount:   len(finalResults),\n\t\tResults: finalResults,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystem 生成完整设计系统\nfunc (s *UIUXService) GenerateDesignSystem(query string, projectName string) (*DesignSystem, error) {\n\tgenerator, err := NewDesignSystemGenerator()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn generator.GenerateDesignSystem(query, projectName)\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\t// 创建 Agent 实例\n\tagentInstance, err := NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create UI design system agent: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// 将 Agent 包装成工具\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\n\t\t\"generate_ui_design_system\",\n\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。这是一个智能编排的 Agent，会自动分析需求、生成设计系统、补充搜索并获取技术栈指南。如果需要持久化，可以设置 persist=true。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest) (*UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse, error) {\n\t\t\t// 构建查询字符串\n\t\t\tqueryParts := []string{req.Query}\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"项目名称: %s\", req.ProjectName))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"技术栈: %s\", req.Stack))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif req.Persist {\n\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, \"请持久化设计系统\")\n\t\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"页面名称: %s\", req.PageName))\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tquery := fmt.Sprintf(\"生成设计系统：%s\", strings.Join(queryParts, \"，\"))\n\n\t\t\t// 调用 Agent 执行完整工作流\n\t\t\tresult, err := agentInstance.Invoke(ctx, query)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"agent execution failed: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 解析 Agent 返回的结果\n\t\t\tresponse := \u0026UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse{\n\t\t\t\tDesignSystem: result.Content,\n\t\t\t\tMessage:      \"Design system generated successfully\",\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif req.Persist {\n\t\t\t\tresponse.Message += \" and persisted to design-system/ directory\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn response, nil\n\t\t},\n\t)\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig 从配置创建 Agent 工具（便捷方法）\n// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (g *DesignSystemGenerator) GenerateDesignSystem(query string, projectName string) (*DesignSystem, error) {\n\t// Step 1: 搜索 product 领域获取产品类型\n\tproductResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"product\", 1)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search product: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tcategory := \"General\"\n\tif len(productResult.Results) \u003e 0 {\n\t\tcategory = productResult.Results[0][\"Product Type\"]\n\t}\n\n\t// Step 2: 获取推理规则\n\treasoning := g.reasoning.FindRule(category)\n\tstylePriority := reasoning.StylePriority\n\n\t// Step 3: 多领域并行搜索\n\tstyleResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"style\", 3)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search style: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tcolorResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"color\", 2)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search color: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\ttypographyResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"typography\", 2)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search typography: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tlandingResult, err := g.service.Search(query, \"landing\", 2)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to search landing: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Step 4: 选择最佳匹配\n\tbestStyle := g.selectBestStyleMatch(styleResult.Results, stylePriority)\n\tbestColor := g.selectBestMatch(colorResult.Results, nil)\n\tbestTypography := g.selectBestMatch(typographyResult.Results, nil)\n\tbestLanding := g.selectBestMatch(landingResult.Results, nil)\n\n\t// Step 5: 构建设计系统\n\tstyleEffects := bestStyle[\"Effects \u0026 Animation\"]\n\tif styleEffects == \"\" {\n\t\tstyleEffects = reasoning.KeyEffects\n\t}\n\n\tds := \u0026DesignSystem{\n\t\tProjectName:  projectName,\n\t\tCategory:     category,",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"\n)\n\n// UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest Agent 工具请求\ntype UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest struct {\n\tQuery       string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"description=用户需求描述，如 'beauty spa wellness service'\"&#96;\n\tProjectName string &#96;json:\"project_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=项目名称，如 'Serenity Spa'\"&#96;\n\tStack       string &#96;json:\"stack,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=技术栈，如 'react', 'tailwind' 等\"&#96;\n\tPersist     bool   &#96;json:\"persist,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=是否持久化设计系统\"&#96;\n\tPageName    string &#96;json:\"page_name,omitempty\" jsonschema:\"description=页面名称，用于生成页面特定覆盖\"&#96;\n}\n\n// UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse Agent 工具响应\ntype UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse struct {\n\tDesignSystem string &#96;json:\"design_system\"&#96; // 设计系统的完整输出\n\tMessage      string &#96;json:\"message\"&#96;       // 附加消息\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用\n// 注意：需要传入 ChatModel，因为 Agent 需要 LLM 来决策工作流\n// additionalTools: 可选的额外工具，用于扩展 Agent 能力\nfunc NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\t// 创建 Agent 实例\n\tagentInstance, err :=",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "type UIUXService struct{}\n\n// NewUIUXService creates a new UIUXService using embedded data\nfunc NewUIUXService() *UIUXService {\n\treturn \u0026UIUXService{}\n}\n\nfunc (s *UIUXService) loadCSV(filename string) ([]map[string]string, error) {\n\tf, err := designData.Open(filename)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tdefer f.Close()\n\n\treader := csv.NewReader(f)\n\theaders, err := reader.Read()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar results []map[string]string\n\tfor {\n\t\trow, err := reader.Read()\n\t\tif err == io.EOF {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\titem := make(map[string]string)\n\t\tfor i, h := range headers {\n\t\t\tif i \u003c len(row) {\n\t\t\t\titem[h] = row[i]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults = append(results, item)\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\n// SearchResult represents the output of a design intelligence search\ntype SearchResult struct {\n\tDomain  string              &#96;json:\"domain\"&#96;\n\tQuery   string              &#96;json:\"query\"&#96;\n\tFile    string              &#96;json:\"file\"&#96;\n\tCount   int                 &#96;json:\"count\"&#96;\n\tResults []map[string]string &#96;json:\"results\"&#96;\n}\n\n// Search performs a BM25 search across design domains\nfunc (s *UIUXService) Search(query string, domain string, maxResults int) (*SearchResult, error) {\n\tif domain == \"\" {\n\t\tdomain = DetectDomain(query)\n\t}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"encoding/csv\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n//go:embed data/*.csv data/stacks/*.csv\nvar designData embed.FS\n\n// CSVConfigEntry defines the configuration for each design domain\ntype CSVConfigEntry struct {\n\tFile       string\n\tSearchCols []string\n\tOutputCols []string\n}\n\n// CSVConfigs maps domain keys to their respective CSV configurations\nvar CSVConfigs = map[string]CSVConfigEntry{\n\t\"style\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/styles.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Type\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Colors\", \"Effects \u0026 Animation\", \"Best For\", \"Performance\", \"Accessibility\", \"Framework Compatibility\", \"Complexity\"},\n\t},\n\t\"prompt\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/prompts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\", \"Implementation Checklist\"},\n\t},\n\t\"color\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/colors.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary (Hex)\", \"Secondary (Hex)\", \"CTA (Hex)\", \"Background (Hex)\", \"Text (Hex)\", \"Border (Hex)\", \"Notes\"},\n\t},\n\t\"chart\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/charts.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Accessibility Notes\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Secondary Options\", \"Color Guidance\", \"Accessibility Notes\", \"Library Recommendation\", \"Interactive Level\"},\n\t},\n\t\"landing\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/landing.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Conversion Optimization\", \"Section Order\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Section Order\", \"Primary CTA Placement\", \"Color Strategy\", \"Conversion Optimization\"},\n\t},\n\t\"product\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/products.csv\",",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {\n\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）\n\t\tmessages := []*schema.Message{\n\t\t\tschema.SystemMessage(getSystemPrompt()),\n\t\t}\n\t\tmessages = append(messages, input...)\n\n\t\t// 调用模型生成\n\t\toutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate failed: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// 如果有工具调用，执行工具\n\t\tif len(output.ToolCalls) \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\t// 执行工具（工具节点接受单个消息，返回消息数组）\n\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, output)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 将工具结果添加到消息列表，再次调用模型\n\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, output)\n\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)\n\n\t\t\t// 再次调用模型处理工具结果（可能需要多轮工具调用）\n\t\t\tfor {\n\t\t\t\tfinalOutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate after tools failed: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// 如果还有工具调用，继续执行\n\t\t\t\tif len(finalOutput.ToolCalls) \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, finalOutput)\n\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, finalOutput)\n\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\treturn finalOutput, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn output, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// 创建 Graph 工作流\n\tgraph := compose.NewGraph[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]()\n\t_ = graph.AddLambdaNode(\"ui_design_system_agent\", compose.InvokableLambda(agentLambda))\n\n\t// 编译 Graph 为 Runnable\n\tcompiledGraph, err := graph.Compile(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to compile graph: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026UIDesignSystemAgent{agent: compiledGraph}, nil\n}\n\n// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\t\tmessages := []*schema.Message{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\t\t\tschema.SystemMessage(getSystemPrompt()),"

            "lineNumber": 71,

        "contents": "\t\"product\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/products.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Style Recommendation\", \"Key Considerations\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Style Recommendation\", \"Secondary Styles\", \"Landing Page Pattern\", \"Dashboard Style (if applicable)\", \"Color Palette Focus\"},\n\t},\n\t\"ux\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/ux-guidelines.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Category\", \"Issue\", \"Description\", \"Platform\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Category\", \"Issue\", \"Platform\", \"Description\", \"Do\", \"Don't\", \"Code Example Good\", \"Code Example Bad\", \"Severity\"},\n\t},\n\t\"typography\": {\n\t\tFile:       \"data/typography.csv\",\n\t\tSearchCols: []string{\"Font Pairing Name\", \"Category\", \"Mood/Style Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Heading Font\", \"Body Font\"},\n\t\tOutputCols: []string{\"Font Pairing Name\", \"Category\", \"Heading Font\", \"Body Font\", \"Mood/Style Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Google Fonts URL\", \"CSS Import\", \"Tailwind Config\", \"Notes\"},\n\t},\n}\n\n// StackConfigs maps technology stacks to their respective CSV files\nvar StackConfigs = map[string]string{\n\t\"html-tailwind\": \"data/stacks/html-tailwind.csv\",\n\t\"react\":         \"data/stacks/react.csv\",\n\t\"nextjs\":        \"data/stacks/nextjs.csv\",\n\t\"vue\":           \"data/stacks/vue.csv\",\n\t\"nuxtjs\":        \"data/stacks/nuxtjs.csv\",\n\t\"nuxt-ui\": \"data/stacks/react-native.csv\",\n\t\"flutter\":       \"data/stacks/flutter.csv\",\n}\n\n// StackCols defines search and output columns for stack-specific data\nvar StackCols = struct {\n\tSearchCols []string\n\tOutputCols []string\n}{\n\tSearchCols: []string{\"Category\", \"Guideline\", \"Description\", \"Do\", \"Don't\"},\n\tOutputCols: []string{\"Category\", \"Guideline\", \"Description\", \"Do\", \"Don't\", \"Code Good\", \"Code Bad\", \"Severity\", \"Docs URL\"},\n}\n\n// UIUXService manages design intelligence data and search\ntype UIUXService struct{}\n\n// NewUIUXService creates a new UIUXService using embedded data",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "- 如果未指定 &#96;AppName&#96;，所有应用共享同一存储空间\n\n**层次化检索逻辑**：\n1. 构建页面时，首先检查 &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;\n2. 如果页面文件存在，其规则**覆盖** Master 文件\n3. 如果不存在，使用 &#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96; 的规则\n\n### 多应用/Agent 隔离\n\n当多个应用或 Agent 调用 UI/UX 工具时，建议使用 &#96;AppName&#96; 参数进行隔离：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// 应用 A（Travel Agent）\npersistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"travel booking platform\",\n    ProjectName: \"TravelApp\",\n    AppName:     \"travel\",  // 隔离存储\n})\n\n// 应用 B（Stock Agent）\npersistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"stock analysis dashboard\",\n    ProjectName: \"StockApp\",\n    AppName:     \"stock\",  // 隔离存储\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n存储结果：\n- Travel: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/travelapp/MASTER.md&#96;\n- Stock: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/stock/design-system/stockapp/MASTER.md&#96;\n\n## 推理引擎\n\nAgent 使用 100 条行业特定推理规则（来自 &#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96;），包括：\n\n- SaaS、E-commerce、Healthcare、Fintech 等 100 个行业类别\n- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等\n\n## 示例\n\n### 示例 1：生成设计系统\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nagent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)\nresult, _ := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"beauty spa wellness service\")\n// Agent 会自动：\n// 1. 识别产品类型：Beauty/Spa/Wellness Service\n// 2. 匹配推理规则\n// 3. 生成完整设计系统\n// 4. 返回格式化的结果\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 示例 2：持久化设计系统（默认路径）\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"beauty spa wellness service\",\n    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\",\n    PageName:    \"homepage\",\n})\n// 创建文件：\n// - storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/serenity-spa/MASTER.md\n// - storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/serenity-spa/pages/homepage.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "- 如果未指定 &#96;AppName&#96;，所有应用共享同一存储空间"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "**层次化检索逻辑**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "1. 构建页面时，首先检查 &#96;design-system/pages/[page-name].md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "2. 如果页面文件存在，其规则**覆盖** Master 文件"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "3. 如果不存在，使用 &#96;design-system/MASTER.md&#96; 的规则"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "### 多应用/Agent 隔离"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "当多个应用或 Agent 调用 UI/UX 工具时，建议使用 &#96;AppName&#96; 参数进行隔离："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "// 应用 A（Travel Agent）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "    Query:       \"travel booking platform\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "    ProjectName: \"TravelApp\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    AppName:     \"travel\",  // 隔离存储"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "// 应用 B（Stock Agent）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "    Query:       \"stock analysis dashboard\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "    ProjectName: \"StockApp\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "    AppName:     \"stock\",  // 隔离存储"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "存储结果："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "- Travel: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/travelapp/MASTER.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "- Stock: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/stock/design-system/stockapp/MASTER.md&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "## 推理引擎"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "Agent 使用 100 条行业特定推理规则（来自 &#96;ui-reasoning.csv&#96;），包括："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "- SaaS、E-commerce、Healthcare、Fintech 等 100 个行业类别"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "- 每个类别包含：推荐模式、样式优先级、配色情绪、字体情绪、关键效果、反模式等"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "## 示例"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "### 示例 1：生成设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "agent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "result, _ := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"beauty spa wellness service\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "// Agent 会自动："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "// 1. 识别产品类型：Beauty/Spa/Wellness Service"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "// 2. 匹配推理规则"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "// 3. 生成完整设计系统"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "// 4. 返回格式化的结果"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "### 示例 2：持久化设计系统（默认路径）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "persistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "result, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{"
          },
          {

            "text": "    Query:       \"beauty spa wellness service\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "    PageName:    \"homepage\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "})"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"generate_design_system\",\n\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。基于产品类型和需求，自动匹配最佳的设计方案。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *GenerateDesignSystemRequest) (*GenerateDesignSystemResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treq.ProjectName = \"Project\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tds, err := service.GenerateDesignSystem(req.Query, req.ProjectName)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 格式化输出为可读字符串\n\t\t\tvar sb strings.Builder\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"设计系统: %s\\n\", ds.ProjectName))\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"产品类型: %s\\n\\n\", ds.Category))\n\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"=== 布局模式 ===\\n\")\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"模式名称: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.Name))\n\t\t\tif ds.Pattern.Sections != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"区块顺序: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.Sections))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Pattern.CTAPlacement != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"CTA 位置: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.CTAPlacement))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Pattern.Conversion != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"转化策略: %s\\n\", ds.Pattern.Conversion))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"=== 样式 ===\\n\")\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"样式名称: %s\\n\", ds.Style.Name))\n\t\t\tif ds.Style.Keywords != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"关键词: %s\\n\", ds.Style.Keywords))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Style.BestFor != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"适用场景: %s\\n\", ds.Style.BestFor))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Style.Performance != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"性能: %s\\n\", ds.Style.Performance))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif ds.Style.Accessibility != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"可访问性: %s\\n\", ds.Style.Accessibility))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(\"=== 配色方案 ===\\n\")\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"主色: %s\\n\", ds.Colors.Primary))\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"次色: %s\\n\", ds.Colors.Secondary))\n\t\t\tsb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"CTA: %s\\n\", ds.Colors.CTA))",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n    openaiModel \"github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/openai\"\n)\n\n// 1. 创建 ChatModel\nchatModel, err := openaiModel.NewChatModel(ctx, \u0026openaiModel.ChatModelConfig{\n    BaseURL: \"https://api.openai.com/v1\",\n    APIKey:  \"your-api-key\",\n    Model:   \"gpt-4\",\n})\n\n// 2. 创建 Agent\nagent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 3. 调用 Agent\nresult, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\nfmt.Println(result.Content)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 方式三：将 Agent 作为工具使用\n\n**方式 3a：从配置创建（推荐）**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"\n)\n\n// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）\n_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 2. 从配置创建 Agent 工具（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）\nagentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 3. 在其他 Agent 中使用\ntools := []tool.BaseTool{\n    agentTool, // Agent 作为工具\n    // 其他工具...\n}\n\n// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**方式 3b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"\n)\n\n// 1. 创建 ChatModel\nchatModel, _ := createChatModel(ctx)\n\n// 2. 将 Agent 包装成工具\nagentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 3. 在其他 Agent 中使用\ntools := []tool.BaseTool{\n    agentTool, // Agent 作为工具\n    // 其他工具...\n}\n\n// 4. 在其他 Agent 中，LLM 会自动调用这个工具\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Agent 工作流\n\nAgent 内部自动执行以下工作流：",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\nvar domainKeywords = map[string][]string{\n\t\"color\":      {\"color\", \"palette\", \"hex\", \"#\", \"rgb\"},\n\t\"chart\":      {\"chart\", \"graph\", \"visualization\", \"trend\", \"bar\", \"pie\", \"scatter\", \"heatmap\", \"funnel\"},\n\t\"landing\":    {\"landing\", \"page\", \"cta\", \"conversion\", \"hero\", \"testimonial\", \"pricing\", \"section\"},\n\t\"product\":    {\"saas\", \"ecommerce\", \"e-commerce\", \"fintech\", \"healthcare\", \"gaming\", \"portfolio\", \"crypto\", \"dashboard\"},\n\t\"prompt\":     {\"prompt\", \"css\", \"implementation\", \"variable\", \"checklist\", \"tailwind\"},\n\t\"style\":      {\"style\", \"design\", \"ui\", \"minimalism\", \"glassmorphism\", \"neumorphism\", \"brutalism\", \"dark mode\", \"flat\", \"aurora\"},\n\t\"ux\":         {\"ux\", \"usability\", \"accessibility\", \"wcag\", \"touch\", \"scroll\", \"animation\", \"keyboard\", \"navigation\", \"mobile\"},\n\t\"typography\": {\"font\", \"typography\", \"heading\", \"serif\", \"sans\"},\n}\n\n// DetectDomain auto-detects the most relevant domain from the query.\nfunc DetectDomain(query string) string {\n\tqueryLower := strings.ToLower(query)\n\tqueryPadded := \" \" + queryLower + \" \"\n\tscores := make(map[string]int)\n\n\tfor domain, keywords := range domainKeywords {\n\t\tscore := 0\n\t\tfor _, kw := range keywords {\n\t\t\tif strings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\" \") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\",\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\".\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\"?\") ||\n\t\t\t\tstrings.Contains(queryPadded, \" \"+kw+\"!\") {\n\t\t\t\tscore++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tscores[domain] = score\n\t}\n\n\tbestDomain := \"style\"\n\tmaxScore := 0\n\n\tfor _, domain := range []string{\"color\", \"chart\", \"landing\", \"product\", \"prompt\", \"style\", \"ux\", \"typography\"} {\n\t\tif scores[domain] \u003e maxScore {\n\t\t\tmaxScore = scores[domain]\n\t\t\tbestDomain = domain\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn bestDomain\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"regexp\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\trePunct = regexp.MustCompile(&#96;[^\\w\\s]&#96;)\n)\n\n// BM25 implements the BM25 ranking algorithm.\ntype BM25 struct {\n\tk1         float64\n\tb          float64\n\tcorpus     [][]string\n\tdocLengths []int\n\tavgdl      float64\n\tidf        map[string]float64\n\tdocFreqs   map[string]int\n\tN          int\n}\n\n// NewBM25 creates a new BM25 instance.\nfunc NewBM25(k1, b float64) *BM25 {\n\treturn \u0026BM25{\n\t\tk1:       k1,\n\t\tb:        b,\n\t\tidf:      make(map[string]float64),\n\t\tdocFreqs: make(map[string]int),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Tokenize converts text into a slice of tokens.\nfunc (b *BM25) Tokenize(text string) []string {\n\t// Lowercase and remove punctuation\n\ttext = strings.ToLower(text)\n\ttext = rePunct.ReplaceAllString(text, \" \")\n\n\twords := strings.Fields(text)\n\tvar tokens []string\n\tfor _, w := range words {\n\t\tif len(w) \u003e 2 {\n\t\t\ttokens = append(tokens, w)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn tokens\n}\n\n// Fit builds the BM25 index from documents.\nfunc (b *BM25) Fit(documents []string) {\n\tb.corpus = make([][]string, len(documents))\n\tb.docLengths = make([]int, len(documents))\n\tb.N = len(documents)\n\n\tif b.N == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttotalLen := 0\n\tfor i, doc := range documents {\n\t\ttokens := b.Tokenize(doc)\n\t\tb.corpus[i] = tokens\n\t\tb.docLengths[i] = len(tokens)\n\t\ttotalLen += len(tokens)\n\n\t\tseen := make(map[string]bool)\n\t\tfor _, token := range tokens {\n\t\t\tif !seen[token] {\n\t\t\t\tb.docFreqs[token]++\n\t\t\t\tseen[token] = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tb.avgdl = float64(totalLen) / float64(b.N)\n\n\tfor word, freq := range b.docFreqs {\n\t\tb.idf[word] = math.Log((float64(b.N)-float64(freq)+0.5)/(float64(freq)+0.5) + 1.0)\n\t}\n}\n\n// ScoreRank represents a document index and its score.\ntype ScoreRank struct {\n\tIndex int\n\tScore float64\n}\n\n// Score all documents against the query.\nfunc (b *BM25) Score(query string) []ScoreRank {\n\tqueryTokens := b.Tokenize(query)\n\tscores := make([]ScoreRank, b.N)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package ui_ux\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\n// DesignSystem 设计系统结构\ntype DesignSystem struct {\n\tProjectName  string\n\tCategory     string\n\tPattern      *Pattern\n\tStyle        *Style\n\tColors       *Colors\n\tTypography   *Typography\n\tKeyEffects   string\n\tAntiPatterns string\n}\n\n// Pattern 布局模式\ntype Pattern struct {\n\tName          string\n\tSections      string\n\tCTAPlacement  string\n\tColorStrategy string\n\tConversion    string\n}\n\n// Style 样式信息\ntype Style struct {\n\tName         string\n\tType         string\n\tEffects      string\n\tKeywords     string\n\tBestFor      string\n\tPerformance  string\n\tAccessibility string\n}\n\n// Colors 配色方案\ntype Colors struct {\n\tPrimary    string\n\tSecondary  string\n\tCTA        string\n\tBackground string\n\tText       string\n\tNotes      string\n}\n\n// Typography 字体排版\ntype Typography struct {\n\tHeading       string\n\tBody          string\n\tMood          string\n\tBestFor       string\n\tGoogleFontsURL string\n\tCSSImport     string\n}\n\n// DesignSystemGenerator 设计系统生成器\ntype DesignSystemGenerator struct {\n\tservice   *UIUXService\n\treasoning *ReasoningEngine\n}\n\n// NewDesignSystemGenerator 创建设计系统生成器\nfunc NewDesignSystemGenerator() (*DesignSystemGenerator, error) {\n\treasoning, err := NewReasoningEngine()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026DesignSystemGenerator{\n\t\tservice:   NewUIUXService(),\n\t\treasoning: reasoning,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// GenerateDesignSystem 生成完整设计系统\nfunc (g *DesignSystemGenerator) GenerateDesignSystem(query string, projectName string) (*DesignSystem, error) {\n\t// Step 1: 搜索 product 领域获取产品类型",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {\n\tservice := NewUIUXService()\n\n\treturn utils.InferTool(\"persist_design_system\",\n\t\t\"将设计系统持久化到文件系统，使用 Master + Overrides 模式。会创建 design-system/{project}/MASTER.md 和可选的 pages/{page}.md 文件。\",\n\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *PersistDesignSystemRequest) (*PersistDesignSystemResponse, error) {\n\t\t\tif req.ProjectName == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"project_name is required\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 生成设计系统\n\t\t\tds, err := service.GenerateDesignSystem(req.Query, req.ProjectName)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to generate design system: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 持久化\n\t\t\tmanager := NewPersistenceManager(req.BaseDir, req.AppName)\n\t\t\tprojectSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.ProjectName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tif err := manager.PersistDesignSystem(ds, projectSlug, req.PageName); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to persist design system: %w\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// 构建响应路径（用于显示）\n\t\t\tvar masterPath, pagePath string\n\t\t\tbaseDir := manager.GetBaseDir()\n\t\t\tappName := manager.GetAppName()\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tif appName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tmasterPath = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s/design-system/%s/MASTER.md\", baseDir, appName, projectSlug)\n\t\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tpageSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.PageName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\t\tpagePath = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s/design-system/%s/pages/%s.md\", baseDir, appName, projectSlug, pageSlug)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tmasterPath = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/design-system/%s/MASTER.md\", baseDir, projectSlug)\n\t\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\tpageSlug := strings.ToLower(strings.ReplaceAll(req.PageName, \" \", \"-\"))\n\t\t\t\t\tpagePath = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/design-system/%s/pages/%s.md\", baseDir, projectSlug, pageSlug)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresponse :=",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// - storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/serenity-spa/pages/homepage.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 示例 3：持久化设计系统（应用隔离）\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"beauty spa wellness service\",\n    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\",\n    PageName:    \"homepage\",\n    AppName:     \"beauty_app\",  // 应用隔离\n})\n// 创建文件：\n// - storage/app/ui_ux/beauty_app/design-system/serenity-spa/MASTER.md\n// - storage/app/ui_ux/beauty_app/design-system/serenity-spa/pages/homepage.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 示例 4：自定义存储路径\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"beauty spa wellness service\",\n    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\",\n    BaseDir:     \"/custom/path/to/storage\",  // 自定义基础目录\n    AppName:     \"beauty_app\",\n})\n// 创建文件：\n// - /custom/path/to/storage/beauty_app/design-system/serenity-spa/MASTER.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 配置说明\n\n### UI/UX 存储配置\n\n在 &#96;config/config.yaml&#96; 中配置存储路径：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nUIUX:\n  Storage:\n    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"     # 设计系统存储基础目录\n    # 存储结构：\n    # - 如果指定 AppName: {BaseDir}/{app-name}/design-system/{project}/MASTER.md\n    # - 如果未指定: {BaseDir}/design-system/{project}/MASTER.md\n    # 示例：\n    # - AppName=\"travel\": storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/my-project/MASTER.md\n    # - 未指定: storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/my-project/MASTER.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**存储路径优先级**：\n1. 如果调用时指定了 &#96;BaseDir&#96;，使用指定的路径\n2. 否则，从配置文件的 &#96;UIUX.Storage.BaseDir&#96; 读取\n3. 如果配置文件中也没有，使用默认值 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux&#96;",

            "text": "### UI/UX 存储配置"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "在 &#96;config/config.yaml&#96; 中配置存储路径："

            "text": "    # 存储结构："

            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "    # - 如果指定 AppName: {BaseDir}/{app-name}/design-system/{project}/MASTER.md"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "    # - 如果未指定: {BaseDir}/design-system/{project}/MASTER.md"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "    # 示例："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "    # - AppName=\"travel\": storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/my-project/MASTER.md"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "    # - 未指定: storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/my-project/MASTER.md"

            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "**存储路径优先级**："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "1. 如果调用时指定了 &#96;BaseDir&#96;，使用指定的路径"

          },

            "text": "3. 如果配置文件中也没有，使用默认值 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux&#96;"

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

已创建改进对比文档。以下是主要改进：

## UI/UX 工具改进总结

### 核心变化：从搜索工具升级为设计系统生成平台

#### 1. 功能扩展（3 个新工具）

| 功能 | v1.0 | v2.0 |
|------|------|------|
| 搜索工具 | ✅ `ui_ux_search` | ✅ 保留 |
| 设计系统生成 | ❌ | ✅ **新增** `generate_design_system` |
| 持久化 | ❌ | ✅ **新增** `persist_design_system` |
| Agent 编排 | ❌ | ✅ **新增** `UIDesignSystemAgent` |

#### 2. 设计系统生成能力

v1.0：只能搜索设计知识库
```go
searchTool.Invoke(ctx, "minimal design")
// 返回：搜索结果列表
```

v2.0：生成完整设计系统
```go
agent.Invoke(ctx, "生成一个美容spa的设计系统")
// 返回：Pattern + Style + Colors + Typography + Effects + Anti-patterns
```

改进点：
- 多领域并行搜索（5 个领域）
- 推理引擎（100 条行业规则）
- BM25 排序选择最佳匹配
- 生成完整设计系统结构

#### 3. 持久化功能（Master + Overrides 模式）

v1.0：无持久化

v2.0：支持持久化到文件系统
```
storage/app/ui_ux/
├── {app-name}/              # 应用隔离
│   └── design-system/
│       └── {project}/
│           ├── MASTER.md    # 全局设计系统
│           └── pages/
│               └── {page}.md  # 页面覆盖
```

改进点：
- Master + Overrides 模式
- 配置化存储路径
- 应用/Agent 隔离（`AppName` 参数）
- 层次化检索逻辑

#### 4. Agent 编排能力

v1.0：只有工具，需手动调用

v2.0：智能编排的 Agent
```go
// 从配置创建
agent, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)
result, _ := agent.Invoke(ctx, "生成设计系统")

// 作为工具使用
agentTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)
```

工作流：
1. 分析需求
2. 生成设计系统
3. 补充搜索
4. 技术栈指南
5. 持久化（可选）

#### 5. 配置化改进

ChatModel 配置（参考 DigFlow）：
```yaml
ChatModel:
  Type: "qwen"  # 简化：从 3 种独立配置改为统一的 Type + Config
  Config:
    ApiKey: "${QWEN_API_KEY}"  # 支持环境变量
    Model: "qwen-max"
```

存储配置：
```yaml
UIUX:
  Storage:
    BaseDir: "storage/app/ui_ux"  # 统一管理存储路径
```

#### 6. 应用/Agent 隔离

v1.0：无隔离机制

v2.0：支持多应用隔离
```go
// Travel Agent
persistTool.Invoke(ctx, &ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{
    AppName: "travel",  // 隔离存储
})

// Stock Agent  
persistTool.Invoke(ctx, &ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{
    AppName: "stock",  // 隔离存储
})
```

### 新增文件

- `design_system.go` - 设计系统生成
- `reasoning.go` - 推理引擎（100 条规则）
- `persistence.go` - 持久化管理
- `agent.go` - Agent 编排
- `agent_tool.go` - Agent 工具包装
- `model_factory.go` - 配置驱动的 ChatModel 工厂
- `data/ui-reasoning.csv` - 行业推理规则数据

### 向后兼容性

完全向后兼容：
- `ui_ux_search` 功能保持不变
- 所有原有 API 保持不变
- 新增功能都是可选的

### 使用场景扩展

- 单应用：直接使用 Agent 生成设计系统
- 多应用：使用 `AppName` 隔离不同应用
- Agent 组合：将 UI/UX Agent 作为工具供其他 Agent 使用
- 企业级：配置化管理，支持环境变量

详细对比文档已保存到：`tools/ui_ux/CHANGELOG.md`

总结：从单一搜索工具升级为完整的设计系统生成平台，支持智能编排、持久化和多应用隔离。

已创建更新文档：`docs/updates/2026-02-01_ui_ux_config_and_storage_improvements.md`

## 文档内容概览

文档包含以下部分：

### 1. **Summary（摘要）**
   - 简化 ChatModel 配置（对齐 DigFlow）
   - 可配置存储路径
   - 应用/Agent 隔离支持

### 2. **Changes Made（变更详情）**
   - ChatModel 配置简化（Before/After 对比）
   - 存储路径配置化
   - 应用隔离功能

### 3. **Components Modified（修改的文件）**
   - 配置文件：`config/config.go`, `config/config.yaml`
   - UI/UX 工具文件：`persistence.go`, `tool.go`, `model_factory.go`
   - 文档：`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`

### 4. **Configuration（配置说明）**
   - ChatModel 配置示例
   - UIUX 存储配置示例

### 5. **Migration Guide（迁移指南）**
   - 如何从旧配置迁移到新配置
   - 环境变量设置

### 6. **Usage Examples（使用示例）**
   - 配置驱动的 Agent 使用
   - 应用隔离示例
   - 自定义存储路径示例

### 7. **Technical Details（技术细节）**
   - 环境变量处理机制
   - 存储路径解析逻辑

### 8. **Backward Compatibility（向后兼容性）**
   - 完全向后兼容说明

### 9. **Impact（影响）**
   - 改进带来的好处
   - 启用的使用场景

文档已保存，格式与现有更新文档一致。

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

已创建使用指南。以下是在 DigFlow 或其他项目中使用 DigEino UI/UX 工具的方法：

## 使用方式总结

### 方式一：单独注册工具（推荐）

在你的 DigFlow 应用的 `app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go` 中：

```go
package tools

import (
    "context"
    "DigFlow/internal/global/variable"
    "github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux"
)

func init() {
    ctx := context.Background()
    
    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具
    searchTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)
    variable.ToolRegistry.Register("ui_ux_search", searchTool)
    
    // 注册设计系统生成工具
    designTool, _ := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)
    variable.ToolRegistry.Register("generate_design_system", designTool)
    
    // 注册持久化工具
    persistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)
    variable.ToolRegistry.Register("persist_design_system", persistTool)
}
```

### 方式二：批量注册所有 DigEino 工具

```go
import digeinoTools "github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools"

func init() {
    ctx := context.Background()
    baseTools, _ := digeinoTools.BaseTools(ctx)
    
    for _, tool := range baseTools {
        info, _ := tool.Info(ctx)
        variable.ToolRegistry.Register(info.Name, tool)
    }
}
```

### 方式三：在 agent.yml 中配置

```yaml
Tools:
  - Name: "ui_ux_search"
    Description: "检索 UI/UX 设计知识库"
    UseGlobal: false  # 如果工具在应用级别注册

Nodes:
  - Key: "designer"
    Type: "chat_model"
    BindTools:
      - "ui_ux_search"
      - "generate_design_system"
      - "persist_design_system"
```

## 创建的文档

1. 详细集成指南：`docs/integration/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md`
   - 三种使用方式
   - 配置说明
   - 使用示例
   - 故障排查

2. 快速开始指南：`docs/integration/QUICKSTART.md`
   - 最简单的使用方式
   - 快速参考

## 关键要点

1. 依赖已存在：DigFlow 的 `go.mod` 中已有 `github.com/originaleric/digeino`
2. 工具注册：在 `tool_register.go` 的 `init()` 中注册
3. Bootstrap 导入：在 `bootstrap/init.go` 中导入工具包触发注册
4. Agent 配置：在 `agent.yml` 中引用工具名称

## 可用的工具

- `ui_ux_search` - 搜索设计知识库
- `generate_design_system` - 生成完整设计系统
- `persist_design_system` - 持久化设计系统

详细说明请查看 `docs/integration/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md`。

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

已更新文档，添加了使用 UI/UX Agent 工具的说明。以下是使用方法：

## 使用 UI/UX Agent 工具的方法

### 最简单的方式（推荐）

**1. 注册 Agent 工具**

在你的 DigFlow 应用的 `app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go` 中：

```go
package tools

import (
    "context"
    "DigFlow/internal/global/variable"
    "DigFlow/internal/utils/logger"
    "github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux"
    "go.uber.org/zap"
)

func init() {
    ctx := context.Background()
    
    // 从 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel
    chatModel, err := variable.ModelRegistry.GetChatModel("ui_model")
    if err != nil {
        logger.Error("获取 ChatModel 失败", zap.Error(err))
        return
    }
    
    // 创建并注册 Agent 工具
    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)
    if err != nil {
        logger.Error("创建 Agent 工具失败", zap.Error(err))
        return
    }
    
    variable.ToolRegistry.Register("generate_ui_design_system", agentTool)
    logger.Info("UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功")
}
```

**2. 配置模型**

在 `app/your_app/config/agent.yml` 中：

```yaml
Models:
  - Name: "ui_model"  # 必须与 tool_register.go 中的名称一致
    Type: "qwen"
    Config:
      api_key: "${QWEN_API_KEY}"
      model: "qwen-max"
      base_url: "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1"

Tools:
  - Name: "generate_ui_design_system"
    Description: "生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统（智能编排 Agent）"
    UseGlobal: false

Nodes:
  - Key: "designer"
    Type: "chat_model"
    Model: "ui_model"
    SystemPrompt: |
      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。
      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。
    BindTools:
      - "generate_ui_design_system"
```

**3. 使用**

用户只需要说：
```
生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa，技术栈：react
```

Agent 会自动完成：
- 分析需求
- 生成设计系统
- 补充搜索
- 获取技术栈指南
- 返回完整结果

## Agent 工具的优势

相比单独使用工具，Agent 工具的优势：

1. 自动编排：无需手动编排工作流
2. 智能决策：根据需求自动调用合适的工具
3. 完整输出：一次性返回完整设计系统
4. 简单易用：只需一个工具调用

## 创建的文档

1. 详细集成指南：`docs/integration/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md`（已更新）
   - 添加了 Agent 工具的详细说明
   - 包含两种创建方式（DigFlow 模型 vs DigEino 配置）

2. Agent 工具快速指南：`docs/integration/AGENT_TOOL_USAGE.md`（新建）
   - 快速开始指南
   - 使用场景示例
   - 参数说明
   - 故障排查

## 关键要点

- 使用 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry：`variable.ModelRegistry.GetChatModel("ui_model")`
- 模型名称必须一致：`agent.yml` 中的模型名称要与代码中的一致
- Agent 工具名称：`generate_ui_design_system`
- 自动工作流：Agent 会自动完成整个设计系统生成流程

详细说明请查看 `docs/integration/AGENT_TOOL_USAGE.md`。

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

是的，`generate_ui_design_system` 就是 UI/UX Agent 包装成的工具。

## 关系说明

```
UIDesignSystemAgent (真正的 Agent)
    ↓
NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool() (将 Agent 包装成工具)
    ↓
generate_ui_design_system (工具名称，在 BindTools 中使用)
```

## 代码结构

1. **UIDesignSystemAgent**：真正的 Agent（编排的工作流）
   ```go
   type UIDesignSystemAgent struct {
       agent compose.Runnable[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]
   }
   ```

2. **NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool**：将 Agent 包装成工具
   ```go
   func NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel) (tool.BaseTool, error) {
       // 创建 Agent 实例
       agentInstance, err := NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)
       
       // 将 Agent 包装成工具，工具名称是 "generate_ui_design_system"
       return utils.InferTool("generate_ui_design_system", ...)
   }
   ```

3. **generate_ui_design_system**：工具名称（在 agent.yml 中使用）
   ```yaml
   BindTools:
     - "generate_ui_design_system"  # 这就是 UI/UX Agent
   ```

## 工作流程

当你在 DigFlow 的 Agent 中调用 `generate_ui_design_system` 时：

```
你的 DigFlow Agent
    ↓
调用 generate_ui_design_system 工具
    ↓
工具内部调用 UIDesignSystemAgent.Invoke()
    ↓
UIDesignSystemAgent 内部自动调用：
  - ui_ux_search
  - generate_design_system  
  - persist_design_system
    ↓
返回完整的设计系统结果
```

## 总结

- `generate_ui_design_system` = UI/UX Agent 包装成的工具
- 在 `BindTools` 中使用 `generate_ui_design_system` 就是使用 UI/UX Agent
- Agent 内部会自动编排整个工作流，你不需要手动调用各个子工具

所以你的理解是正确的。
